data.jd_text:
**Overview**
The Business Director is a senior leadership role responsible for end to end stewardship of client relationships within the Publicis Groupe ecosystem. The role requires deep understanding of how a modern holding company operates across multiple agencies, verticals, and specialist capabilities while ensuring seamless, integrated delivery to clients.
  
  
This role leads the creation and growth of the Customer Analytics & Insights function. It is a transformational, entrepreneurial position responsible for embedding a data‑driven culture, building governance, setting processes, and coordinating analytics across business units.
  
  
**Responsibilities**
Key responsibilities include deploying modern data infrastructure and tools, ensuring data governance, and developing advanced analytics models. The role generates insights across customer segmentation, forecasting, churn prediction, campaign performance, inventory optimization, and customer lifetime value, supporting major functions across Retail, Marketing, Loyalty, Customer Engagement, and Digital. Strong emphasis is placed on presenting insights through compelling data storytelling for senior leadership.
  
  
The position acts as a central partner to executive stakeholders, internal cross‑functional teams, and external vendors. It also focuses heavily on
**team leadership**
, recruiting and nurturing analytics talent, and promoting a culture of innovation and continuous improvement
  
  
**Qualifications**
Qualifications include extensive experience (15+ years) in analytics, loyalty, big data, and AI, strong technical skills (SQL, Python, R, BI tools, Dataiku), and excellent communication and storytelling capabilities.
  
  
Please note this role is based in Abu Dhabi - for a 12 month contract.
  
  
Arabic is required.
  
  
**Additional Information**
R-3973P-4518

data.title: Head of Revenue Analytics
data.raw_snippet:
The Apex Group was established in Bermuda in 2003 and is now one of the world’s largest fund administration and middle office solutions providers.
  
  
Our business is unique in its ability to reach globally, service locally and provide cross-jurisdictional services. With our clients at the heart o
data.jd_text:
The Apex Group was established in Bermuda in 2003 and is now one of the world’s largest fund administration and middle office solutions providers.
  
  
Our business is unique in its ability to reach globally, service locally and provide cross-jurisdictional services. With our clients at the heart of everything we do, our hard-working team has successfully delivered on an unprecedented growth and transformation journey, and we are now represented by over circa 13,000 employees across 112 offices worldwide.Your career with us should reflect your energy and passion.
  
  
That’s why, at Apex Group, we will do more than simply ‘empower’ you. We will work to supercharge your unique skills and experience.
  
  
Take the lead and we’ll give you the support you need to be at the top of your game. And we offer you the freedom to be a positive disrupter and turn big ideas into bold, industry-changing realities.
  
  
For our business, for clients, and for you
  
  
**Head of Revenue Analytics**
**Role Purpose**
The Head of Revenue Analytics is responsible for building, owning, and governing Apex Group’s global commercial analytics capability, ensuring trusted, actionable, and forward-looking insights drive revenue predictability and growth.
  
  
This role owns the
**revenue analytics layer**
across Salesforce and the enterprise data platform, while working in close partnership with
**Apex’s Global Analytics function and AI teams**
to integrate broader data sources, advanced analytics, and predictive insights into the commercial operating model.
  
  
The role requires a leader who is
**technically credible**
,
**commercially fluent**
, and able to bridge enterprise data strategy with frontline sales execution—ensuring analytics move from reporting to
**decisioning and action**
.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Revenue Analytics Ownership & Architecture
* Own the end-to-end revenue analytics domain, including data models, metrics, dashboards, and insight delivery for Sales and CRM.
* Lead the design of scalable revenue data models across pipeline, forecasting, bookings, and performance.
* Own the semantic layer and metric definitions that power executive reporting and operational decision-making.
* Partner with IT and Data Engineering to ensure performance, security, and scalability of the revenue analytics stack.
* Partnership with Global Analytics Function
* Act as the commercial analytics lead interfacing with Apex’s global enterprise analytics team.
* Align revenue analytics requirements with enterprise data standards, tooling, and governance.
* Leverage central analytics capabilities (data science, advanced modeling, data engineering) while retaining clear ownership of revenue-specific outputs.
* Ensure consistency between enterprise-wide analytics initiatives and commercial reporting.
* Advanced & Predictive Analytics
* Lead the evolution from descriptive and diagnostic reporting to predictive and prescriptive analytics.
* Develop models to forecast pipeline risk, deal slippage, win probability, and revenue confidence.
* Partner with AI and data science teams to:

+ Embed predictive insights into Salesforce and commercial workflows
+ Enable next-best-action recommendations for Sales and CRM
+ Surface risks and opportunities proactively, not reactively

* Champion experimentation and iterative improvement of analytical models.
* Data Integration & External Data Enablement
* Drive the integration of additional internal and third-party data sources, including:

+ Market and industry data
+ Client and fund-level intelligence
+ Benchmarking and competitive insights
+ Alternative and external signals relevant to revenue generation

* Ensure third-party data is mapped, governed, and made actionable within commercial tools.
* Work with AI and product teams to operationalise insights rather than leaving them in dashboards.
* Analytics Build & Insight Delivery
* Lead the build of executive dashboards and scorecards for:

+ Forecast accuracy and confidence
+ Pipeline health and conversion
+ Sales productivity and performance
+ Regional, product, and segment trends

* Ensure insights are intuitive, timely, and aligned to commercial decision points.
* Support QBRs, MBRs, and board-level reporting with defensible, consistent analytics.
* Data Governance, Quality & Trust
* Own revenue data governance, including definitions, standards, lineage, and documentation.
* Establish monitoring and controls for data quality, completeness, and integrity.
* Partner with Sales Ops, Deal Desk, and CRM to drive upstream data discipline.
* Serve as the escalation point for revenue data discrepancies across regions.
* Leadership & Capability Development
* Build and lead a high-performing Revenue Analytics team.
* Set standards for analytical rigor, documentation, and technical excellence.
* Develop talent capable of operating confidently across data, AI, and commercial stakeholders.

**Required Experience & Profile**
**Must-Have**

* 10–15+ years in analytics, data, or revenue intelligence roles.
* Experience leading analytics in financial services, fund administration, fintech, or regulated B2B environments.
* Strong hands-on background in data modeling, SQL, analytics engineering, and BI.
* Proven experience working with enterprise analytics and AI/data science teams.
* Demonstrated success translating complex analytics into commercial action.

**Nice-to-Have**

* Experience operationalising AI or predictive insights in CRM or GTM tools.
* Exposure to third-party data integration and alternative data sources.
* Familiarity with long-cycle, complex B2B sales and forecasting models.

**Additional information:**
We are an equal opportunity employer and ensure that no applicant is subject to less favourable treatment on the grounds of gender, gender identity, marital status, race, colour, nationality, ethnicity, age, sexual orientation, socio-economic, responsibilities for dependants, physical or mental disability. Any hiring decision are made on the basis of skills, qualifications and experiences.
  
  
We measure our success as a business, not only by delivering great products and services and continually increasing our assets under administration and market share, but also by how we positively impact people, society and the planet.
  
  
For more information on our commitment to Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) please visit https://theapexgroup.com/csr-policy/
  
  
Disclaimer: Unsolicited CVs sent to Apex (Talent Acquisition Team or Hiring Managers) by recruitment agencies will not be accepted for this position. Apex operates a direct sourcing model and where agency assistance is required, the Talent Acquisition team will engage directly with our exclusive recruitment partners.

data.raw_snippet:

**Job Title**

Senior Vice President, Head - Brand & Corporate Communication (UAE National)

**Job Purpose**

Responsible for leading global brand and corporate communications strategy, oversee
data.jd_text:
**JOB DESCRIPTION**

**Job Title**

Senior Vice President, Head - Brand & Corporate Communication (UAE National)

**Department:**
MCG

**Direct Supervisor:**
Group Head of Marketing & Communications

**Job Purpose**

Responsible for leading global brand and corporate communications strategy, overseeing brand partnerships, employer branding, content management, new market brand expansion, ESG brand integration, social media management, corporate and internal communications, and leveraging research and insights to drive brand relevance and resonance. Ensure alignment with the bank's values and business objectives, while enhancing brand image, market reach, and stakeholder engagement at a strategic level.

**Key Result Areas**

**Brand Management**

* Work closely with the Group Head of Marketing & Communication to lead brand & communications strategies and special projects globally, including existing and new growth markets such as Egypt, Pakistan and International Banking Group countries.
* Work in close alignment with Business Group Heads to ensure their narratives, initiatives and achievements are communicated effectively, contributing to the holistic brand story of the bank.
* Lead and provide strategic direction for brand, PR and social media to meet Brand KPIs for the year, increasing awareness, consideration, and overall brand rankings.
* Build customer trust through awareness campaigns such as fraud and information security.
* Build brand saliency through thematic campaigns and events annually.
* Develop a 360-degree brand plan leveraging PR, paid digital, social media and alternate channels.
* Support Business Marketing teams for strategic brand and product campaigns, research and consumer PR.
* Guide agencies to better understand value propositions across all business groups to deliver superior brand plans.
* Monitor development of quarterly brand calendar and monthly activities.
* Track campaign performance across Brand KPIs.
* Oversee all communication outputs to ensure consistency, timely rollout, and removal of obsolete collateral.
* Define and uphold brand identity, values, and visual language across all channels.
* Develop and maintain brand guidelines for internal and external stakeholders.
* Monitor and protect brand reputation and enhance perception.

**Brand Expansion in New Markets**

* Develop and execute comprehensive brand strategies for new markets, adapting to local consumer behavior and positioning (e.g., Egypt, Pakistan, Oman, Saudi Arabia).
* Develop employer brand visibility in key markets to support hiring.
* Collaborate across teams to ensure seamless expansion including localization and cultural adaptation.
* Establish partnerships with local entities or agencies while adhering to regulations.

**Partnerships & Sponsorships**

* Identify and drive opportunities for long-term sponsorships (sports, music, gaming, etc.).
* Identify global PR opportunities to create impactful communication and thought leadership.
* Develop and execute a partnerships strategy to enhance brand reach and influence.
* Build and manage relationships with partners and negotiate aligned agreements.
* Deliver co-branded campaigns aligned to overall brand positioning.
* Secure high-ROI partnerships with strong brand visibility.
* Drive cross-partnership opportunities for key products through events, webinars, and conferences.

**Social Strategy and Channel Management**

* Develop and implement a comprehensive social media strategy aligned with brand and marketing goals.
* Oversee and optimize all social media channels for growth and engagement.
* Analyze insights to refine strategy continuously.
* Enhance brand reputation and stakeholder engagement via social media.
* Manage agency partners, scope, costs, and execution quality.
* Ensure consistent messaging, tone, and brand voice across all channels.

**ESG Brand Strategy and Communication**

* Provide strategic direction for ESG-related brand and communication campaigns.
* Drive bank-wide ESG communications and stakeholder collaboration.
* Leverage events, digital, PR, and research effectively.
* Track performance and report impact to EXCO regularly.

**Content Management**

* Lead a holistic content strategy aligned with brand and business objectives.
* Oversee creation and distribution across digital, print, and video channels.
* Optimize content performance using data and insights.
* Implement integrated content marketing across PR, paid media, website, social, and intranet (English and Arabic).
* Ensure consistency in tone, quality, and messaging.
* Drive channel optimization and content impact measurement.

**Corporate Communications**

* Lead PR strategy aligned with the bank’s priorities.
* Increase share of voice across key markets with relevant messaging.
* Work with leadership and agencies to ensure consistent messaging.
* Partner with EXCO on thought leadership and corporate storytelling.
* Lead crisis communications.
* Amplify messaging via paid and earned media.
* Identify speaking and media opportunities for leadership.
* Support participation in awards and industry conferences.
* Lead major bank-wide PR events and launches.

**Internal Communications**

* Ensure consistent messaging across all internal platforms (town halls, intranet, broadcasts).
* Develop and review corporate messaging for key initiatives.
* Lead internal culture communications.
* Support employee engagement messaging across functions.
* Manage internal communication platforms.

**Employer Brand & Engagement**

* Position the bank as an employer of choice.
* Drive D&I positioning initiatives.
* Identify and execute brand opportunities linked to employer branding.
* Partner with HR teams on employee engagement initiatives.

**Research and Insights**

* Drive insight-led brand and communications strategy.
* Collaborate with external partners (e.g., Brand Finance, YouGov).
* Leverage analytics tools (e.g., Sprinklr, SEO, MicroStrategy).

**Team Management**

* Recruit, develop, and lead the brand and communications team globally.
* Manage performance, priorities, and engagement.
* Support learning and development initiatives.

**Agency Management**

* Lead global agency management across creative, media, PR, social, SEO, and content.
* Ensure strong ROI and performance from agency partners.
* Conduct quarterly performance reviews.
* Oversee agency selection, onboarding, and evaluation.
* Ensure integrated campaigns across all channels.

**Budget Management**

* Plan and manage the brand and communications budget.
* Control spend and manage financial reporting.
* Negotiate with agencies alongside procurement.

**Operating Environment & Relationships**

* Highly competitive banking environment requiring strong brand visibility.
* Extensive cross-functional engagement across the organization.
* Regular interaction with senior leadership and external agencies.
* Requires identifying media opportunities and delivering impactful content.

**Problem Solving**

* Challenge the status quo to enhance brand awareness and perception.
* Solve complex, unstructured brand and communication challenges.
* Align messaging with organizational goals across all platforms.
* Manage agency and media-related challenges, including crisis situations.

**Decision-Making Authority Crises**

* Drive ROI on brand, communications, partnerships, and ESG investments.
* Approve creative content and media plans with leadership.
* Lead execution of brand and PR strategies.
* Manage stakeholder relationships across leadership teams.
* Oversee team productivity and vendor selection.

**Knowledge, Skills, and Experience**

* 18–20 years’ experience in marketing, brand, or communications (preferably banking).
* Experience leading global teams and managing integrated agencies.
* Strong understanding of modern marketing practices.
* Financial acumen in budgeting and forecasting.
* Strong relationship-building and communication skills.
* Highly organized and collaborative.

data.title: Head of Marketing
data.raw_snippet:
**About the Company**

The Marketing Head will lead the overall brand, marketing, and communications strategy for our development portfolio, from open house events and off-plan launches to handover. The role is responsible for driving demand, strengthening brand positioning, and ensuring every proje
data.jd_text:
**About the Company**

The Marketing Head will lead the overall brand, marketing, and communications strategy for our development portfolio, from open house events and off-plan launches to handover. The role is responsible for driving demand, strengthening brand positioning, and ensuring every project is presented with a compelling story across all channels. This is a strategic and hands‑on leadership role that combines planning with execution alongside the team.

**About the Role**

Key Responsibilities

* Develop and execute the end-to-end marketing strategy for all real estate projects from pre-launch to post-handover.
* Build and manage the monthly or annual marketing plan and budget, ensuring strong ROI on all campaigns.
* Lead brand positioning, messaging, and visual identity for both the corporate brand and individual projects.
* Drive integrated campaigns across digital, social media, performance marketing, CRM, outdoor, PR, and events.
* Oversee the creation of high-impact marketing assets: brochures, videos, 3D renders, project websites, sales kits, and showroom/experience center content.
* Work closely with Sales, Development, and Customer Experience teams to align marketing strategies with sales targets and product positioning.
* Manage media planning and buying, including partnerships with portals, influencers, agencies, and production houses.
* Use data and analytics to track campaign performance, lead quality, and customer behavior; recommend optimizations.
* Hands-on leadership of the marketing team: Supervise, monitor, and directly contribute to the execution of all campaigns (incl. launches, open house, etc.) and initiatives.
* Ensure all marketing activities comply with local regulations, project approvals, and brand guidelines.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or related field; Master’s degree is a plus.
* 8–12+ years of experience in marketing, with at least 3–5 years in a senior/lead role within real estate development or a related sector (property, hospitality, lifestyle).
* Proven track record in launching real estate projects and delivering measurable results in lead generation and brand growth.
* Strong understanding of digital marketing, performance campaigns, social media, and marketing automation/CRM.
* Experience managing agencies, creative production, and media buying.
* Excellent leadership, stakeholder management, and presentation skills.

**Required Skills**

* Strategic thinking with a hands-on execution mindset.
* Strong creative sense and storytelling ability.
* Data-driven decision making and budget management.
* Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines in a fast-paced environment.
* Manage a team of marketing professionals across digital, content, and events, fostering a collaborative, high‑performance culture.

**Preferred Skills**

Why Join Us

* Opportunity to grow with us, expanding real estate developer shaping landmark projects in Dubai and RAK.
* Direct impact on high-profile launches and brand evolution.
* Collaborative environment with clear growth path for proven performers.

**Pay range and compensation package**

AED 25,000 / Month

data.title: Chief Product & Technology Officer (CPTO)
data.raw_snippet: 1inch is the DeFi ecosystem building financial freedom for everyone. 1inch products help users and builders trade, hold and track digital assets - with the self-custody, comprehensive security and the intuitive user experience they need to unlock the potential of true crypto ownership. 1inch protoco
data.jd_text:
1inch is the DeFi ecosystem building financial freedom for everyone. 1inch products help users and builders trade, hold and track digital assets - with the self-custody, comprehensive security and the intuitive user experience they need to unlock the potential of true crypto ownership. 1inch protocols and APIs provide core infrastructure across the DeFi industry and beyond.
  
  
So if you’re someone who thinks big, moves fast and wants to make an impact right from day one, then get ready to join our industry-changing team.
  
  
*Location: We prioritise candidates who are based in Dubai then consider those working remotely in one of our European Hub Locations (UK, Spain or Germany).*
The Chief Product and Technology Officer leads the company’s product organization and shapes the overall product and technology portfolio. This role is responsible for defining product strategy, setting roadmaps, improving delivery, and ensuring a high level of product quality across the business.
  
  
The CPTO connects customer needs, business goals, product priorities, and technology direction into one clear operating model. The role ensures that the company not only decides what products to build, but also how to build them in a scalable, reliable, and efficient way.
  
  
This person needs strong product leadership and a solid understanding of technology and architecture. They must be able to guide major product and technical trade-offs, support long-term platform thinking, and improve how Product, Design, Engineering, and other teams work together. The CPTO is accountable for turning strategy into focused execution and for building products that deliver sustainable value to customers and the business.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Define and evolve the company’s product strategy in line with business goals, customer needs, and market opportunities
* Shape the overall product portfolio and make clear investment and prioritization decisions across products and capabilities
* Ensure product plans balance growth opportunities, customer value, operational needs, and long-term sustainability
* Translate company strategy into clear product direction and strategic priorities
* Own product roadmap governance across the organization
* Ensure roadmaps are clear, realistic, and aligned with available resources and technical constraints
* Drive prioritization decisions across short-term business goals and longer-term platform or architecture investments
* Establish transparent decision-making processes that improve focus and alignment across teams
* Be accountable for delivery effectiveness, execution discipline, and predictable outcomes across the product organization
* Ensure critical initiatives are executed with clear accountability, strong follow-through, and timely escalation when needed
* Be accountable for the quality of the company’s products across user experience, reliability, performance, scalability, and maintainability
* Provide strong leadership on technology direction and ensure architecture choices support product strategy and delivery goals
* Guide major trade-offs involving technical debt, platform investment, complexity, speed, and long-term product health
* Promote high standards for product development, release quality, and continuous improvement

**Job Requirements**

* 12+ years of experience in product management, technology, engineering, or related leadership roles, including senior executive responsibility
* Proven experience leading product strategy, portfolio management, and roadmap decisions in a technology-driven business
* Strong track record of improving delivery effectiveness and leading cross-functional execution across Product, Design, and Engineering
* Strong understanding of software development, system architecture, platform strategy, and technical trade-offs
* Experience balancing customer value, business priorities, and technical constraints in complex product environments
* Proven experience building and leading high-performing teams and senior leaders
* Demonstrated ability to improve product quality, operating models, and organizational clarity at scale
* Strong strategic thinking combined with the ability to drive operational execution and accountability
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills at executive and team level
* Strong ownership mindset, sound judgment, and high standards for quality and performance

**Nice-to-Haves**

* Experience in fintech, crypto, Web3, or other highly technical digital product environments
* Experience leading both product and technology organizations under a unified executive model
* Experience with platform modernization, architecture transformation, or scaling complex product ecosystems
* Strong understanding of data-informed product management and performance measurement
* Experience working in fast-growing, globally distributed organizations

**Why work for us?**

* Join a young, creative team in a fast-paced and supportive environment
* We’re open to new ideas — if you’ve got a vision, pitch it and make it happen
* Enjoy competitive pay that matches your skills and experience
* Be part of a company that’s shaping the future of DeFi
* Take time when you need it — we offer unlimited vacation days
* Get fully compensated for your work gear — we’ll set you up for success

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

data.title: Chief Technology Officer
data.raw_snippet:
**About Atos Group**
Atos Group is a global leader in digital transformation with c. 67,000 employees and annual revenue of c. €10 billion, operating in 61 countries under two brands — Atos for services and Eviden for products. European number one in cybersecurity, cloud and high performance computi
data.jd_text:
**About Atos Group**
Atos Group is a global leader in digital transformation with c. 67,000 employees and annual revenue of c. €10 billion, operating in 61 countries under two brands — Atos for services and Eviden for products. European number one in cybersecurity, cloud and high performance computing, Atos Group is committed to a secure and decarbonized future and provides tailored AI-powered, end-to-end solutions for all industries. Atos Group is the brand under which Atos SE (Societas Europaea) operates. Atos SE is listed on Euronext Paris.
  
  
The purpose of Atos Group is to help design the future of the information space. Its expertise and services support the development of knowledge, education and research in a multicultural approach and contribute to the development of scientific and technological excellence. Across the world, the Group enables its customers and employees, and members of societies at large to live, work and develop sustainably, in a safe and secure information space.
  
  
**Role Purpose**
The CTO for the Middle East & Turkey region is responsible for leading the regional technology strategy and owning the
**end-to-end presales and solutioning function**
for all Atos portfolios. The role acts as the primary technology advisor to customers and internal teams, ensuring that all solutions are innovative, competitive, and fully aligned with business growth objectives.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**
**Technology Strategy & Innovation**

* Define and execute the technology vision for the MET region aligned with global CTO strategy.
* Drive adoption of Cloud, Data, AI/ML, Cybersecurity, and Digital Platforms.
* Translate regional market trends into relevant offerings and use cases.

**Presales**

* Lead the regional presales and solution architecture function across all business lines.
* Own solution development for major bids, RFPs, and digital transformation programs.
* Ensure quality, feasibility, and competitiveness of all technical proposals.
* Strengthen partnerships (Azure, AWS, Google, OEMs) to support winning solutions.

**Client Engagement**

* Serve as a trusted technology advisor to CIO/CTO-level stakeholders.
* Support key accounts with solution roadmaps, architecture planning, and technology advisory.
* Represent Atos in CXO engagements, technology councils, and industry forums.

**Technical Governance & Delivery Assurance**

* Provide architecture governance and technical oversight for large regional programs.
* Establish and enforce technology standards, patterns, and best practices.
* Act as final escalation point for critical solution or design issues.

**People & Capability Development**

* Lead and develop a high-performing team of architects and presales specialists.
* Build strong technical capability in Cloud, Data, Cyber, AI/ML, and industry domains.
* Strengthen certification frameworks and engineering excellence in the region.

**Required Experience**

* 15+ years in senior technology leadership roles (CTO / Chief Architect / Technical Director).
* Deep expertise in Cloud, Data, Cybersecurity, AI/ML, and modern engineering practices.
* Strong experience running presales and large-scale solution architecture functions.
* Proven engagement with senior stakeholders across Public Sector, BFSI, Energy, and Telecom.
* Strong commercial acumen and ability to influence at C-level.

**Choose your future. Choose Atos.**

  (check out our success stories).
* Connecting with
  **C-level executives**
  and leading e-commerce businesses.
* Working in the world's most progressive industry at a firm that prioritizes
  **personal development.**
* Enjoying a
  **great atmosphere**
  with fun team outings.
* Having the opportunity for
  **substantial compensation, including lucrative bonuses.**
* As
  **Chief Marketing Officer | CMO**
  , you will be the driving force behind Ecomma’s growth engine. Your mission is simple: build and lead a lean, high-performance marketing machine that significantly increases the number of qualified leads entering our pipeline across the UAE and US markets.

This is a highly commercial and performance-focused role. You will take ownership of our paid media, email marketing, social media, SEO, events, and broader demand generation strategy, with the clear goal of doubling qualified lead volume over time. You will work closely with our CCO, COO and leadership team to ensure marketing directly supports sales growth and revenue outcomes.

We are looking for a CMO with a strong online marketing and paid media background. Someone who understands how to win in high-ticket markets, how to build a team, how to move fast, and how to use AI tools and workflows to create a lean and highly effective marketing department.

Are you the next CMO ready to scale Ecomma to the next level?

What you will do

* **Own Lead Generation Strategy:**
  Take full ownership of the marketing strategy across the UAE and US markets, with the primary goal of doubling the amount of qualified leads entering our pipeline.
* **Drive Paid Media Performance:**
  Lead and optimize performance across Meta Ads, Google Ads, and other relevant paid acquisition channels. You know how to allocate budget, test fast, improve CAC, and scale what works.
* **Build a High-Performance Marketing Team:**
  Lead the setup and management of a lean but effective team, including performance marketers, a social media manager, a creative/editor, and additional junior or intern support where needed.
* **Align Closely with Sales:**
  Work side by side with the CCO and commercial team to improve lead quality, conversion rates, campaign messaging, market feedback loops, and overall pipeline performance.
* **Own Email Marketing & Lifecycle:**
  Build and improve email marketing across lead nurturing, follow-up, reactivation, and broader lifecycle campaigns to increase conversion from lead to call to deal.
* **Own Social Media Growth:**
  Build a stronger social media presence that supports authority, trust, brand awareness, and inbound demand. Translate content into commercial results.
* **Launch and Scale SEO:**
  Establish SEO as an owned growth channel. Build the strategy, priorities, content direction, and execution process to improve long-term inbound lead generation.
* **Lead Events and Launches:**
  Own the planning and execution of events, launch moments, and other brand-building initiatives that help generate attention, authority, and qualified commercial opportunities.
* **Implement AI-First Workflows:**
  Bring an AI-first mindset to the marketing department by using AI tools, automations, and systems to improve speed, output, testing, reporting, and team efficiency.
* **Track Performance Relentlessly:**
  Set clear KPIs and reporting structures across all channels. You understand that marketing exists to generate measurable business outcomes, not vanity metrics.
* **Improve Messaging and Positioning:**
  Continuously refine our offers, campaigns, landing pages, creative direction, and growth messaging to improve qualified lead volume and performance across the funnel.
* **Create a Scalable Growth Engine:**
  Build a marketing function that is structured, repeatable, lean, and able to scale alongside the company as we continue to grow.

We operate using Google Workspace, Slack, and Notion. Thus, familiarity and hands-on experience with these platforms are important for this role. The candidate should be fluent in English, with excellent interpersonal, verbal, and written communication skills. A strong commercial instinct, analytical thinking, fast execution, and high ownership are essential.

Tools in use may include Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, GA4, Google Search Console, Mailchimp and email tools, reporting dashboards, landing page tools, and AI platforms that improve output, speed, and efficiency.

What you bring to the table:

* 5+ years of experience in growth marketing, performance marketing, or digital marketing leadership, ideally in a high-growth environment.
* Proven experience scaling qualified leads through channels such as Meta Ads, Google Ads, email marketing, SEO, and content/social.
* A strong background in paid media and online demand generation, with clear evidence that you know how to turn spend into pipeline.
* Experience leading and managing marketing teams, including performance marketers, creatives, and cross-functional contributors.
* A highly commercial mindset. You understand how marketing should directly support revenue, sales performance, and business growth.
* Experience working in high-ticket, lead generation, investor, acquisition, ecommerce, or similar performance-driven environments is a strong plus.
* Strong analytical skills and confidence with reporting, attribution, testing, and decision-making based on data.
* An AI-first mindset. You actively use AI tools, workflows, and automations to improve marketing output, team efficiency, and speed of execution.
* Excellent organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple channels, campaigns, and priorities at the same time.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with sales, leadership, and creative teams.
* A hands-on mentality. You are strategic, but you are also willing to execute, test, fix, and improve directly when needed.
* High standards, strong ownership, and the ability to build a lean and mean team that performs.
* Fluent in English with strong verbal and written communication skills.
* High ethical standards and a commitment to conducting business with integrity.

The position will be filled immediately for the right candidate.

Working at Ecomma is more than just a job. If you believe in seizing the present to enhance your future, you're in the right place. Combining hard work with the right atmosphere is our golden formula. We don't operate with a 9-5 mindset, allowing you to manage your own working hours. We've found this approach yields the best results. Ecomma: a private equity firm you can count on.

Please note: Proficiency in English is required.

Does this opportunity excite you? Are you eager to dive in and unleash your creative finance mind? If you want to be a part of the Ecomma team, send your motivation letter and CV addressed to the respective job title application.

*If this role isn't a fit for you but you know someone it might suit, please share it with them - we'd greatly appreciate it!*

data.title: Chief Technology Officer
data.raw_snippet:
**Company Overview**

Our client is a globally regulated financial services and fintech group with a strong presence across the UAE, Europe, Asia, and Australia. The organization operates across multi-asset trading, digital assets, and financial technology infrastructure, providing institutional and
data.jd_text:
**Company Overview**

Our client is a globally regulated financial services and fintech group with a strong presence across the UAE, Europe, Asia, and Australia. The organization operates across multi-asset trading, digital assets, and financial technology infrastructure, providing institutional and retail clients with access to advanced trading platforms, liquidity solutions, and financial services.

With a growing global footprint and continued investment in technology, the group is focused on strengthening its trading infrastructure, expanding its product offering, and enhancing platform scalability, reliability, and performance across multiple regulated markets.

**Role Overview**

The Chief Technology Officer will lead the group’s global technology function, overseeing engineering, architecture, infrastructure, and security across all trading and financial platforms.

This role is responsible for ensuring the stability, scalability, and performance of high-volume trading systems while driving continuous improvement and modernization of the technology landscape. The CTO will work closely with executive leadership, product, trading, and compliance teams to align technology delivery with business objectives and regulatory requirements.

**Role Responsibilities**

* Define and execute the overall technology strategy aligned with the group’s global growth and product roadmap
* Lead and scale engineering teams across development, infrastructure, DevOps, and platform architecture
* Oversee the design, performance, and reliability of trading platforms, including pricing, execution, risk, and back-office systems
* Ensure high availability, low latency, and resilience of systems supporting real-time trading operations
* Drive modernization initiatives across cloud infrastructure, automation, and system architecture
* Establish and enforce engineering standards, governance frameworks, and best practices across global teams
* Work closely with product, trading, compliance, and operations teams to support platform enhancements and new product launches
* Ensure compliance with regulatory, cybersecurity, and data protection requirements across multiple jurisdictions
* Manage technology budgets, vendor relationships, and third-party service providers
* Lead incident management, disaster recovery, and business continuity planning across all systems
* Provide strategic input to executive leadership on technology investments, risks, and opportunities

**Role Requirements**

* 15+ years of experience in technology leadership roles within financial services, fintech, or trading environments
* Proven experience leading engineering teams and delivering large-scale, high-performance technology platforms
* Strong background in trading systems, brokerage platforms (MT4/MT5), or financial market infrastructure
* Experience with low-latency systems, real-time data processing, and high-availability architectures
* Solid understanding of risk systems, liquidity integration, and trading platform ecosystems
* Experience with cloud platforms, DevOps practices, and modern software development methodologies
* Strong knowledge of regulatory and security requirements in financial services environments
* Demonstrated ability to lead global teams across multiple regions and functions
* Strong stakeholder management skills with experience working closely with executive leadership

data.title: Chief Information Security Officer
data.raw_snippet:
**Company Overview**

Our client is a long-established, globally regulated financial services group with operations across the UAE, Europe, Asia, and beyond. The organization operates across multi-asset brokerage (FX, CFDs, commodities, and equities), payments, and digital asset platforms, serving a
data.jd_text:
**Company Overview**

Our client is a long-established, globally regulated financial services group with operations across the UAE, Europe, Asia, and beyond. The organization operates across multi-asset brokerage (FX, CFDs, commodities, and equities), payments, and digital asset platforms, serving a large international client base within highly regulated environments.

As the group continues to scale its technology, trading infrastructure, and digital asset offerings, cybersecurity and information security governance have become a critical priority at the executive level.

**Role Overview**

The Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) will lead the group’s global cybersecurity strategy, ensuring the protection of trading platforms, payment infrastructure, client data, and digital assets across multiple jurisdictions. This is a highly strategic and hands-on leadership role, requiring deep experience in financial services, brokerage, or crypto environments, with the ability to operate in real-time, high-risk, and regulated ecosystems.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Define and execute the group-wide information security and cybersecurity strategy aligned with business growth and regulatory requirements
* Establish and oversee security governance frameworks, policies, and controls across all entities and jurisdictions
* Lead threat detection, incident response, and cyber risk management, particularly across trading systems and digital platforms
* Ensure security of trading infrastructure, including low-latency systems, APIs, and client-facing platforms
* Oversee cloud security, network security, and application security across distributed environments
* Collaborate closely with Technology, Product, Compliance, Risk, and Operations teams to embed security into all systems and processes
* Manage security operations (SOC), penetration testing, vulnerability management, and red teaming activities
* Ensure compliance with global regulatory frameworks (e.g., DFSA, FCA, ASIC, MiCA, GDPR) and cybersecurity standards (ISO 27001, NIST, etc.)
* Lead third-party/vendor risk assessments, particularly for liquidity providers, PSPs, and technology partners
* Provide regular executive-level reporting to senior leadership and the board on cybersecurity posture, risks, and incidents
* Build and lead a high-performing global security team

**Requirements**

* Proven experience as a CISO, Head of Information Security, or equivalent leadership role
* Strong background within financial services, brokerage (FX/CFDs), fintech, payments, or digital assets/crypto
* Deep understanding of trading platforms, financial systems, and real-time infrastructure risks
* Experience operating in multi-jurisdictional, regulated environments
* Strong knowledge of cybersecurity frameworks (ISO 27001, NIST, CIS, etc.)
* Hands-on experience with cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP) and modern security architectures
* Demonstrated experience managing security incidents, breaches, and crisis response
* Ability to operate at both strategic and technical levels
* Strong stakeholder management skills, with experience engaging C-level executives and regulators
* Relevant certifications preferred (CISSP, CISM, CISA, or similar)

data.title: Chief Executive Officer
data.raw_snippet:
Our client is a well-established, diversified group and market leader in the automotive space in Saudi Arabia. The organization plays a critical role in its sector and is recognized for operational scale, brand strength, and financial depth.

As part of its next phase of strategic growth and operati
data.jd_text:
Our client is a well-established, diversified group and market leader in the automotive space in Saudi Arabia. The organization plays a critical role in its sector and is recognized for operational scale, brand strength, and financial depth.

As part of its next phase of strategic growth and operational transformation, the group is seeking to appoint a
**Chief Executive Officer**
to join the executive leadership team. This role will partner directly with the Board of Directors to drive financial strategy, optimize capital structure, enhance governance, and support sustainable expansion across multiple business divisions.

This opportunity is suited to a commercially driven finance leader with experience in large-scale, multi-entity operations and strong exposure to working capital-intensive environments.

**Chief Executive Officer (CEO) – Automotive Dealership Group (KSA)**

**Overview**

A leading automotive dealership group in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia is seeking a dynamic and commercially driven
**Chief Executive Officer (CEO)**
to lead the organization through its next phase of growth, operational excellence, and digital transformation.

The CEO will be responsible for driving profitability, strengthening OEM partnerships, expanding market share, and positioning the business as a leading mobility solutions provider in line with Saudi Arabia’s Vision 2030.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Strategic Leadership**

* Define and execute the company’s long-term strategy across vehicle sales, aftersales, and mobility services
* Align business strategy with Vision 2030, including localization, digitization, and sustainability initiatives
* Identify new revenue streams (EVs, fleet solutions, leasing, mobility platforms, etc.)

**Commercial & Financial Performance**

* Deliver top-line growth and optimize EBITDA across all business units
* Drive vehicle sales (retail, fleet, government) while maximizing aftersales profitability
* Ensure strong working capital management, inventory optimization, and cost discipline
* Oversee budgeting, forecasting, and financial performance tracking

**OEM & Partner Management**

* Maintain and strengthen relationships with global automotive OEMs
* Negotiate favorable commercial terms, distribution rights, and performance incentives
* Ensure compliance with OEM standards across showrooms, service centers, and brand representation

**Operational Excellence**

* Optimize dealership operations across sales, service, parts, and logistics
* Drive performance improvement initiatives across the branch network
* Enhance customer experience and retention through best-in-class service delivery

**Digital Transformation & Innovation**

* Lead digitalization across sales channels, CRM, and aftersales platforms
* Implement data-driven decision-making and performance dashboards
* Explore e-commerce, online car sales, and integrated mobility ecosystems

**People & Culture**

* Build and lead a high-performing executive team
* Drive a performance-oriented culture with strong governance and accountability
* Develop Saudi national talent in line with Saudization requirements

**Governance & Stakeholder Management**

* Report directly to the Board of Directors and shareholders
* Ensure strong corporate governance, compliance, and risk management frameworks
* Represent the company with regulators, government entities, and key stakeholders

**Candidate Profile**

**Experience**

* 15–20+ years of experience in automotive, mobility, or related sectors
* Proven CEO / Managing Director / GM experience within a large dealership group or automotive distributor
* Strong track record of delivering growth and profitability in complex, multi-branch operations
* Experience working with international OEMs is essential
* Prior experience in the GCC / Saudi Arabia is highly preferred
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, or related field
* MBA or equivalent postgraduate qualification preferred

**Skills & Competencies**

* Strong commercial acumen with deep understanding of dealership economics (sales, aftersales, parts)
* Strategic thinker with hands-on operational leadership capability
* Expertise in turnaround, scaling, or transformation environments
* Strong financial literacy and performance management skills
* Excellent stakeholder management and negotiation skills
* Visionary yet execution-focused
* High resilience and adaptability in a fast-evolving market
* Strong people leadership and cultural intelligence
* Entrepreneurial mindset with a focus on innovation

Abu Dhabi or Dubai

Job Description

**ROLE OVERVIEW**

The Chief AI Officer leads and oversees the strategy and execution of the organisation's Digital, Data and AI transformation initiatives, ensuring alignment with the government
data.jd_text:
**Chief AI Officer [Partner/Associate Partner AI Transformation]**
Abu Dhabi or Dubai

Job Description

**ROLE OVERVIEW**

The Chief AI Officer leads and oversees the strategy and execution of the organisation's Digital, Data and AI transformation initiatives, ensuring alignment with the government entity's broader digital objectives and vision. The AI Officer is the key leader and highest authority for Digital, Data and AI decision-making within the entity, providing comprehensive strategic direction to drive digital innovation and operational efficiency.

**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES**

**1. Digital Strategy and Vision**

* Set the entity's digital agenda, aligning it with the government's digital vision and emerging technologies and trends
* Collaborate and coordinate closely with central government digital teams
* Lead the development and refinement of the entity's AI and data strategies
* Oversee enterprise architecture, ensuring support for digital, data, and AI initiatives
* Manage budgeting and resource allocation for digital programmes

**2. Digital Transformation Execution**

* Oversee the entity's digital initiatives, including flagship projects and the digitalisation of core services
* Coordinate closely with internal IT teams on infrastructure and cloud initiatives
* Lead the deployment of innovative digital solutions, ensuring seamless end-to-end user experiences
* Monitor progress, manage risks, and drive continuous improvement across transformation programmes

**3. AI and Data Enablement**

* Lead the implementation of AI and data strategies and initiatives
* Oversee the prioritisation and delivery of AI and analytics use cases, including the development and deployment of AI agents and machine learning models
* Ensure robust data governance frameworks and AI ethics policies are in place|

**4. Governance and Compliance**

* Oversee digital governance frameworks and ensure compliance with data privacy, cybersecurity, and AI ethics regulations
* Monitor adherence to policies, managing risks and maintaining accountability across digital efforts
* Act as the highest review and escalation point for all Digital, Data and AI activities within the entity

**5. Innovation and Capability Building**

* Build and strengthen internal capabilities in digital, AI, and data, fostering a culture of innovation and service excellence
* Promote digital literacy and upskill employees across the organisation

**6. Performance and Value Realisation**

* Define and track performance metrics to ensure strategic alignment and outcome achievement
* Drive and monitor the realisation of value from digital investments

**7. Stakeholder Engagement**

* Engage with internal and external stakeholders to define and drive the delivery of the Data, AI and Digital agenda
* Proactively drive alignment, integration and collaboration across key vendors and partners

**QUALIFICATIONS & SKILLS**

**Experience**

* AP or Partner level with an MBB or equivalent.
* 12+ years in digital, AI, and data programme leadership, with a proven track record in large-scale transformation, ideally in government or complex environments
* Extensive experience in setting and executing digital, data and AI strategies

**Technical Knowledge**

* Strong foundations in digital technologies, AI, machine learning, data management and data-driven decision making
* Proficiency in budgeting, financial planning, and resource optimisation

**Leadership & Soft Skills**

* Demonstrated leadership, organisational, and senior-level management experience
* Advanced skills in communication, stakeholder engagement, and change management
* Strong strategic thinking, analytical, and problem-solving skills
* Arabic speaking (nice to have)

**Education**

* Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related field
* Master's degree or MBA with a focus on relevant domains is preferred
* Relevant Data, AI and Digital certifications are preferred

Exclusively managed by oryxsearch.

data.raw_snippet:
**About Medetone**
Medetone is a dynamic and fast-growing online pharmacy that prioritises customer care and innovation in healthcare delivery. We are committed to providing customers a seamless, safe, and efficient service. We offer prescription medications, over-the-counter products, and personali
data.jd_text:
**About Medetone**
Medetone is a dynamic and fast-growing online pharmacy that prioritises customer care and innovation in healthcare delivery. We are committed to providing customers a seamless, safe, and efficient service. We offer prescription medications, over-the-counter products, and personalised healthcare services.
  
  
**Base salary**
Up to 450,000 AED per year
  
  
**Role Overview**
We're seeking an experienced and visionary Chief Marketing Officer to join our senior leadership team on-site in Dubai. Reporting directly to the CEO, the CMO will be a strategic partner.
  
  
You will drive measurable business growth through OOH marketing, PR campaigns, and performance marketing, aligning with our rapid expansion across the UK, Europe and Dubai. You will play a critical role in leveraging AI in marketing and growth strategies, increasing market share, building brand awareness, and leading community engagement initiatives.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Growth Strategy & Leadership: Shape and implement a comprehensive growth strategy aligned with business objectives, driving customer acquisition, revenue growth, and market expansion
* Integrated Campaign Management: Lead the execution of multi-channel campaigns across PR, OOH, and digital platforms, ensuring consistent messaging and measurable performance
* Brand & PR Leadership: Develop and execute brand strategy, managing public relations and media outreach to strengthen brand positioning and visibility
* Community & Market Expansion: Drive initiatives that build and engage communities through partnerships, sponsorships, and strategic activations
* Performance Marketing & Analytics: Oversee performance marketing initiatives, ensuring campaigns are data-driven and AI optimised
* Cross-functional Leadership: Collaborate with internal teams across product, operations, and leadership to align growth initiatives with broader business goals

**Requirements**
**Must Have**

* Proven experience in public relations, branding, and out-of-home (OOH) campaigns
* Strong background in performance marketing and advertising
* Demonstrated success in launching campaigns that increased market share for the company
* Experience building and engaging communities through partnerships and activations
* Minimum 10+ years of senior marketing or growth leadership experience
* Experience leveraging AI in marketing and growth strategies

**Technical Skills**

* Experience across digital marketing platforms and advertising channels
* Strong understanding of creative tools and marketing technologies
* Expertise in brand development and campaign execution

**Leadership & Soft Skills**

* Proven ability to lead cross-functional teams
* Strong management, communication, and decision-making skills
* Highly driven, confident, and adaptable in fast-paced environments

**Nice to Have**

* Background in healthcare, wellness, or e-commerce industries

**Benefits**
**Why Work With Us?**
At Medetone, we are committed to creating a dynamic, innovative workplace where every team member has the opportunity to make a real impact. You'll be joining a rapidly growing company and working alongside a hardworking and talented team that's at the forefront of healthcare innovation, with the chance to contribute to exciting projects that are transforming patient care.
  
  
**What We Offer**

* Access to cutting-edge technology and tools to support your work
* Competitive Salary
* A Collaborative and Inclusive Team Culture
* Pension scheme
* Employee discounts on our healthcare products
* Opportunities for personal and professional development within a forward-thinking company

This is a unique opportunity for a strategic and results-oriented marketing professional to make a significant impact in a fast-growing healthcare organisation. If you're ready to lead and drive excellence, we'd love to hear from you!

data.title: Division CEO (F&B)
data.raw_snippet:
**About Us**
French Spirit Coffee Shop is a premium F&B company bringing the elegance of French café culture to international markets. We operate Ladurée franchises in Arabia, China, Egypt, and Morocco, and PAUL in Spain, offering luxury pastries, artisanal breads, and authentic French dining experi
data.jd_text:
**About Us**
French Spirit Coffee Shop is a premium F&B company bringing the elegance of French café culture to international markets. We operate Ladurée franchises in Arabia, China, Egypt, and Morocco, and PAUL in Spain, offering luxury pastries, artisanal breads, and authentic French dining experiences. As we continue to expand our portfolio with more brands and locations, we are seeking a visionary Division CEO to lead our international operations and drive sustainable growth.
  
  
**Role Overview**
The Division CEO will provide overall leadership, guidance, and strategic direction for French Spirit Coffee Shop LLC. Reporting to the Group CEO, you will drive business growth, operational excellence, and organizational performance across all markets. You will oversee long and short-term strategies, manage resources, build and lead the executive team, and ensure alignment with the Board of Directors’ objectives. This role requires strategic vision, operational expertise, and strong leadership capabilities, with some international travel expected.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**
**Strategy & Business Growth**

* Develop and execute high-quality business strategies aligned with short- and long-term objectives.
* Make informed investment and expansion decisions to drive growth and profitability.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with key partners, stakeholders, and shareholders.
* Analyze challenges and implement solutions to ensure sustained business growth.

**Operations & Performance Management**

* Oversee all operations and business activities to ensure alignment with strategy and mission.
* Develop and implement operational policies, sales strategies, and systems to maximize revenue and market share.
* Ensure the company meets its annual sales and performance targets.

**Finance & Resource Management**

* Oversee fiscal activities including budgeting, reporting, auditing, and resource allocation.
* Review financial and non-financial reports, recommend improvements, and manage resources within budget guidelines.

**Human Resources & Leadership**

* Lead, motivate, and develop a high-performing managerial and operational team.
* Ensure compliance with legal guidelines, in-house policies, and ethical standards.
* Promote a positive work environment, employee engagement, and talent development.

**Project & Brand Management**

* Plan, manage, and monitor projects, ensuring quality, timely delivery, and risk mitigation.
* Maintain brand standards across all functions, ensuring consistent customer experiences.
* Monitor food safety compliance, cost control, and operational efficiency across all stores and labs.

**Qualifications & Experience**

* Proven experience of atleast 10 years as a senior executive managing multiple international brands and markets, preferably in F&B or hospitality.
* Demonstrated success in strategic leadership, business growth and expansion, and brand management across geographies.
* Strong financial acumen with experience managing P&L, budgeting, forecasting, and resource allocation.
* Expertise in operational excellence, project and risk management, and multi-country compliance.
* Excellent leadership and communication skills, with the ability to inspire and motivate high-performing cross-cultural teams.
* Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Hospitality Management, or a related field; MBA or equivalent preferred.
* Additional certifications in leadership, project management, or international business are a plus.
* Willingness to travel internationally as required.

**Why Join Us?**
Lead a dynamic, growing F&B company operating globally recognized brands. Shape the future of the company, expand our international footprint, and deliver authentic experiences to new markets worldwide.

data.jd_text:
**Role:**
Product CTO – Crypto Exchange

**Location:**
Dubai

Our client is launching a next-generation
**Centralized Crypto Exchange (CEX)**
and looking for a hands-on
**Product CTO**
to architect and build the entire trading infrastructure from scratch.

This is a founding-level role with full ownership of the exchange’s technical backbone.

**🛠 What You’ll Own**

* High-performance order matching engine
* Real-time, low-latency trading systems (WebSockets)
* Order book, clearing & settlement architecture
* Custody integrations (Fireblocks, Copper, BitGo)
* Market surveillance tools (Solidus Labs, Chainalysis)
* Technical sections of exchange license applications (Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority, Monetary Authority of Singapore, Financial Conduct Authority)

✅ Must-Have

* 5+ years building trading systems (CEX/DEX/traditional)
* Experience with high-performance matching engines
* Strong understanding of custody & wallet infrastructure
* Real-time, low-latency systems expertise
* Exposure to crypto regulatory frameworks (VARA/MAS/FCA)

⭐ Nice-to-Have

* Built exchange from 0 → 1
* Managed $100M+ daily trading volume
* Smart order routing/liquidity aggregation
* Market making or algorithmic trading knowledge

If you’ve built exchange infrastructure before and want to lead one end-to-end, let’s talk. Apply directly to this job or send your CV to Jinal@fintop.co.uk

data.title: Chief Executive Officer (MEP)
data.raw_snippet:
**Chief Executive Officer (CEO) – MEP Company | Dubai**

data.jd_text:
**Chief Executive Officer (CEO) – MEP Company | Dubai**

**Talents Tide is looking for its client in Dubai**
for a highly experienced and strategic CEO to lead a well-established MEP organization.

* Provide strategic leadership and drive overall business growth, profitability, and market expansion within Dubai and the UAE.
* Oversee full business operations including projects, commercial, finance, and business development functions.
* Lead the delivery of large-scale MEP projects, ensuring quality, compliance, and timely execution.
* Develop and execute business strategies to secure high-value projects and strengthen market position.
* Manage full P&L responsibility, financial planning, and cost optimization.
* Build strong relationships with key stakeholders, developers, consultants, and government entities.
* Drive operational excellence, governance, and organizational transformation.
* Lead and develop senior leadership teams to ensure long-term success.

**Candidate Requirements**

* 15+ years of experience in MEP
* Proven experience managing an MEP company at an executive level (not limited to operations)
* Strong experience within the Dubai/UAE market
* Demonstrated success in business growth and leadership
* Due to the volume of applications only shortlisted candidates will be contacted

data.title: Senior Specialist - Dubai Licensing CEO's Office
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose**

Advance Licensing Agency strategy and execution by coordinating correspondence, committees, programs, contracts, and resilience; delivering data-driven reports and value management controls; and aligning plans and budgets with the Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) Corporate Plan.
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose**

Advance Licensing Agency strategy and execution by coordinating correspondence, committees, programs, contracts, and resilience; delivering data-driven reports and value management controls; and aligning plans and budgets with the Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) Corporate Plan. Supervise the preparation and follow-up of the organization's developmental and executive plans. Supervise the formation of resilience groups and teams and monitor the implementation of the comprehensive organizational resilience map.

**Roles and Responsibilities**

**Strategy**

• Support the preparation and follow-up of developmental and executive plans, including analysis of the current state, opportunities, challenges, and risks, and consolidation of reports for leadership.

• Provide analytical and advisory support to strategic planning frameworks aligned with the RTA Corporate Plan, including participation in priority settings and annual CAPEX/OPEX planning.

• Contribute and supervise the agency's strategic roadmap, recommend milestones and performance checkpoints and coordinate alignment with long-term objectives.

• Advice and support with data, Artificial Intelligence (AI), and Proof of Concept (PoC) use cases to support strategic initiatives; ensure adherence to institutional documents

• Support the structuring and mobilization of agile cross-functional teams (tribes/squads) and contribute to the setup and sustainment of Objectives and Key Results (OKRs).

• Ensure the implementation of the agency’s Agility Transformation Roadmap by tracking adoption of adaptive operating models across the agency.

**Operations**

• Review outgoing and incoming correspondence for the CEO, maintain official records, and follow up on the closure of recommendations.

• Review strategic plans and project reports to ensure quality, completeness, and accuracy.

• Supervise and advice on implementation of directives and recommendations from the Director General, Board of Directors, and CEO with concerned units, ensuring required reviews and opinions.

• Monitor contractual plans, contract status, and budget disbursement plans, and submit periodic project and budget reports to leadership.

• Support and monitor the implementation of the agency’s Agility Transformation Roadmap by tracking adoption of adaptive operating models across the agency.

• Follow up on the formation of resilience groups and teams and track progress against the organizational resilience implementation map.

• Review and validate contractual data across all stages, including change orders, by analyzing root causes, justifications, and preparing recommendations.

• Advise partnerships, service providers, operators, memberships, agreements, and performance level agreements and follow up on compliance actions.

• Advise the committees related to Project /Contractof committees/external teams and internal committees formed by the CEO; plan agendas, action registers, and submit periodic report

• Provide input to support the communication plan, internal/external visits (including field visits and official duties), and organizational unit for readiness for senior leadership visits.

• Monitor programs and projects, assess risks and challenges, track performance, and submit periodic progress and completion of reports.

• Oversee the delivery status of digital transformation initiatives and assure periodic performance reporting to the CEO

**Product / Process Improvement**

• Contribute to the enhancement of governance templates, data quality, and change control documentation for contracts and projects to improve decision lead times, traceability, and benefits realization.

• Monitor and report on the implementation status of the agency’s digital transformation agenda and agency roadmap, ensuring initiatives are progressing in line with approved plans.

• Review and validate program and project data across all stages, including project transfer requests and change orders, and prepare analytical recommendations and reports.

• Support the application of value management principles during project phases by tracking benefits, validating asset lists, and disseminating lessons learned and leading practices.

• Participate with functional units in the assessment of consultancy and contractor proposals to safeguard agency interests and outcomes.

• Advise with departments to ensure strategic alignment and performance accountability and recommend training needs to build capacity for strategy implementation

**Physical Working Conditions**

• Office-based role with periodic on-site and field presence to support internal and external visits, readiness checks, and leadership-related activities.

**Job Qualifications & Requirements**

* Bachelor’s degree/Master’s degree in Engineering or Business Administration
* 9-11 years of experience in strategy execution, program/contract governance, committee coordination; exposure to digital/AI use cases
* Certifications such as Agile/Scrum or SAFe (for tribes/squads), Lean/Six Sigma, ISO 9001 internal auditor

data.title: Chief Specialist - Technical Support  - Executive Affairs
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose**

Drive expert-level project governance and technical assurance across enterprise initiatives. Review

and advise on cross-sector project reports, audits, and portfolio policies. Standardize project management practices and tools, develop capabilities, and deliver decision-ready mater
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose**

Drive expert-level project governance and technical assurance across enterprise initiatives. Review

and advise on cross-sector project reports, audits, and portfolio policies. Standardize project management practices and tools, develop capabilities, and deliver decision-ready materials for

leadership and committees.

**Roles and Responsibilities:**

**Strategy**

* Monitor strategic plan execution and performance indicators, analyze outputs, and submit reports to leadership.
* Identify focus areas and strategic challenges, track progress with concerned departments, and submit periodic reports.
* Recommend actions aligned with government directions, ensure executive plans are prepared with concerned departments and monitor their execution.
* Follow up performance of main committees chaired by leadership with concerned departments.
* Supervise important committees, review outputs, report performance, and recommend corrective actions on deviations.
* Coordinate data, systems, and tools with concerned departments to enable informed decisions by the Director General (DG)/Chairman.
* Follow up on major projects and related teams, submit performance reports, and review outputs.
* Review and synthesize technical reports from institutions and sectors, provide technical opinions and solutions, and prepare reports per leadership directives.

**Operations**

* Prepare for leadership technical meetings and visits-agendas, documents, and minutes-and participate in external boards/committees; prepare and review technical reports/memoranda for stakeholders.
* Support and facilitate workshops on feasibility studies, ROI, cost analysis, technical specifications, alternatives analysis, and project management.
* Design, develop, and manage internal project-management software applications and tools to improve business performance.
* Review and audit engineering, IT, and other projects; advise on appropriate technical solutions; provide technical advice on reports from external parties and across sectors and institutions.
* Provide expert assistance to project managers on assigned engineering projects.
* Participate in committees related to engineering projects, including evaluation of control centers.

**Process/Product Improvement**

* Train and mentor project managers (SME Development Program); support PMOs with guidance and executive materials; develop and deliver PM/enterprise PM communications capabilities as directed.

**Physical Working Conditions**

* Conduct site visits to ongoing/completed projects and service facilities, collect required data and observations for official reports, track corrective actions with teams, and be available after hours for site visits, emergencies, urgent meetings, and ad-hoc tasks.

**Job Qualifications & Requirements :**

**Education**

* Bachelor’s degree/ master’s degree in civil/ mechanical/electrical engineering, Project Management, Industrial Engineering

**Experience**

* 9+ Years in case of master’s degree (11+ years in case of bachelor’s degree)

**The Role**
The Vice President will lead real estate development projects from con
data.jd_text:
Our client is a well-capitalised real estate developer with a growing portfolio of mixed-use and commercial assets across the UAE. The organisation is expanding its development pipeline and investment activity.
  
  
**The Role**
The Vice President will lead real estate development projects from concept through delivery. This role will oversee feasibility studies, financial modelling, design coordination, and execution planning. A key focus will be ensuring projects meet commercial return targets and quality benchmarks. The VP will manage consultants, contractors, and internal development teams. This role will also support land acquisition and investment evaluation. Strong coordination with finance, asset management, and government stakeholders will be required.
  
  
**Candidate Profile**
The ideal candidate will have senior development experience within real estate or mixed-use projects. Strong exposure to feasibility analysis and development execution is essential. Experience in the UAE development market is highly preferred. The candidate must demonstrate commercial judgment, technical understanding, and leadership capability. Experience dealing with regulators and public entities is a strong advantage.
