data.jd_text:
**Creatio is a global vendor of an AI-native platform**
to automate workflows and CRM with no-code and a maximum degree of freedom. Our platform combines an AI-first architecture, composable no-code tools, and enterprise-grade governance to help organizations build and scale faster.
  
  
We’re proud to be recognized by top industry analysts as a
**Leader and Strong Performer in multiple Gartner and Forrester reports.**
**In 2025, Creatio was named to Inc.’s Best Workplaces list,**
recognizing our commitment to employee wellbeing and a strong workplace culture.
  
  
**The Opportunity**
For the role of
**Enterprise Account Executive (Middle East)**
, we are seeking an experienced field sales professional to help us scale the number of Enterprises that use the Creatio platform. Candidates must have experience building and developing a territory to high performance within an innovative SaaS technology provider. Successful candidates will help to build a portfolio of business within the top target enterprises in their territory. Successful candidates will need to drive their own activity and build a funnel while being supported by the broader Creatio organization of diverse and executive, product, and technical teams.
  
  
The role is based in the
**Middle East (Dubai)**
.
  
  
Our targets are ambitious, and we are seeking engaging, collaborative, successful Enterprise Account Executives who have the skills, experience, and track record to make an immediate impact. We’re fast-paced, innovative, and collaborative. We pursue excellence in everything and have a lot of fun along the way.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Deliver against revenue targets and all key performance metrics
* Generate new business opportunities on an assigned territory, manage pipeline, opportunities, forecasting, and other items related to a normal outside sales function
* Manage the end-to-end enterprise sales process and resource to create and execute winning solution sales strategies
* Establish relationships with VP/C-level buyers (Business and IT)
* Develop and orchestrate sales presentations and product demonstrations
* Focus on new logo acquisition and manage relationships with the existing accounts to identify opportunities for cross and up-sales
* Ability to work with all customer functions including executive-level personnel, various customer stakeholders, architecture, operations, design, vendor management, innovation, sourcing, and customer procurement

**Desired Skills And Experience**

* Minimum 5 years of experience working within enterprise SaaS platform sales to large enterprises
* Proven track record of meeting quarterly and annual targets
* Deep understanding of executive-level Enterprise and/or Global Account sales and methodologies
* Superb written and verbal communications and organizational skills
* 4-year degree required, with technical curiosity and desire to learn
* Experience with CRM/BPM software space is strongly preferred
* Fluency in English and Arabic

**What You Should Expect From Us**

* Powerful award-winning product
* Focus on making our clients successful (NPS score – 42%)
* Dedicated leadership with open doors
* A steady stream of inbound leads (though we expect you to generate your own leads as well)
* A collaborative environment where everybody is happy to help

data.title: VP Customer Success & Operations- B2B Fintech & Trading
data.raw_snippet:
**VP Customer Success & Operations- B2B Fintech & Trading**

Our client is hiring a
**VP Customer Success & Operations**
to build a repeatable global operating system that supports scale, delivery excellence, and commercial execution across a fast-growing fintech infrastructure business. This is a p
data.jd_text:
**VP Customer Success & Operations- B2B Fintech & Trading**

Our client is hiring a
**VP Customer Success & Operations**
to build a repeatable global operating system that supports scale, delivery excellence, and commercial execution across a fast-growing fintech infrastructure business. This is a pivotal leadership role, working closely with the CEO and cross-functional teams to productize the company’s offering, improve delivery capability, and reduce dependency on the CTO across presales, delivery, and launch operations.

What you’ll be responsible for:

**Productization & commercial packaging**

* Convert a broad capability set into 2–4 flagship product lines with clear inclusions, exclusions, pricing logic, and implementation timelines
* Define standard deployment models across SaaS, private cloud, and hybrid, including the operational, security, and support implications of each
* Build product factsheets and sales enablement materials covering features, security posture, integrations, launch timelines, and support models

**GTM operations**

* Own sales operating cadence, including CRM stages, forecasting, win/loss feedback loops, and pipeline hygiene
* Build a deal desk with clear pricing governance, discount rules, SOW templates, change-order models, and margin controls
* Standardise presales solutioning so technical leadership is not required in every commercial conversation, using discovery templates, architecture diagrams, integration checklists, and compliance/security packs

**Delivery operations**

* Build and lead a delivery function covering Implementation Project Managers, Solution Engineers, QA/UAT, and Release Management
* Establish and embed a gated delivery methodology across discovery, solution design, integration, UAT, launch, and hypercare
* Enforce scope control through acceptance criteria, delivery exit gates, and structured change-order processes

**Compliance-by-design & risk controls**

* Own partner selection and integration readiness across key operational components
* Support liquidity aggregation and trading technology capabilities across crypto, FX/CFDs, and broader multi-asset environments
* Oversee wallet/custody components, treasury controls, and tokenisation workflows where relevant
* Ensure operational readiness aligns with security expectations, access controls, and regulated client requirements

**Customer success operating model**

* Build a structured post-launch operating model covering onboarding, hypercare, monthly operational reviews, QBRs, and renewal/expansion motions
* Implement and track key metrics such as time-to-launch, incident rate, SLA compliance, adoption, and net revenue retention
* Work cross-functionally to ensure a seamless customer experience from presales through to launch and long-term growth

**Leadership & operational scale**

* Build a scalable operating model across GTM, delivery, and platform operations
* Lead cross-functional operating cadence across Sales, Product, Engineering, and Support
* Drive consistency, accountability, and operational discipline across multi-region teams and enterprise-grade delivery environments

Skills:

* 5–7+ years’ experience in
  **fintech, trading infrastructure, brokerage, or exchange technology**
* Proven experience building or running
  **GTM, Delivery, and Platform Operations**
  within a
  **B2B product company**
* Strong technical literacy across trading platform architecture, order and risk concepts, APIs, and market data feeds
* Deep understanding of multi-asset operational environments, including digital and traditional asset classes
* Strong grasp of security, access control, and the expectations of regulated clients
* Experience scaling global operations across multi-region teams and integration-heavy enterprise environments
* Commercially minded with the ability to balance strategic thinking and hands-on execution
* Highly operational, structured, and able to build repeatable systems in fast-growth environments
* Confident working cross-functionally with senior stakeholders across commercial and technical teams
* Comfortable bringing clarity, process, and accountability to complex delivery and launch environments
* Resilient, pragmatic, and able to operate effectively in a high-growth business undergoing scale and transformation

data.title: Office Administrator - French Speaker
data.raw_snippet: As the Office Administrator at the Regional Office, you will provide administrative and coordination support to the Vice President – Operations, while assisting the Office Manager in overseeing the day-to-day administration of the Corporate Office and its visitors. This role is responsible for ensur
data.jd_text:
As the Office Administrator at the Regional Office, you will provide administrative and coordination support to the Vice President – Operations, while assisting the Office Manager in overseeing the day-to-day administration of the Corporate Office and its visitors. This role is responsible for ensuring smooth office operations through effective communication, travel coordination, report preparation, tracker management, and general administrative support.
  
  
You will play a key role in facilitating coordination between the Vice President - Operations and hotel teams, ensuring timely follow-up on operational matters, preparation of documents, tracking of deadlines, and management of logistics required for daily business activities. The position also supports the consolidation of operational reports from hotels, communication with hotel owners, coordination related to audits and hotel openings, and the organization of key operational meetings.
  
  
**Key Role Responsibilities**

* Provide administrative support to the VP – Operations, including calendar management, meeting coordination, correspondence, and document preparation.
* Support operational communication and follow-up between the Corporate Office, hotel General Managers, owners, and other stakeholders to ensure timely execution of actions.
* Prepare, format, and organize reports, presentations, meeting materials, minutes, owner documents, business review packs, and operational summaries.
* Maintain accurate and well-organized records of operational communications, approvals, action logs, and key documentation.
* Consolidate updates relating to hotel reviews, owner matters, audits, openings, and operational meetings for leadership review.
* Maintain and update operational trackers, action logs, and follow-up records to ensure information is current, accurate, and properly filed.
* Monitor deadlines and proactively follow up with hotels and internal departments to obtain required updates, documents, and inputs on time.
* Track outstanding action items across properties and functions, ensuring timely closure.
* Escalate overdue items, delays, or missing submissions to the VP – Operations where necessary.
* In coordination with the Office Manager, arrange travel for corporate executives, including flights, accommodation, transportation, and itineraries.
* Coordinate travel schedules for hotel visits, operational meetings, and regional reviews.
* Track travel plans, visit outcomes, related expenses, and post-visit follow-up actions.
* Support the flow of information between the VP – Operations, hotels, and regional teams on operational updates, requests, and follow-up actions.
* Assist in drafting and issuing internal operational communications where required.
* Liaise with relevant stakeholders to ensure requested information and updates are submitted within agreed timelines.
* Assist in collecting operational data and preparing reports for the VP – Operations.
* Support the consolidation of updates and documents arising from meetings, audits, hotel reviews, and property visits.
* Maintain organized records of reports, correspondence, and operational documentation.
* Provide general administrative and coordination support to ensure smooth day-to-day operational administration.
* Support operations teams with basic administrative tasks related to systems access requests, documentation, and coordination.
* Assist with maintaining records related to operational processes and reporting requirements.
* Provide general coordination support to help ensure continuity and efficiency across day-to-day operational administration.
* Work closely with the Office Manager on office organization, meeting coordination, visitor arrangements, and general administrative support across the office.
* Manage the reception area of the Corporate Office, ensuring it is professional, presentable, and welcoming at all times.
* Serve as the first point of contact for visitors, guests, and external partners, greeting and assisting them in a courteous and professional manner.
* Handle incoming calls, direct inquiries appropriately, and ensure messages are relayed in a timely manner.
* Coordinate visitor arrivals and support meeting room readiness for internal and external meetings.
* Support the Office Manager in the smooth day-to-day administration of the Corporate Office.
* Assist the Office Manager with day-to-day office coordination to help ensure continuity, efficiency, and a high standard of presentation across the regional office.
* Monitor the office supply requirements, including stationery, pantry items, and general office consumables, ensuring timely replenishment and maintaining appropriate stock levels for the smooth day-to-day running of the regional office.

**Candidate Requirements**

* 2–4 years of experience in office administration, executive assistance, operational coordination, or administrative support
* Previous experience supporting a senior leader in a corporate, regional, or hotel environment
* Hospitality or multi-property experience is an advantage
* Bilingual in French and English, with strong verbal and written communication skills in both languages
* Strong coordination skills across calendars, meetings, travel, reports, and follow-up activities
* Highly organized with strong attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple priorities at once
* Experience maintaining trackers, action logs, records, and documentation accurately
* Confident preparing presentations, meeting packs, minutes, and business correspondence
* Professional communication skills with the ability to liaise effectively with internal and external stakeholders
* Good command of Microsoft Office applications, particularly Excel, Word, PowerPoint, and Outlook
* Professional appearance and manner, with confidence in handling visitors and reception responsibilities
* Discreet and trustworthy when handling confidential information
* Able to work at pace, follow up firmly, and support the smooth day-to-day running of a regional office

data.title: Maritime Solutions - Commercial Development Manager, Offshore ( Pipeline Opportunity)
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
**ABOUT THE BUSINESS**
DP World - Maritime Solutions is a leading provider of marine solutions with focus on offshore energy, port services and logistics. The company provides a wide portfolio of value-added marine services and ability to integrate these offerings for its custome
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
**ABOUT THE BUSINESS**
DP World - Maritime Solutions is a leading provider of marine solutions with focus on offshore energy, port services and logistics. The company provides a wide portfolio of value-added marine services and ability to integrate these offerings for its customers – always with safety and the environment at the forefront.
  
  
Headquartered in Dubai, the company has operations globally across all seven continents.
  
  
**About The Role**
Based in Dubai Head Office and reporting to the VP Commercial & Tendering – Offshore Services, the Commercial Development Manager - Offshore will drive business growth and maximize revenue opportunities through effective commercial strategies, develop and manage client relationships, secure new contracts, expand the fleet, and ensure the profitability of offshore vessel operations.
  
  
**Key Accountabilities**
**Business Development**

* Identify and pursue new business opportunities in the offshore oil and gas sector.
* Conduct market research to identify emerging trends and potential customers.
* Develop and implement strategies to expand the company's market share and revenue streams.
* Take charge of establishing new entities in developing nations.

**Contract Management**

* Lead contract negotiations, ensuring favourable terms and conditions and in alignment with the company’s policies and financial objectives.
* Draft, review, and finalize commercial agreements, including charter party contracts.
* Manage contract administration, including monitoring compliance and addressing any issues.

**Financial Performance**

* Develop pricing strategies to optimize vessel utilization and maximize profitability.
* Track revenue, costs, and expenses related to vessel operations.
* Prepare financial forecasts and reports, highlighting key performance indicators.
* Implement cost control measures and identify opportunities for operational efficiencies

**Relationship Management**

* Cultivate and maintain strong relationships with clients, industry stakeholders, and regulatory bodies.
* Address client inquiries, concerns, and feedback promptly and effectively.
* Collaborate with operational teams to ensure seamless service delivery and client satisfaction.
* Represent the company at industry conferences, events, and client meetings.

**Vessel S&P (Sale and Purchase)**

* Negotiate and close ship sale and purchase deals, including sourcing financing and exploring M&A opportunities.
* Oversee preparation of sales and purchase contracts, ensuring compliance with maritime laws.

**Qualifications & Experience**
**Minimum Qualifications and Experience:**

* Bachelor’s degree in business, engineering, or a related field (MBA preferred).
* Proven experience in a commercial management role within the offshore oil and gas industry.
* Sound knowledge of vessel operations, including PSVs, AHTS, and crew boats.
* Demonstrated success in business development and contract negotiations.
* Minimum of 5 years’ Offshore Support Vessels (OSV) experience with oil and gas industries in a Chartering / Commercial Management role.

**Key Attributes**
**Technical Skills**

* Strong understanding of commercial and financial principles within the maritime industry.
* Proficiency in market analysis, financial modelling, and risk assessment.
* Excellent negotiation, communication, and presentation skills.
* Familiarity with relevant regulations, industry standards, and compliance requirements.

**Leadership And Collaboration**

* Ability to lead and inspire cross-functional teams to achieve common goals.
* Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to build and maintain professional relationships.
* Results-oriented mindset with a focus on delivering high quality outcomes
* Excellent problem-solving and decision-making abilities.

data.title: EMEA Ecosystem & Compliance Program Leader (Red Hat SEAP - Software Asset Management) (m/f/d)
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Summary**
The Red Hat Subscription, Education, Awareness Program (SEAP) team seeks an EMEA Ecosystem & Compliance Program Leader. This critical role is responsible for the development and execution of programs to scale Red Hat's compliance efforts with and through the Partner Ecosystem across
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary**
The Red Hat Subscription, Education, Awareness Program (SEAP) team seeks an EMEA Ecosystem & Compliance Program Leader. This critical role is responsible for the development and execution of programs to scale Red Hat's compliance efforts with and through the Partner Ecosystem across the EMEA region. This includes strategic engagement with major partners and developing new markets for audit and review, specifically targeting the ISV Ecosystem in EMEA. The goal is to ensure fair compensation for Red Hat subscription services by enforcing the subscription model and driving sales through education and remediation.
  
  
**What You Will Do**

* EMEA Ecosystem & Partner Strategy: Lead strategic engagement with major partners across EMEA and coordinate regional auditing/customer assessment partnerships. Develop and execute regional sales programs with the Partner Ecosystem Success organization to scale the SEAP business.
* ISV embedded royalties: Support the local sales team review royalties accuracy and timing and run ad-hoc and regional SEAP review (with 3rd Party if required) and educational workshop
* Regional CCSP: collaborate with the CCSP team to identify potential compliance issues, conduct workshops on usage reporting and identify and resolve gap in reporting.
* Education & Enablement: Serve as the subject matter expert on Red Hat's subscription model, contractual terms, and conditions for sales, customers, and partners. Document and distribute best practices and create regionally-specific marketing and messaging for the program.
* Campaign Development: Develop strategic compliance campaigns in collaboration with the EcoSystem partners and local sales teams to drive broader awareness and execution of the Red Hat subscription model.
* Cross-Functional Execution: Collaborate closely with Sales representatives and leadership, Customer Success, Channel, Renewal teams, Finance, and Legal across the EMEA region.

**What You Will Bring**

* Experience: 5+ years in Compliance, Sales, or customer-facing roles. Extensive direct experience in software licensing, compliance, SAM, sales, or sourcing. Experience in creating and analyzing customer data reports.
* Skills: Strong analytical, strategy, negotiation, and conflict resolution skills. Excellent commercial skills, including managing programs and projects.
* Business Acumen: Fundamental understanding of Red Hat's subscription model and ability to articulate its value. Ability to analyze contractual terms and conditions and explain them in "plain English" to stakeholders.
* Language: Fluency in English is required. Fluency in a second or third language is a plus.
* Education: Bachelor’s degree or higher.

**About Red Hat**
Red Hat is the world’s leading provider of enterprise open source software solutions, using a community-powered approach to deliver high-performing Linux, cloud, container, and Kubernetes technologies. Spread across 40+ countries, our associates work flexibly across work environments, from in-office, to office-flex, to fully remote, depending on the requirements of their role. Red Hatters are encouraged to bring their best ideas, no matter their title or tenure. We're a leader in open source because of our open and inclusive environment. We hire creative, passionate people ready to contribute their ideas, help solve complex problems, and make an impact.
  
  
**Inclusion at Red Hat**
Red Hat’s culture is built on the open source principles of transparency, collaboration, and inclusion, where the best ideas can come from anywhere and anyone. When this is realized, it empowers people from different backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences to come together to share ideas, challenge the status quo, and drive innovation. Our aspiration is that everyone experiences this culture with equal opportunity and access, and that all voices are not only heard but also celebrated. We hope you will join our celebration, and we welcome and encourage applicants from all the beautiful dimensions that compose our global village.
  
  
**Equal Opportunity Policy (EEO)**
Red Hat is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and an affirmative action employer. We review applications for employment without regard to their race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, age, veteran status, genetic information, physical or mental disability, medical condition, marital status, or any other basis prohibited by law.
  
  
Red Hat does not seek or accept unsolicited resumes or CVs from recruitment agencies. We are not responsible for, and will not pay, any fees, commissions, or any other payment related to unsolicited resumes or CVs except as required in a written contract between Red Hat and the recruitment agency or party requesting payment of a fee.
  
  
Red Hat supports individuals with disabilities and provides reasonable accommodations to job applicants. If you need assistance completing our online job application, email application-assistance@redhat.com. General inquiries, such as those regarding the status of a job application, will not receive a reply.

data.title: Senior Program Manager
data.raw_snippet:
Senior Program Manager
  
Meet myZoi
  
myZoi is changing lives for the better for those who deserve it the most. We are an exciting fintech start-up aiming to promote financial inclusion globally. Our vision is to provide a level playing field to the unbanked and the underbanked in accessing essent
data.jd_text:
Senior Program Manager
  
Meet myZoi
  
myZoi is changing lives for the better for those who deserve it the most. We are an exciting fintech start-up aiming to promote financial inclusion globally. Our vision is to provide a level playing field to the unbanked and the underbanked in accessing essential financial services in an affordable, convenient, and transparent fashion. We are looking for smart, ambitious, and purpose-driven individuals to join us in this journey.
  
Position
  

The Senior Program Manager is responsible for leading complex, cross-functional programs that deliver and enhance myZoi’s product ecosystem. Reporting into the Enterprise PMO, the role translates strategic, product, and regulatory objectives into structured programs comprising multiple interdependent projects.

The role requires strong understanding of end-to-end fintech product delivery, customer journeys, regulatory constraints, and operational impacts, combined with disciplined governance and execution.

Key Responsibilities
  
  
**Program Leadership & Delivery**

* Lead end-to-end delivery of large, multi-workstream programs spanning myZoi’s product landscape.
* Structure programs into clearly defined projects, workstreams, milestones, and outcomes.
* Ensure programs are delivered on time, within scope, budget, and quality expectations.

Product & Business Alignment
  
  
  

* Partner closely with Product Management to translate product roadmaps into executable delivery plans.
* Maintain strong understanding of myZoi’s products, customer journeys, and operating model.
* Ensure alignment between customer experience, regulatory requirements, and technical implementation.

Governance, Control & PMO Alignment
  
  
  

* Deliver programs in line with standards, governance frameworks, delivery methodologies.
* Establish and manage integrated program plans, RAID logs, and change control processes.
* Provide consolidated, high-quality reporting to PMO governance forums and senior leadership.
* Ensure governance remains lightweight, value-driven, and aligned to industry-standard frameworks rather than bespoke internal processes.

Cross-Functional Stakeholder Management
  
  
  

* Lead coordination across Technology, Product, Risk, Compliance, Operations, Finance, and external partners.
* Act as the single point of contact for program-level risks and issues.
* Facilitate steering committees, PODs, and decision forums.

Risk, Compliance & Regulatory Delivery
  
  
  

* Ensure programs address all relevant risk, compliance, and regulatory requirements.
* Work closely with Risk and Compliance teams to embed controls into design and delivery.
* Support audits, regulatory reviews, and remediation initiatives.

Financial & Resource Management
  
  
  

* Own program-level budgets, forecasts, and financial tracking in partnership with Finance.
* Manage resource planning across multiple delivery teams and vendors.
* Oversee third-party and vendor delivery where applicable.

Continuous Improvement & Capability Building
  
  
  

* Capture lessons learned and apply best practices to future programs.
* Support Project & Portfolio Managers within the PMO.
* Contribute to the ongoing maturity of processes, standards, and ways of working.

Qualifications
  
  
Experience
  
  
  

* 12-15+ years of experience in program/project management within fintech (Digital Product)/financial services.
* Proven experience delivering complex, product-led programs in regulated environments.
* Experience in leading regulatory enabled strategic programs
* Strong track record working with PMOs and enterprise governance frameworks.
* Experience with tech delivery coordination in hybrid mode with cloud native in-house built platform/outsourced delivery model.

Skills & Expertise
  
  
  

* Experience operating within Lean-Agile delivery models, including PI planning and structured prioritization frameworks.
* Ability to apply standardized industry frameworks (e.g., SAFe principles, Agile governance) without adding unnecessary process.
* Strong understanding of fintech product lifecycles and end-to-end delivery.
    
  - Excellent program structuring, dependency management, and execution skills.
    
  - Strong stakeholder management and executive communication capabilities.
    
  - Experience with Agile, Waterfall, and hybrid delivery models and tools (JIRA, Confluence).
* Experience in orchestrating Product, Operations and Technology, SLODs, commercial, Business Development and external partners.
* Ability to understand the strategic and financial implications of trade-offs and translate them into the program delivery scope and requirements.
* Ability to challenge and support Product and Tech on architecture, sequencing, and trade‑offs between scope, risk and time‑to‑market.

Education & Certifications
  
  
  

* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, Finance, or a related field.
* PMP, PgMP, SAFe, or equivalent certifications preferred.

Personal Attributes
  
  
  

* Strategic yet execution-focused.
* Comfortable operating in matrix and regulated environments.
* Strong ownership mindset and attention to detail.
* Passion for purpose-driven fintech and financial inclusion.

**At myZoi we strive to create a both a product and a team that embraces equality, inclusion, diversity and freedom. We want people who can be themselves and bring their own brand of value to the team. Come and join us!**

The Senior Project Manager role is an integral position within our organization, designed for a seasoned leader who can oversee large-scale projects from conception to completion. This role requires someone with a strategic mindset, capable of managing multiple complex projects s
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
The Senior Project Manager role is an integral position within our organization, designed for a seasoned leader who can oversee large-scale projects from conception to completion. This role requires someone with a strategic mindset, capable of managing multiple complex projects simultaneously. The ideal candidate will possess a deep understanding of project management methodologies and have a proven track record in driving projects to successful completion, on time and within budget. They will be responsible for coordinating cross-functional teams, liaising with stakeholders, and ensuring that each project aligns with the company's broader goals and strategies. As a Senior Project Manager, you will play a pivotal role in shaping the success of our projects and contributing to the growth and development of our organization.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Lead the planning and implementation of projects, ensuring timely execution and delivery.
* Define project goals, objectives, scope, and assumptions aligned with stakeholders.
* Coordinate internal resources and third parties/vendors for flawless project execution.
* Develop comprehensive project plans to monitor, track, and report progress.
* Manage changes in project scope, schedule, and costs using appropriate techniques.
* Measure project performance using appropriate systems, tools, and techniques.
* Perform risk management to minimize potential project risks and issues.
* Ensure resource availability and allocation throughout the project lifecycle.
* Develop and maintain strong relationships with stakeholders and key partners.
* Conduct project evaluations post-implementation to assess performance and outcomes.
* Mentor and guide junior team members, providing support and development.
* Prepare and present detailed project reports and status updates to management.

**Requirements**

* Bachelor’s degree in Project Management, Business, or related field.
* Minimum of 5 years of experience in project management roles.
* Proven track record of managing successful projects in a similar industry.
* Strong understanding of project management principles and methodologies.
* Excellent communication and leadership skills with the ability to resolve conflicts.
* Proficient in project management software and other relevant technologies.
* Professional certification such as PMP or equivalent is highly desirable.

Job Details
  
  
Role Level: Mid-Level Work Type: Full-Time Country: United Arab Emirates City: Dubai Company Website: https://www.talentmate.com Job Function: Project Management Company Industry/
  
  
Sector: Recruitment & Staffing
  
  
What We Offer
  
  
**About The Company**
Searching, interviewing and hiring are all part of the professional life. The TALENTMATE Portal idea is to fill and help professionals doing one of them by bringing together the requisites under One Roof. Whether you're hunting for your Next Job Opportunity or Looking for Potential Employers, we're here to lend you a Helping Hand.

data.jd_text:
**Description**
Interested in working on an innovative and high-impact business that is changing the way customers think about grocery? The MENA Grocery team (UFG) is offering a role to own building new business from ground Zero. We are seeking a self-starter who can quickly familiarize themselves with this fast-paced environment, build relationships/trust with cross-functional teams, and assume ownership within the program which will require understanding of complex business/Tech/Ops processes at Amazon and our partners and devising an optimal engagement model. You must be able to thrive and succeed in an entrepreneurial environment, and not be hindered by ambiguity or competing priorities. High judgment, analytical talent and good document writing skills with concise communication are essential to success in this role.
  
  
In this role, You will influence internal and external stakeholders and leadership to buy in to your strategic direction in forging new business partnerships, drive program end to end to onboard partners while ensuring flawless execution and continuously analyzing key metrics to drive improvements for your business.
  
  
This position involves regular communication with senior leadership on Business and customer offering reviews, Operations excellence improvement areas, project execution and risks. You should be comfortable working both at a strategic level and diving deep into the details to ensure solution feasibility and quality of execution.
  
  
Key job responsibilities
  
  
Partner Onboarding & Merchant Launch
  
  

* Lead end-to-end partner onboarding programs, including new merchant acquisition, integration, and launch
* Manage merchant expansion initiatives to scale from current operations to 5+ merchants per country
* Coordinate with cross-functional teams to ensure successful merchant launches and ongoing relationship management
* Own the merchant onboarding lifecycle, ensuring timely delivery of all capabilities and requirements

Contracts & Legal Matters
  
  

* Partner with Legal teams to negotiate and execute partnership agreements, including Master Service Agreements (MSAs), addendums, and heads of terms
* Manage contract lifecycle from drafting through signature, ensuring compliance with company policies and financial requirements
* Coordinate contract reviews, approvals, and amendments with internal stakeholders and external partners
* Ensure all legal documentation is properly stored and tracked in Contract Central

PMO & Technical Program Management
  
  

* Build and manage PMO project schedules, plans, and metrics to support program delivery

New Initiatives & Programs
  
  

* Scope and deliver complex, business-critical programs end-to-end, driving overall program strategy and roadmap
* Define business and systems requirements working with internal and external stakeholders
* Lead strategic initiatives such as new market launches, service expansions, and operational improvements
* Develop and execute project plans from design to release, securing resources and managing implementation

**Basic Qualifications**

* 5+ years of program or project management experience
* 3+ years of working cross functionally with tech and non-tech teams experience
* Experience implementing repeatable processes and driving automation or standardization
* Knowledge of Excel at an intermediate level (e.g., pivot tables & charts, multiple criteria lookups, nested logical/IF formulas, data cleansing, array formulas, etc.)
* Experience defining program requirements and using data and metrics to determine improvements

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience in stakeholder management, dealing with multiple stakeholders at varied levels of the organization
* Experience building processes, project management, and schedules
* Experience defining and executing program requirements
* Experience in complex problem solving, and working in a tight schedule environment

This role is ideal for a highly motivated and client-focused professional with a strong background in delivering hospitality projects across the UAE or wider GCC region.

• Lead and manage hospitality projects from inception through to completion

• Career growth within a well-established consultancy

• Dynamic and collaborative working environment

If you meet the above criteria and are interested in this opportunity, please apply or get in touch for a confidential discussion.

data.jd_text:
**Skill - Data Technical PM**

**Total Exp - 10+ Years**

**Location - Dubai**

**Required Skills & Experience:**

**Must-Have:**

- 7+ years of experience in Project Management within the banking or financial services sector.

- Proven experience leading data and MI automation projects (especially Databricks and Confluent Kafka).

- Strong understanding of data architecture, data pipelines, and streaming technologies.

- Experience managing cross-functional teams (onshore/offshore).

- Strong command of Agile/Scrum and Waterfall methodologies.

**Technical Exposure:**

- Databricks (Delta Lake, MLflow, Spark)

- Confluent Kafka (Kafka Connect, kSQL, Schema Registry)

- Azure or AWS Cloud Platforms (preferably Azure)

- Integration tools (Informatica, Data Factory), CI/CD pipelines

- Oracle ERP Implementation experience

- PowerBI

**Preferred:**

- PMP / Prince2 / Scrum Master certification

- Familiarity with regulatory frameworks: BCBS 239, GDPR, CBUAE regulations

- Strong understanding of data governance principles (e.g., DAMA-DMBOK) & Bachelor’s or Master’s in Computer Science, Information Systems, Engineering, or related field.

**KPIs:**

- On-time, on-budget delivery of data initiatives.

- Uptime and SLAs of data pipelines.

- User satisfaction and stakeholder feedback.

- Compliance with regulatory milestones.

**Key Responsibilities:**

**Project Planning & Execution:**

- Lead planning, execution, and delivery of enterprise data and MI automation projects using Databricks and Confluent.

- Develop detailed requirements, project plans, delivery roadmaps, and work breakdown structures.

- Ensure resource allocation, budgeting, and adherence to timelines and quality standards.

- Manage vendors deliverables and quality of output

- Manage issues, conflicts and prepare mitigation

**Stakeholder & Team Management:**

- Collaborate with data engineers, architects, business analysts, and platform teams to align on project goals.

- Act as the primary liaison between business units, technology teams, and vendors.

- Facilitate regular updates, steering committee meetings, and issue/risk escalations.

**Technical Oversight:**

- Oversee solution delivery on Databricks (for data processing, ML pipelines, analytics).

- Manage real-time data streaming pipelines via Confluent Kafka.

- Ensure alignment with data governance, security, and regulatory frameworks (e.g., GDPR, CBUAE, BCBS 239).

data.raw_snippet:
ARX is a global network of specialists in engineering, design, and architecture. Our team offers 360° consulting, project management, and technical services in:
  
  
airports, bridges, buildings, cableways,
  
  
digital innovation, environment, equipment,
  
  
geology, geotechnics, hydropower, me
data.jd_text:
ARX is a global network of specialists in engineering, design, and architecture. Our team offers 360° consulting, project management, and technical services in:
  
  
airports, bridges, buildings, cableways,
  
  
digital innovation, environment, equipment,
  
  
geology, geotechnics, hydropower, metros,
  
  
nuclear plants, oil & gas, pipelines, ports,
  
  
railways, river engineering, roads, traffic,
  
  
tunnels, and water/wastewater treatment.
  
  
With offices across Europe, North and South America, Asia, Africa, and Oceania, our agile task force combines global expertise with local know-how. The result is our uniquely
**"glocal"**
approach, which allows us to meet the specific needs of each community while incorporating international best practices. At ARX, smart minds strive for a sustainable future, transforming communities one innovative project at a time.
  
  
People are the heart and soul of ARX. We are a home for innovators, visionaries, and experts to develop talents, launch careers, and collaborate with fellow specialists. ARX values individuals. Believing their brilliance and determination will provide solutions to tomorrow's challenges, we welcome professionals who will both benefit from and enrich our team.
  
  
ARX, marks a significant expansion into the Middle East with its offices in UAE and KSA. This underscores our dedication to innovation and engineering excellence, bolstering our position in the dynamic GCC market.
  
  
For our office in Dubai, we are looking for
  
  
**Project Controls and Claims Manager**
- 100% (m/f)
  
  
The ideal candidate will have
**12-15 years of experience**
in project controls, planning, delay analysis, and claims management on major infrastructure and EPC projects. The Project Control Manager will be responsible for leading project controls activities across the full project lifecycle, including planning, scheduling, progress monitoring, reporting, cost and performance tracking, and support on contractual and claims-related matters. The role requires close coordination with project, commercial, and technical teams to ensure robust programme management, effective reporting, and timely identification of project risks and mitigation measures.
  
  
**Responsibilities:**

* Lead the development, maintenance, and monitoring of baseline master programmes and detailed project schedules using Primavera P6.
* Oversee project controls processes, including planning, progress measurement, reporting, forecasting, and performance analysis.
* Lead the preparation of lookaheads, recovery programmes, and what-if scenario analyses to support project delivery and decision-making.
* Monitor project progress against approved baselines, key milestones, and contractual obligations, and drive corrective actions where required.
* Coordinate with engineering, procurement, construction, and commercial teams to validate progress, assess impacts, and ensure alignment across all project functions.
* Prepare and review weekly and monthly progress reports, dashboards, S-curves, delay logs, and management summaries.
* Oversee the development and maintenance of project control tools, work breakdown structures, reporting frameworks, and progress tracking systems.
* Support cost-loaded programme development and integration between schedule, cost, and performance reporting.
* Lead or support earned value analysis, forecasting, and performance monitoring through key project indicators.
* Manage and support the preparation and review of extension of time claims, Time Impact Analyses, delay analyses, and associated planning narratives.
* Provide planning and contractual support in relation to project changes, delays, risk events, and claims strategy.
* Support tender and pre-contract planning activities, including preparation of master programmes, phasing plans, methodology-linked schedules, permit schedules, and indirect cost inputs.
* Lead coordination with clients, consultants, subcontractors, and internal stakeholders on programme compliance, reporting, schedule updates, and recovery planning.
* Provide guidance and direction to planners or junior project controls team members as required.

**Requirements:**

* Bachelor's degree in Engineering or a related discipline.
* 12-15 years of experience in project controls, planning, and claims management on large-scale infrastructure or EPC projects.
* Proven experience leading project controls functions on complex multidisciplinary projects.
* Strong experience in project scheduling, progress monitoring, forecasting, delay analysis, and management reporting.
* Proven involvement in extension of time claims and contractual planning matters.
* Experience across major infrastructure sectors such as rail, tunnelling, underground works, water, energy, or multidisciplinary civil projects.
* GCC experience is preferred.
* Strong command of Primavera P6 is mandatory.
* Good knowledge of project controls systems, reporting tools, and advanced Excel-based reporting.
* Sound understanding of FIDIC, NEC, or similar forms of contract.
* Strong communication, coordination, and stakeholder management skills.

**Competencies:**

* Strong leadership in project controls, with the ability to manage schedules, reporting, risks, and performance across complex projects.
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to identify trends, risks, delays, and required mitigation measures.
* Good commercial and contractual awareness, with the ability to support claims strategy and entitlement assessment.
* Able to work effectively across multidisciplinary teams and manage interfaces with internal and external stakeholders.
* Delivery-focused, structured, and proactive in managing competing priorities and deadlines.

**We Offer:**

* Opportunity to collaborate with a forward-thinking, synergistic, and innovative team.
* Exposure to cutting-edge projects driving Middle East / North African regions development.
* Personalized professional growth and developmental avenues tailored to your career aspirations.

If you would you like to join our highly motivated and very successful team, please send us your complete application!
  
  
Sector: Construction/Civil Engineering
  
  
Role: Engineering
  
  
Will manage other people: No
  
  
Job type: Permanent job
  
  
Career level: Employee

data.title: Senior Program Manager, Network Health / Trust & Safety
data.raw_snippet:
**Description**
This role is for someone who wants real ownership.
  
  
You’ll be the right hand to the Network Health and Trust & Safety leadership, owning complex, high-impact programs that protect customers, partners, and the business. This is not a reporting or coordination role. You will ident
data.jd_text:
**Description**
This role is for someone who wants real ownership.
  
  
You’ll be the right hand to the Network Health and Trust & Safety leadership, owning complex, high-impact programs that protect customers, partners, and the business. This is not a reporting or coordination role. You will identify risks before they escalate, turn ambiguity into clear execution plans, and drive programs that balance safety, compliance, and operational reality.
  
  
You’ll work across teams that don’t naturally align, often without direct authority. Your job is to connect the dots, make hard calls, and ensure the right things get done on time, at scale, and with measurable impact.
  
  
If you enjoy solving messy problems, influencing senior stakeholders, and building mechanisms that last, this role will stretch you in the best way.
  
  
Key job responsibilities
  
  

* Own end-to-end Trust & Safety and Network Health programs from problem definition to execution and sustained outcomes
* Identify systemic risks and compliance gaps; design scalable solutions rather than one-off fixes
* Drive execution across multiple teams with competing priorities
* Set clear goals, milestones, and success metrics for complex initiatives
* Act as a thought partner to senior leadership on risk, safety, and long-term strategy
* Build simple, durable mechanisms to track progress and enforce standards
* Raise the bar on how programs are designed, reviewed, and communicated

A day in the life
  
  
**On a Typical Day, You Might**

* Deep dive into data to understand where risks are emerging and why
* Align with product, operations, legal, and analytics partners on priorities and trade-offs
* Challenge unclear plans and push for sharper problem statements and success metrics
* Review program progress, unblock teams, and escalate when needed
* Translate complex issues into clear updates for senior stakeholders
* Improve existing processes so teams spend less time reacting and more time preventing issues

Your internal stakeholders include operations leaders, product teams, analytics partners, and legal or policy counterparts.
  
  
**About The Team**
The Network Health (NH) and Trust & Safety (T&S) teams work together to protect Amazon’s Last Mile operations by driving compliance, partner accountability, and safety across the AMET region (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, and Turkey).
  
  
Network Health owns the end-to-end compliance and enforcement lifecycle for Delivery Service Partners (DSPs) — from risk identification and MEP (Monitoring & Enforcement Plan) management to exit governance and performance reviews. The team ensures that all DSPs operate safely, ethically, and in alignment with Amazon’s Supply Chain Standards and local labor regulations.
  
  
Trust & Safety complements this work by focusing on driver-level safety, identity verification, and incident resolution programs such as ID Check, APEA, and DAF, ensuring that both DSPs and drivers uphold Amazon’s zero-tolerance standards on compliance and worker welfare.
  
  
This role operates at the intersection of both functions, helping deliver secure, compliant, and sustainable operations in one of Amazon’s fastest-growing regions.
  
  
**Basic Qualifications**

* 5+ years of program or project management experience
* Experience using data and metrics to determine and drive improvements
* Experience owning program strategy, end to end delivery, and communicating results to senior leadership
* Knowledge of Excel at an intermediate level (e.g., pivot tables & charts, multiple criteria lookups, nested logical/IF formulas, data cleansing, array formulas, etc.)

**Preferred Qualifications**

* 2+ years of driving process improvements experience
* Master's degree, or MBA in business, operations, human resources, adult education, organizational development, instructional design or related field

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
  
  
  
**Company**
- Amazon Middle East and North Africa FZ-LLC
  
  
Job ID: A3176892

* Excellent written and verbal communication abilities

data.jd_text:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
Job Category
  
  
Customer Success
  
  
Job Details
  
  
**About Salesforce**
Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
  
  
Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
  
  
**About The Role**
We are looking for a dynamic and experienced
**Service Delivery Director**
to lead our professional services and customer success operations across the Middle East region. Based in the UAE (or KSA), this senior leadership role is responsible for driving delivery excellence, growing a high-performing team, and ensuring customers achieve measurable outcomes from their investments.
  
  
This is a unique opportunity to shape the future of service delivery across one of the world's most exciting and fast-growing technology markets.
  
  
What You'll Be Doing
  
  
Delivery Leadership
  
  

* Own end-to-end service delivery across the Middle East, ensuring projects are delivered on time, within scope, and to the highest quality standards
* Define and execute regional delivery strategy aligned with global frameworks and local market needs
* Establish and continuously improve delivery methodologies, governance models, and best practices
* Drive operational KPIs including CSAT, NPS, utilization, revenue, and margin

Customer & Stakeholder Engagement
  
  

* Build trusted, executive-level relationships with key customers and partners across the GCC and broader Middle East
* Act as an escalation point for complex delivery challenges, driving swift and effective resolution
* Partner with Sales and Pre-Sales to support business development, solution scoping, and proposal development
* Present delivery performance and strategic roadmaps to C-level stakeholders

Team & Talent Development
  
  

* Lead, mentor, and grow a diverse team of project managers, consultants, and delivery professionals
* Foster a culture of accountability, continuous learning, and customer obsession
* Drive talent acquisition, onboarding, and retention strategies for the region
* Partner with HR and global teams to develop career paths and succession plans

Business Growth
  
  

* Collaborate with Sales on go-to-market strategies and new business opportunities
* Identify and develop service offerings tailored to regional needs and customer segments
* Contribute to revenue targets through effective resource planning and delivery efficiency
* Support partner ecosystem development and enablement across the region

What We're Looking For
  
  
**Experience & Qualifications**

* 12+ years of experience in professional services, consulting, or technology delivery
* 5+ years in a senior leadership or director-level role managing regional delivery operations
* Proven track record of delivering large-scale, complex technology projects (CRM, ERP, SaaS, or cloud platforms)
* Experience operating in the Middle East market — GCC experience is strongly preferred
* Bachelor's degree required; MBA or relevant postgraduate qualification is a plus
* PMP, PRINCE2, or equivalent project/program management certification preferred
* Deep understanding of Middle East business culture, government sector dynamics, and enterprise buying behavior
* English fluent mandatory; Arabic language skills is a strong advantage
* Willingness to travel across the region as required (estimated 30–40%)
* Existing network of senior relationships across GCC enterprises and government entities is highly desirable

Skills & Competencies
  
  

* Exceptional leadership and people management skills with experience leading multicultural teams
* Strong executive presence with the ability to influence and engage at C-suite level
* Deep understanding of professional services business models (T&M, fixed-price, managed services)
* Excellent commercial acumen — P&L management, forecasting, and resource planning
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a data-driven mindset
* Outstanding communication, presentation, and negotiation skills

What Makes You Stand Out
  
  

* Experience in digital transformation programs at scale
* Familiarity with Salesforce, ServiceNow, SAP, Oracle, or similar enterprise platforms
* Track record of building delivery practices from the ground up in emerging or high-growth markets
* Passion for developing talent and creating inclusive, high-performing team cultures

Unleash Your Potential
  
  
When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
*be your best*
, and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
*do your best*
. Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
  
  
Accommodations
  
  
If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
  
  
Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
  
  
Posting Statement
  
  
Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

data.raw_snippet:

* prepare purchase requisitions for project consumables and carry out technical evaluation for offers received. Follow up with the concerned suppliers on the delivery of materia
data.jd_text:
**About this role:**

* Review and become familiar with the Project specification, drawings, and pre-award clarifications.
* prepare purchase requisitions for project consumables and carry out technical evaluation for offers received. Follow up with the concerned suppliers on the delivery of material.
* Prepare list of construction deliverables including construction procedures, engineering analysis and construction drawings. Follow up on the preparation, delivery, and approval of these documents.
* Review of engineering drawings to check feasibility from installation point of view.
* Prepare in liaison with the Project Manager the work schedule.
* Follow up with clients on the approval of all documents and drawings.
* Prepare mobilization plans for the various activities.
* Prepare work procedures and construction methodology for specific project scope of work.
* Coordinate the mobilization and demobilization of Subcontractors personnel and equipment.
* Monitor on daily basis work progress and resolve in liaison with the Project Manager all technical matters that may arise. Liaise with client on construction matters to resolve outstanding issues.
* Ensure that project material and consumables requirements are planned to enable timely mobilization.
* Assist is preparing scope of work for subcontractors.
* Assist project manager in responding to all correspondence from client and subcontractors.
* Ensure that all quality, HSE and ISM requirements are defined and communicated to all concerned for the implementation.
* Interaction with project team members on day-to-day basis.
* Interaction with all relevant sections/ departments on requirement basis.
* Interaction with the client, supplier, subcontractors, third parties on requirement basis for the assigned projects.
* Maintain a healthy & safe environment at the workplace.
* Follow the rules and regulations according to the company policy.

**Occupational and workplace Health and Safety responsibilities:**

In addition to all job-specific responsibilities, all employees are required to adhere to all Basatin health, safety and environmental (HSE) policies, procedures, practices, and relevant legal and statutory health, safety and environmental requirements and obligations. All employees are personally responsible to familiarize themselves with these policies, procedures, practices, updates, etc. Khidmah HSE department regularly updates existing and introduce new policies, procedures, and practices and each employee is personally responsible to ensure they stay updated and compliant with all such updates and new additions.

**Information Security responsibilities:**

* Comply with Basatin Information Security Policies
* Be aware of and fulfil their information security responsibilities
* Ensure whoever handles sensitive company information have taken the Security Awareness Training
* Know how to report a security incident (to IT ServiceDesk or InfoSec).
* Not Disable his/her OS firewall and/or Antivirus
* Restrict use to authorized purposes, Protect access accounts, privileges and associated passwords.
* Accept accountability of his/her individual user accounts, and maintain confidentiality

**Qualifications:**

Bachelor’s degree in engineering.

Min. 7 to 10 years’ experience in Landscaping project

Excellent time management skills.

Ability to problem-solve and use your initiative

data.jd_text:
**Description**
As a Program Manager for Seller Fees and incentives, you will work with Product and Program Managers and cross-functional business teams (Local and WW) to implement our monetization strategy and launch & operate various seller incentives and promotions across the UAE, KSA, Egypt, and Turkiye. The PM will drive execution and controllership of all seller promotions and incentives.
  
  
Key job responsibilities
  
  
As the central PM for MENATR fees and seller incentives , this role requires exceptional program management and data analysis skills, ability to conduct deep dive analyses, and strong stakeholder management skills. The candidate must thrive in a fast-paced environment, balancing multiple tasks while maintaining attention to detail and effective communication with diverse stakeholders. The candidate must have or will have to develop SQL proficiency and be able to build queries and dashboards for tracking performance of seller incentives.
  
  
**Basic Qualifications**

* Bachelor's degree in business, engineering, statistics, computer science, mathematics or related field
* Experience in Excel (macros, index, conditional list, arrays, pivots, lookups), or experience in building financial and operational reports/data sets that inform business decision-making
* Experience in program or project management

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience in stakeholder and communication management
* Experience with Excel, including use of complex formulas and pivot tables to manipulate large datasets and interpret results
* Experience in technical document writing using Visio, Word, Excel, or PowerPoint

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

- Q Tech General Trading LLC

data.title: Technical Project Manager, Payments Consulting
data.raw_snippet:
**Technical Project Manager, Payments**

Fime is a globally recognised international player providing deep expertise across digital payments, mobility services, and digital identity. We work with leading organisations worldwide to solve complex challenges, identify emerging opportunities, and future
data.jd_text:
**Technical Project Manager, Payments**

Fime is a globally recognised international player providing deep expertise across digital payments, mobility services, and digital identity. We work with leading organisations worldwide to solve complex challenges, identify emerging opportunities, and future-proof their strategies.

Our team of 900+ experts operates in over 20 locations around the globe, delivering solutions that support millions of transactions every day, across global markets. What sets us apart is our values: we are curious, creative, and highly collaborative, with a strong commitment to integrity - we do the right thing for our clients, our people, and our shareholders.

At Fime, the work is varied and intellectually stimulating. No two days are the same, and you will be surrounded by smart, engaged colleagues who value learning and continuous improvement.

**Move. Pay. Trust.**

**Where identity, money, and movement connect.**

**MISSION**

As a Technical Project Manager, Payments your mission is to successfully plan, execute, and deliver projects while ensuring adherence to scope, timeline, budget, and quality standards. You will lead project teams, manage resources and risks, and maintain effective communication with stakeholders (after identifying internal & external stakeholders). By applying Fime – Consult Hyperion project management framework (PM@CHyp) principles, you will oversee project execution, monitor progress, and address deviations promptly. Your goal is to achieve the project objectives, optimize resource utilization, and foster a positive team dynamic. Throughout the project lifecycle, you will proactively manage risks, ensure stakeholder engagement, and implement quality control measures. Ultimately, your mission is to drive the project successfully, promote continuous improvement, and deliver valuable outcomes that meet stakeholder expectations.

Projects scope includes delivering consultancy services and certification test platforms to the Payment, Smart Mobility and Digital Identity ecosystems stakeholders. Main customers are International and Domestic Payment Schemes, Payment Service Providers, Financial Institutions, Transport Authorities, Digital Identity Service Provider.

**ACTIVITIES**

* **Project Planning**
  : Collaborate with stakeholders to define project goals, objectives, scope, and deliverables. Develop a comprehensive project plan, including task breakdown, timeline, resource allocation, and risk management strategies.
* **Team Management**
  : Assemble and lead project teams, assign activities, provide guidance, and foster collaboration. Ensure effective communication, resolve conflicts, and motivate team members to achieve project objectives.
* **Project Execution**
  : Oversee the execution of project activities, ensuring that tasks are completed as per the defined plan. Monitor progress, track milestones, and manage any deviations or issues that arise during project implementation.
* **Scope and Change Management**
  : Manage project scope by defining and controlling project boundaries. Evaluate change requests, assess their impact, and implement changes while maintaining project objectives and minimizing scope creep.
* **Stakeholder Management**
  : Engage with project stakeholders, including clients, sponsors, and team members. Maintain regular communication, manage expectations, and address stakeholder needs and concerns throughout the project lifecycle.
* **Risk Management**
  : Identify, assess, and manage project risks. Develop risk mitigation and contingency plans to minimize the impact of potential risks on project outcomes. Monitor risks and take proactive measures to address them.
* **Quality Assurance**
  : Establish quality control processes to ensure that project deliverables meet defined standards and stakeholder expectations. Conduct regular reviews, inspections, and testing to maintain high-quality outcomes.
* **Resource Management**
  : Optimize resource allocation to ensure efficient utilization of project resources, including personnel, equipment, and materials. Monitor resource availability, adjust as needed, and manage dependencies.
* **Communication and Reporting**
  : Maintain effective communication channels with stakeholders, providing regular project updates, progress reports, and key milestone achievements. Foster transparent and timely communication to ensure project transparency.
* **Project Closure:**
  Facilitate proper project closure by conducting post-project evaluations, capturing lessons learned, and documenting project outcomes. Ensure the orderly handover of deliverables and transition of project responsibilities.

**JOB EXPERIENCE**

* At least 7 years’ experience in project management roles, with proven track record of managing complex projects or portfolios
* Proven experience within Payment Schemes, Issuing, Acquiring and Payment Service Providers technical environments and standards. Experience across Fare Collection and Ticketing systems is a welcome advantage

**KNOWLEDGE & SKILLS**

* Master’s degree or equivalent in a relevant field
* Project management certification is a plus (PMP or equivalent)
* Proficiency in project management software/tools
* Customer oriented attitude and good interpersonal and presentation skills
* Outstanding leadership and communication skills
* Strategic thinking and decision-making abilities
* Strong analytical skills, Self-motivated committed and team player
* Advanced risk management and mitigation skills
* Strong negotiation and conflict resolution skills
* Ability to work effectively in cross-functional teams
* Fluency in English

**Contract:**
Permanent

**Starting at the latest:**
ASAP

**Location**
: Dubai, UAE

data.title: Director of Company Operations
data.raw_snippet:
**Who we are:**

Stake is the MENA region’s leading real estate fintech company, combining real estate expertise and innovative financial technology to deliver products that empower everyone to own and build wealth through Real Estate. Launched in 2021 we have grown rapidly, leveraging decades of ex
data.jd_text:
**Who we are:**

Stake is the MENA region’s leading real estate fintech company, combining real estate expertise and innovative financial technology to deliver products that empower everyone to own and build wealth through Real Estate. Launched in 2021 we have grown rapidly, leveraging decades of experience in technology, financial services and global real estate, to launch the MENA region’s first mobile app for fractional real estate investing.

This is just the beginning and we’re currently searching for highly talented individuals to join and help lead our expansion into international markets and new business lines.

The Leadership Team

At the helm of our startup is a dynamic leadership team. Each member brings a unique blend of expertise and passion, from strategic masterminds to creative trailblazers.

We are looking for a Director of Company Operations who will own and scale Stake’s end-to-end operating platform, driving operational excellence across all properties and business lines. This is a highly strategic and execution-focused role.

The Director of Company Operations will act as a central integrator across the business, ensuring strong coordination between departments, translating strategy into actionable plans, and driving consistent delivery. They will also ensure that new products, verticals, and jurisdictions are operationally ready ahead of launch.

🚀
**What you’ll do:**

Reporting directly to the Co-Founders, the Director of Company Operations will be a core member of the executive leadership team, responsible for building high-performing operational teams, establishing scalable systems and governance, and embedding the processes, controls, and culture necessary for sustainable, multi-jurisdictional growth. This role combines hands-on operational oversight with strategic influence, bridging the gap between vision and day-to-day execution while driving efficiency, performance, and investor trust.

**Operational Leadership & Executive Ownership:**

* Own the full property lifecycle from acquisition to exit across all investment structures
* Oversee and integrate our Business Operations, Property Management, Transactions, and Fix N’ Flip functions in the UAE
* Define and evolve the organisational structure to support scale, multi-vertical growth, and operational efficiency
* Set execution standards, service levels, and operational performance benchmarks across all teams
* Drive transaction efficiency while maintaining strong governance, financial controls, and risk management standards
* Act as the final escalation point for material operational, transactional, or delivery risks
* Maintain high levels of investor trust through operational reliability and transparency

**Cross-Functional Strategy Execution:**

* Lead company-wide initiatives requiring coordination across Operations, Finance, Compliance, Sales, Product and Marketing
* Translate strategic priorities into structured operational roadmaps with clear ownership and accountability across departments
* Ensure operational readiness for new verticals, product launches, regulatory implementations, and geographic expansion

**Systems, Data & Scalability:**

* Institutionalise scalable systems, automation, and reporting frameworks
* Ensure data integrity and a single source of truth across transactions, portfolio performance, and investor operations
* Define clear operational KPIs with executive-level visibility
* Leverage operational data to generate actionable insights for decision-making and portfolio optimisation
* Drive adoption of new systems and processes across teams, embedding best practices and ensuring operational consistency

**Risk, Governance & Controls:**

* Embed strong internal controls across transaction flows, asset management, and capital deployment
* Maintain operational integrity across regulated and multi-jurisdiction environments
* Develop proactive risk monitoring frameworks to identify operational, transactional, and vendor risks early
* Lead incident management and business continuity planning to minimise operational disruption
* Ensure auditability and regulatory alignment across operational processes

**Leadership & Organisational Development**

* Build and lead high-performing operational teams
* Implement clear accountability frameworks and performance metrics
* Foster a culture of ownership, accountability, operational discipline and continuous improvement across teams
* Lead organisational change initiatives that embed scalability, adaptability, and a growth mindset
* Translate strategic priorities into team-level objectives to ensure clarity, accountability, and execution focus

**👀 What we’re looking for:**

* 8+ years of experience leading complex, cross-functional operations within a high-growth, regulated environment. Experience may include top-tier consulting, corporate strategy, and ideally senior operating roles in scaling startups
* Strong understanding of real estate transactions and asset lifecycle management is beneficial
* Proven experience managing complex, multi-team operational environments at scale
* Demonstrated ability to lead cross-functional initiatives and translate strategy into operational execution
* Strong financial and commercial acumen
* Systems-oriented, data-driven operator who leverages analytics to optimise operational performance
* Proven track record leading operational transformation and scaling processes

**😇 Why you should join Stake:**

* Hybrid work environment
* Work directly with senior leadership in one of the region’s fastest growing start-ups; you will get exposure to all functions at Stake and have the chance to learn from the very best in the space!
* Generous equity compensation; this aims to bring a high degree of ownership into your work. As Stake grows, you grow with it!
* Budget for learning and development; we want Stakers to constantly strive for personal and professional growth
* Best in class end of service savings scheme; through DIFC-sponsored DEWS programme
* Off-sites and regular team events

Stake has a high performance culture where the bar is always rising. We bring on brilliant, ambitious and curious people who see the value in Stake and want to grow with us.
