data.jd_text:
**Overview**
As a
**Senior Project Manage**
r at Linesight, you will work with highly experienced, culturally diverse, and passionate teams nurturing a strong social dynamic and a shared sense of achievement. You will gain vast industry experience that will open doors for you, extend your skillset and expand your perspective. We will empower, support, and enable you to take real responsibility in your role so that you can take charge of your career progression with us. You will be mentored and supported by industry leaders and given the tools to grow. You will also be involved in and contribute to our business strategy as we continue to evolve. For us lasting trusted relationships are everything, both with our teams and our clients.
  
  
**The Opportunity**
**In this role you will:**

* Be a visible leader onsite, assessing progress and ensuring safe work practices
* Coordinate with the client team, consultant team and the contractor on all snagging activities, including the schedule and partner engagement
* Identify issues proactively and work with the team to resolve effectively
* Implement and monitor key project processes, partnering with the client to make improvements and revisions
* Lead and attend key meetings to monitor progress, actively collaborate on solving problems and communicate impacts to partners
* Implement project procedures and use reasonable endeavours to ensure that this procedure is always observed

**We would love to hear from you if you:**

* Have experience project managing ideally from a consultant environment in the Middle East on a data centre project
* Have a project management professional certification or are seeking one . We can help
* Have a degree or comparable experience in a project management or construction discipline
* Are detail oriented and quality focused
* Are an excellent communicator verbally and in writing
* Thrive on building strong relationships with your team and clients through a shared purpose and sense of openness and fun

All interviews are conducted either in person or virtually with video required.
  
  
**About Us**
Linesight is a highly successful global project and cost management consultancy that keeps clients coming back. And for that we have our people to thank. You see we’re not like the others. We’re different. Unique. It’s our fresh thinking and focus on what matters that has led to our evolving. We are on a journey working in some of the most exciting innovative sectors with some of the world’s most prestigious companies delivering major projects that deliver a more sustainable built environment. We have an open culture and a flat structure where you can expect to be treated with genuine care, respect, and empathy. With Linesight, you can truly discover the power of team!
  
  
Diversity, inclusion and accessibility
  
  
Linesight is committed to transparent, equal opportunity employment practices. We are building a diverse and inclusive organisation, accessible to all, based on having a safe culture which enables all our people to be their true selves. We are a people business, and we understand that the more inclusive we are, the happier our people and better our work will be. We will ensure that individuals with disability are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the application or recruitment process and are accommodated in the workplace. If you require assistance or accommodation of any kind, please mention this in your application, we would love to hear from you!

* Experience of the full project life cycle.
* Contract lifecycle management system implementations.
* The ability to work under pressure and to tight timescales.
* The ability to own implementation projects through its entire lifecycle

This is an exciting role that offers a competitive salary and plenty of opportunity to progress.

data.raw_snippet:
**Operations Director – AI Infrastructure**

**Location:**
Dubai, United Arab Emirates

Senior Leadership

**Role Overview**

We are partnering with a fast‑growing AI infrastructure company to appoint an experienced
**Operations Dire
data.jd_text:
**Operations Director – AI Infrastructure**

**Location:**
Dubai, United Arab Emirates

**Industry:**
Data Center & AI Infrastructure

**Reporting Line:**
Senior Leadership

**Role Overview**

We are partnering with a fast‑growing AI infrastructure company to appoint an experienced
**Operations Director**
to lead the
**execution, governance, and operational control**
of large‑scale AI and data center infrastructure initiatives across the UAE.

This critical leadership role is responsible for ensuring
**seamless project delivery, regulatory compliance, and audit readiness**
, while managing complex vendor ecosystems and government relationships. The successful candidate will serve as the operational backbone of the organization as it scales
**sovereign AI computing capabilities**
in the region.

**Key Responsibilities**

**1. Infrastructure Project Execution & Vendor Management**

* Lead the end‑to‑end coordination of external partners, including data center design consultants, construction firms, IT vendors, and local utility providers.
* Ensure all infrastructure projects are delivered
  **on time, within scope, and to required technical and quality standards**
  .
* Act as the primary escalation point for vendor performance, schedule risks, and delivery issues.

**2. Documentation Control & KYC / Audit Readiness**

* Establish and maintain a
  **centralized document control framework**
  covering all infrastructure and corporate operations.
* Ensure systematic archiving of engineering contracts, government approvals, licenses, leases, and financial records.
* Maintain continuous readiness for
  **KYC, compliance audits, and due‑diligence reviews**
  conducted by global banks, institutional investors, and sovereign wealth funds.
* Enforce strict documentation discipline across all operational activities.

**3. Entity Compliance & Government Relations**

* Serve as the
  **primary custodian of UAE entity compliance**
  , managing interactions with Free Zones, municipal authorities, and regulatory bodies.
* Ensure all corporate licenses, permits, certifications, and land approvals remain valid and compliant at all times.
* Oversee local PRO services to manage visas, labor documentation, and administrative requirements for employees and expatriate executives.
* Proactively manage regulatory risks and compliance timelines.

**4. Administrative & Executive Logistics Oversight**

* Provide high‑standard logistical and administrative support for visiting board members, global investors, and senior government stakeholders.
* Manage executive travel, accommodation, transportation, and meeting arrangements in line with professional and diplomatic standards.
* Support senior leadership with operational readiness for high‑visibility engagements.

**Candidate Requirements**

**Experience**

* **7–10 years**
  of UAE‑based experience in a senior operations role such as
  **Operations Director, Senior Project Manager, or PMO Lead**
  .
* Background in large enterprises, multinational technology companies, or
  **heavy/mission‑critical infrastructure sectors**
  .
* Proven experience supporting
  **data center (IDC) projects**
  or complex, regulated infrastructure environments is highly preferred.

**Core Competencies**

* Strong execution mindset with the ability to translate plans into tangible results within complex vendor and regulatory ecosystems.
* Deep understanding of
  **contract management, documentation standards, compliance, and KYC requirements**
  .
* Proven ability to operate effectively within UAE regulatory frameworks and bureaucratic environments.
* Confident, authoritative leadership style capable of holding external contractors and service providers accountable.
* Excellent problem‑solving skills and sound judgment under pressure.

**Language Requirements**

* Native‑level fluency in
  **English**
  (spoken and written) for business communication and negotiation.
* **Arabic fluency**
  is highly advantageous.

In a world of possibilities, pursue one with endless opportunities. Imagine Next!
  
  
At Parsons, you can imagine a career where you thrive, work with exceptional people, and be yourself. Guided by our leadership vision of valuing people, embracing agility, and fostering growth, we cultivate an innovative culture that empowers you to achieve your full potential. Unleash your talent and redefine what’s possible.
  
  
**Job Description**
**Assistant Project Manager (UAE National)**
**Dubai, UAE**
Parsons is looking for an amazingly talented
**Assistant Project Manager (UAE National)**
to join our team! In this role you will get to join our team of innovators! At Parsons Corporation, we're looking for an amazingly talented Assistant Project Manager to help us change the world. This is an opportunity to be part of a company that values your skills, encourages innovation, and believes in the power of collaboration..
  
  
**What You'll Be Doing**

* Manage and Control Project Communications: You'll be the central hub of information, ensuring clear and effective communication across all project stakeholders.
* Coordinate and Control Deliverables: You'll ensure that all project deliverables are completed on time and meet the highest quality standards.
* Projects' Quality Management: You'll oversee the quality of all project aspects, ensuring that we meet and exceed the expectations of our clients.
* Projects' Reporting: You'll be responsible for regular project reports, keeping everyone informed about the project's progress.
* Stakeholder Management: You'll work closely with all project stakeholders, ensuring their needs and expectations are met.
* Guidance: You'll provide guidance to the team working on the same project, fostering a collaborative and productive work environment.

**What Required Skills You'll Bring**

* Education: Bachelors degree in Business Administration or Engineering or Technology, in such areas as Civil, Electrical, or Mechanical.
* Experience: Fresh graduates with some internship experience are welcome to apply. More experienced candidates are also invited.
* Technical Skills: Working knowledge of AutoCAD and other PC software packages typically associated with engineering is required.
* Project Experience: Experience working on Infrastructure related projects is a plus.
* Must be UAE national.

Parsons equally employs representation at all job levels no matter the race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy), national origin, age, disability or genetic information.
  
  
We truly invest and care about our employee’s wellbeing and provide endless growth opportunities as the sky is the limit, so aim for the stars! Imagine next and join the Parsons quest—APPLY TODAY!
  
  
Parsons is aware of fraudulent recruitment practices. To learn more about recruitment fraud and how to report it, please refer to https://www.parsons.com/fraudulent-recruitment/.

data.title: MCA Operational Performance Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Minimum Required Qualifications**
**Education:**
Bachelor’s degree in engineering or a related technical discipline (Master’s preferred).
  
  
**Technical Knowledge**

* Experience in testing, inspection, certification activities is a plus
* Practical experience of lean methods, 5S, standardized
data.jd_text:
**Minimum Required Qualifications**
**Education:**
Bachelor’s degree in engineering or a related technical discipline (Master’s preferred).
  
  
**Technical Knowledge**

* Experience in testing, inspection, certification activities is a plus
* Practical experience of lean methods, 5S, standardized work, problem solving, VSM, Kaizen, Hoshin Kanri with evidence of real sustainable financial and behavioral results
* Project management certificate or experience
* Advanced Office 365 skills

**Experience**
10+ years professional work experience, preferably in the testing, inspection, certification activities
  
  
**Role Purpose**
The Performance Manager drives business profitability across the Middle East, Caspian & Africa (MCA) region by deploying strategic process improvement initiatives and digital transformation programs. Leading a team of Area Performance Directors and support staff, this role executes modernization of operations, optimizes workflows, and establishes a culture of operational excellence that enhances client experience and Bureau Veritas' efficiency.
  
  
**Responsibilities**
**Strategic Performance & Profitability Leadership**

* Establish annual profitability targets for MCA countries and deploy prioritized process improvement projects to achieve group-level performance goals
* Partner with underperforming business units to diagnose operational challenges and implement corrective actions
* Monitor LEAP 28 TIQ and Performance indicators to track progress and drive sustained improvement

**Digital Transformation & Field Operations Modernization**

* Lead strategic deployment of digital systems to modernize and optimize field operations and workflows across the region
* Drive digitization of harmonized processes in partnership with the Digital Transformation (DxT) team
* Deploy Tableau digital cockpits and comprehensive TIQ/Performance KPI visualization tools
* Establish governance frameworks with HR, M&S, Finance, DxT, HSSE, and P&L leaders to optimize digital system adoption

**Process Improvement Program Execution**

* Establish and monitor process improvement projects across regions, areas, and countries
* Review operational and administrative processes using lean methodologies to eliminate waste and streamline workflows
* Identify alternatives (shared services centers, resource transfers, etc.) to optimize production capacity
* Harmonize and replicate best-practice processes across MCA for consistency and scalability
* Ensure end-to-end process traceability from opportunity identification through cash collection

**Change Leadership & Organizational Adoption**

* Direct Area Performance Directors and support team in executing improvement initiatives and monitoring adoption
* Drive alignment through clear communications on process changes and performance expectations
* Embed operational excellence as a day-to-day practice and champion continuous improvement

  as an Operations Director, Senior Project Manager, or PMO Lead within large enterprises, multinational tech firms, or heavy infrastructure sectors.
* Proven experience with
  **data center (IDC) build-outs**
  or complex local supply chain management is highly preferred.
* Strong execution mindset with the ability to take established plans and deliver results within complex local vendor networks and bureaucratic environments.
* Deep understanding of documentation standards, contract management, and
  **KYC/compliance**
  requirements in high-finance and heavy infrastructure projects — “if it is not documented, it did not happen.”
* Commanding professional presence with excellent problem-solving skills; able to hold external contractors accountable while navigating the unique operational challenges of the Middle East.
* **Language:**
  Native-level fluency in English (both spoken and written) for business communication and negotiation. Fluency in Arabic is considered a significant advantage.

**What’s on Offer:**

This is a critical leadership role within a high-profile AI infrastructure initiative in the UAE. You will play a pivotal part in ensuring operational excellence, regulatory compliance, and smooth execution as the company scales its sovereign AI computing capabilities in the region. The role reports directly to senior leadership.

If you are an experienced operations professional with strong UAE market knowledge, exceptional attention to detail, and a proven ability to manage complex infrastructure projects and compliance matters, we would like to hear from you.

data.title: Technical Program Manager, AMET 3PL and Direct Imports
data.raw_snippet:
**Description**
As a PM on the Supply Chain Automation team, you'll design and build full-stack applications and data-intensive systems that power critical supply chain decisions. You'll work with massive datasets, develop and implement science-based artifacts capable to impact broader supply chain,
data.jd_text:
**Description**
As a PM on the Supply Chain Automation team, you'll design and build full-stack applications and data-intensive systems that power critical supply chain decisions. You'll work with massive datasets, develop and implement science-based artifacts capable to impact broader supply chain, and create intuitive interfaces that enable our operations teams to work smarter and faster.
  
  
Key job responsibilities
  
  
Design, develop, and deploy full-stack applications for supply chain optimization and automation
  
  
Build scalable backend services using modern technologies (Java, Python, Node.js, etc.) on AWS infrastructure
  
  
Develop responsive, performant frontend applications using React, JavaScript/TypeScript, Redux, and modern web technologies
  
  
Architect and implement data pipelines leveraging our lakehouse architecture with Apache Iceberg
  
  
Work with large-scale data systems including Amazon Redshift, S3, and EMR
  
  
Perform data mining and analysis to uncover insights that drive supply chain improvements
  
  
Develop and support scientific solutions that are exemplary in terms of design, clarity, extensibility, and the ability to evolve over time
  
  
Innovate with the latest technology to build highly automated solutions for efficient forecasting and supply chain automation
  
  
Design, develop and deploy end-to-end machine learning solutions in the Amazon production environment to improvise the current supply chain through forecasting
  
  
Own the full software development lifecycle from design to deployment and operations
  
  
Participate in code reviews, design discussions, and contribute to technical strategy
  
  
**About The Team**
Join Amazon's Supply Chain Automation team, chartered with building the next generation of automation and optimization systems from the ground up. Our mission is to transform supply chain operations through intelligent automation, reducing manual effort while increasing speed, accuracy, and efficiency across Amazon's fulfillment network.
  
  
**Basic Qualifications**

* 3+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 2+ years of software development experience
* 3+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules
* Bachelor's degree in engineering, computer science or equivalent
* Experience programming with at least one modern language such as Python, Ruby, Golang, Java, C++, C#, Rust
* Experience designing rich user interfaces using modern web frameworks (such as React, Angular, and Vue)
* Knowledge of object-oriented design, data structures, and algorithms
* Experience with modeling tools such as R, scikit-learn, Spark MLLib, MxNet, Tensorflow, numpy, scipy etc.
* Experience with scripting language (e.g., Python, Java, or R)
* Experience effectively gathering information from multiple data sources
* Experience architecting/operating solutions built on AWS

**Preferred Qualifications**

* 3+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
  
  
  
**Company**
- Amazon Middle East and North Africa FZ-LLC

data.jd_text:
**Description**
If you are a supply chain professional with a passion to innovate and contribute in a fast paced growing environment- you might be a good fit to join Ultra Fast grocery (UFG) Supply chain team as an S&OP Manager . The S&OP program manager acts as a bridge between business and operations teams and is responsible for seamless business planning and execution during peak and off peak periods while maximizing customer/seller experience. This role involves driving critical decisions with cross functional teams and senior leadership and demands strong program management skills along-with an ability to drive data driven discussions. The candidate is expected to have exceptional analytical, planning and written/verbal communication skills along with preferred experience in Forecasting, Sales & Operations Planning and Inventory management.
  
  
Key job responsibilities
  
  

* Set up robust processes to improve forecasting accuracy with an objective to minimize cost and maximize customer/seller experience
* Support the business growth in constrained environments with Frugal and innovative solutions
* Make the existing processes scalable by identifying and implementing available tools/automation
* Rollout best practices from other geographies/ companies to minimize end to end supply chain losses
* Utilize exceptional problem-solving and communication skills to influence business, operations and technical audiences
* Program manage and drive decision making across cross functional teams and senior leadership

**Basic Qualifications**

* 3+ years of program or project management experience
* 3+ years of working cross functionally with tech and non-tech teams experience
* 3+ years of defining and implementing process improvement initiatives using data and metrics experience
* Bachelor's degree
* Knowledge of Excel (Pivot Tables, VLookUps) at an advanced level and SQL
* Experience defining program requirements and using data and metrics to determine improvements

**Preferred Qualifications**

* 3+ years of driving end to end delivery, and communicating results to senior leadership experience
* 3+ years of driving process improvements experience
* Experience in stakeholder management, dealing with multiple stakeholders at varied levels of the organization
* Experience building processes, project management, and schedules

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. data.title: Manager - Project Finance
data.raw_snippet:
**Manager – Project Finance**

We are seeking a highly analytical and commercially driven
**Manager / Senior Manager – Project Finance**
to join our Business Development team. This role will play a key part in executing and structuring large-scale infrastructure and development transactions, includi
data.jd_text:
**Manager – Project Finance**

We are seeking a highly analytical and commercially driven
**Manager / Senior Manager – Project Finance**
to join our Business Development team. This role will play a key part in executing and structuring large-scale infrastructure and development transactions, including greenfield and brownfield projects, refinancings, acquisitions, divestments, and stake sales.

**Candidate Background:**

We are particularly interested in professionals with experience in:

* Project Finance teams within Developers
* Investment Banking (M&A and/or fundraising experience)
* Financial Advisory firms advising on project finance transactions
* Investments
* Private Equity

Candidates must demonstrate strong analytical capabilities, superior communication skills, and above-average exposure to investment transactions.

**Key Responsibilities:**

**Transaction Execution & Financial Leadership**

* Build, audit, maintain and supervise the development of complex financial models for large infrastructure projects.
* Lead financial modelling workstreams across greenfield and brownfield developments, refinancings, acquisitions, divestments and stake sales.
* Ensure models comply with project agreements, financing documents, accounting and tax regulations across jurisdictions.
* Conduct financial analysis, optimization and business valuation to support business development and bid teams.
* Prepare investment memoranda, internal approvals documentation, and Board-level presentations.
* Support economic analysis and financial structuring optimization for existing assets (including impairment tests and performance reviews).

**Fundraising & Financial Structuring**

* Lead and support fundraising activities, including structuring and negotiations with banks, export credit agencies and financial institutions.
* Develop and maintain strong relationships with financial institutions across assigned geographies.
* Coordinate due diligence, tax, accounting and modelling workstreams with internal teams and external advisors.

**Team Leadership & Governance**

* Work closely with Transaction Managers (Executive Manager / Director) in project execution.
* Coordinate with Business Development, Legal, Technical, Finance and external stakeholders to ensure timely transaction delivery.
* Provide financial advisory guidance to subsidiaries and support Board/Audit Committee requirements.
* Train and oversee Managers (M1) and interns within the team.

**Qualifications & Experience:**

**Education:**

* Bachelor’s Degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, Mathematics, Engineering or related field.
* MBA, CA, CFA or other relevant postgraduate qualifications preferred.

**Experience:**

* 6 + years of relevant experience specifically in project finance within developers, banks, financial institutions, advisory firms or consultancies.
* Proven track record in building and managing advanced financial models.
* Strong exposure to project finance structuring, M&A and/or fundraising.
* Strong negotiation skills with investors and lenders.
* Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple workstreams simultaneously.
* Exceptional financial modelling and analytical skills
* Strong commercial acumen
* Clear, confident communicator with stakeholder management ability
* High ownership mindset and ability to lead transaction workstreams
* Exceptional attention to detail with strong governance awareness

data.title: Principal Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Who are we?**
At Finastra, we are a dynamic global provider of open finance software solutions, dedicated to expanding access to financial services. Our innovative applications span Lending, Payments, Treasury and Capital Markets, and Universal Banking. Proudly serving over 8,000 customers, includ
data.jd_text:
**Who are we?**
At Finastra, we are a dynamic global provider of open finance software solutions, dedicated to expanding access to financial services. Our innovative applications span Lending, Payments, Treasury and Capital Markets, and Universal Banking. Proudly serving over 8,000 customers, including 45 of the world's top 50 banks, we aim to boost financial inclusion for all. Join us and be part of a vibrant company that embraces diverse perspectives, and is committed to doing well by doing good.
  
  
**What will you contribute?**
**The Presales and Project Management Principal**
is responsible for ensuring that all projects within the portfolio are delivered on time, within the client's budget, and meet or exceed financial targets, including baseline margins. This role defines project objectives and oversees quality assurance throughout the project lifecycle. A key aspect of the role is to consistently foster strong client relationships and uphold Finastra’s reputation for excellence. Additionally, the Principal ensures that all presales proposals are submitted punctually and are aligned with budget expectations in coordination with Sales and the Client.
  
  
**Principal Project Manager**
is responsible for managing all aspects of Large to moderately complex projects for a defined segment of strategic initiatives from project definition and intake to transition to full operational support.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**
Your deliverables as a
**Principal Project Manager**
will include, but are not limited to, the following
  
  

* Leads and drives the development of the project intake process including developing scope, schedule and cost
* Defines the goals and objectives of specific project and defines individual team member’s roles and responsibilities for the duration of the project
* Manages multiple mid to large scale projects ensuring that they will complete on time and within budget and that the solution aligns with/meets the business objective
* Manages the daily/weekly project team assignments and monitors progress against the work plan to assure that objectives are met within the prescribed time, cost, and quality measures
* Identification and impact analysis of potential project changes and facilitation of change control board to approve or disapprove said changes.
* Meets financial objectives by forecasting requirements; preparing a project budget; scheduling expenditures analyzing variances; initiating corrective actions
* Continual identification, qualification and tracking of risks, defining mitigation and contingency plans, assigning appropriate resources, and constantly communicating status
* Responsible for identification of resource requirements and proper communication of those requirements in a timely manner to ensure the project is properly staffed with the skilled resources required
* Responsible for identifying internal and external stakeholders, understanding their communication requirements and fulfilling those requirements

**Requirements And Qualifications**

* 15+ years of end-to-end Project Management experience
* Fluent in Arabic; native-level proficiency is highly preferred
* Experience must be with customer-facing projects and not internal to the organization
* Experience assisting project management teams with identification of action items, tasks and activities and tracking progress
* Experience at defining, implementing and continually improving standards, processes and procedures utilizing industry best practice (PMI, CMMI, etc.)
* Experience developing project budgets based on the development of Work Breakdown Structure (WBS)

**Benefits**
We are proud to offer a range of incentives to our employees worldwide. These benefits are available to everyone, regardless of grade, and reflect the values we uphold:
  
  

* Flexibility: Enjoy unlimited vacation, based on your location and business priorities. Hybrid working arrangements, and inclusive policies such as paid time off for voting, bereavement, and sick leave.
* Well-being: Access Confidential one-on-one therapy through our Employee Assistance Program, find support from our network of Wellbeing Champions and Gather Groups, and a calendar of monthly events and initiatives designed to help you thrive - Inside and Outside of work.
* Medical, life & disability insurance, retirement plan, lifestyle and other benefits\*
* ESG: Benefit from paid time off for volunteering and donation matching.
* DEI: Participate in multiple DE&I groups for open involvement (e.g., Count Me In, Culture@Finastra, Proud@Finastra, Disabilities@Finastra, Women@Finastra).
* Career Development: Access online learning and accredited courses through our Skills & Career Navigator tool.
* Recognition: Be part of our global recognition program, Finastra Celebrates, and contribute to regular employee surveys to help shape Finastra and foster a culture where everyone is engaged and empowered to perform at their best.
* Specific benefits may vary by location.

At Finastra, each individual is unique, bringing their own ideas, thoughts, cultural beliefs, backgrounds, and experiences together. We learn from one another, embrace and celebrate our differences, and create an environment where everyone feels safe to be themselves.
  
  
Be unique, be exceptional, and help us make a difference at Finastra!

Commercial Sales & Project Manager- Dubai, UAE
  
  
We know that a business only thrives if our people are thriving. That’s why we always put our people first. Our global and diverse team would be happy to support you and challenge you to grow in many ways. Who knows where our joint journey will ta
data.jd_text:
Commercial Sales & Project Manager- Dubai, UAE
  
  
We know that a business only thrives if our people are thriving. That’s why we always put our people first. Our global and diverse team would be happy to support you and challenge you to grow in many ways. Who knows where our joint journey will take you?
  
  
Join Siemens Advanta as the Commercial Business and Project manager and help us re-imagine the world by finding solutions and making the world a more inquisitive place for tomorrow
  
  
**You’ll make a difference by-**
**As Commercial Bid Management:**
**Lead the end-to-end commercial bid process for complex professional service, software, and solution projects.**
This includes:
  
  

* Analyzing customer requirements, contractual terms, and financial conditions (including those from consortium partners and major subcontractors) to ensure alignment with Siemens Advanta's commercial strategy.
* Developing commercially sound bid proposals, articulating the value proposition, pricing strategy, and risk mitigation plans.
* Coordinating all commercial aspects of bids with internal stakeholders (legal, finance, technical, delivery) and external partners, ensuring comprehensive and compliant submissions.
* Conducting thorough commercial risk assessments and creditworthiness checks for all key external stakeholders, particularly direct customers and partners.
* Preparing and presenting robust commercial justifications and bid proposals to all relevant management levels (headquarter, regional, and local) for internal approval (LoA).
* Driving the negotiation of commercial terms and conditions

**Expert Commercial Project Management:**

* Oversee the commercial integrity and financial performance of projects from award through to close-out.
* Be responsible for the accuracy of overall project financial books and records, governance, and managing day-to-day commercial project operations. This includes creating bookings, setting up project structure, contractual setup, budgeting, monitoring project financial status based on planned delivery schedule in local SAP systems, purchase processes, documentation, project reviews, controlling, and forecasting.
* Ensure strict compliance with Siemens FRG and local GAAP requirements, tax regulations, export control regulations, hedging/currency regulations, performance guarantees, cash and claim management, and insurances.
* Proactively manage commercial risks, change orders, and claims throughout the project lifecycle to protect profitability.
* Prepare and update project actuals, analysis, and forecasts according to project progress and contractual terms
* Support internal & external project audits as required

**Cross-Functional Collaboration:**

* Work seamlessly with internal teams including solution architects, delivery, legal, and finance to ensure a cohesive approach to customer solutions and project execution.
* Share market intelligence and commercial best practices to continuously enhance our strategies and offerings.

**What You'll Bring:**- Education: Bachelor's degree in Economics, Finance, Business Administration, or a related commercial field. An MBA or relevant Master's degree is a significant advantage.
- Experience:

* Minimum of 5 years of progressive and successful experience in sales and commercial project management roles, with a proven track record of complex projects within the Middle East market, specifically in professional services, software, or complex solution projects.
* Prior commercial experience in a project-driven environment, preferably in commercial sales positions, is essential.
* Strong experience in project accounting (Completed Contract / Percentage of Completion) and Siemens FRGs.
* Certificate as CPM-C according to PM@Siemens (or equivalent for external applicants) is highly preferred.
* Skills & Competencies:
* Exceptional commercial acumen, strategic negotiation prowess, and persuasive communication skills tailored for complex solution sales.
* Deep understanding of commercial models for software licensing, professional services, and managed services.
* Proficiency in CRM software (e.g., Salesforce) and Microsoft Office Suite.
* Proficiency in SAP ERP system for commercial project management is highly desirable.
* Ability to systematically work through complex topics and a highly engaged, performance-driven personality.
* Strong process knowledge, structured work approach, and excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
* Strong interpersonal skills and ability to work cross-functionally and internationally between departments.
* Fluency in English is essential; Arabic language skills are a significant advantage.

We offer you
  
  

* 2 to 3 days of mobile working per week as a global standard.
* Diverse and inclusive culture.
* An environment where everyone can bring their whole self and feel a sense of belonging.
* the foundation to develop personally and expertly.
* Great variety of learning & development opportunities

Create a better #TomorrowWithUs!
  
  
If you are a motivated teammate, eager to learn new things and looking to grow your career in a strong and froward-thinking company, hit apply!. Siemens is dedicated to quality, equality, and valuing diversity, and we encourage applications that reflect the diversity of the communities within which we work. Siemens is an equal opportunities employer and do not discriminate unlawfully on any grounds. We are committed to providing access, equal opportunity and reasonable accommodation for individuals with disabilities in employment, its services, programs, and activities.
  
  
At Siemens, we are always challenging ourselves to build a better future. We need the most innovative and diverse Digital Minds to develop tomorrow ‘s reality. Find out more about the Digital world of Siemens here: www.siemens.com/careers/digitalminds
  
  
Please note: Only complete applications can be considered in the selection process.

data.title: Project Manager - ONESOURCE
data.raw_snippet:
**Project Manager – ONESOURCE**
**Thomson Reuters**
is a leading provider of transaction tax management solutions to companies of all sizes, enabling Finance, Tax and IT professionals to achieve accurate, timely and cost-effective compliance. Our flagship offering, the Thomson Reuters Application Su
data.jd_text:
**Project Manager – ONESOURCE**
**Thomson Reuters**
is a leading provider of transaction tax management solutions to companies of all sizes, enabling Finance, Tax and IT professionals to achieve accurate, timely and cost-effective compliance. Our flagship offering, the Thomson Reuters Application Suite, provides Consolidated Transaction Tax Management software and services, enabling global enterprise to manage sales, use, value-add, excise and specialty taxes with consistency, accuracy, control and efficiency. The marketplace is demanding our products, and Thomson Reuters is poised to grow significantly over the next several years in geographies across the world.
  
  
We are now hiring an
**ONESOURCE Technology Implementation & Consulting Project Manager**
to lead the delivery of software implementation projects within the Indirect Tax consulting organization. You will work closely with project teams, peer project managers, sales, customer service, clients, and partner consulting teams.
  
  
**About The Role**
As a
**ONESOURCE Project Manager,**
you will be responsible for:
  
  

* Service Delivery & Portfolio Management
* Manage an assigned portfolio of Thomson Reuters implementation projects.
* Direct project teams and own end-to-end delivery.
* Ensure strong planning, quality control, client management, and customer satisfaction.
* End-to-End Project Management
* Lead project planning sessions to define scope, approach, and delivery plans.
* Manage multiple complex projects/issues simultaneously, often requiring subject matter expertise.
* Drive operational improvements, efficiency, and results.
* Meet revenue and utilization targets as defined by management.
* Communication & Status Reporting
* Maintain clear communication with clients and internal teams.
* Prepare and deliver regular project status updates.
* Share knowledge and updates across the broader organization.
* Delivery Leadership
* Provide guidance and leadership to team members (and/or manage a team).
* Make routine decisions within established guidelines, including approved exceptions.
* Manage or contribute to project cost control, forecasting, and budget recommendations.
* Ensure quality and timeliness of deliverables; maintain accountability across the team.
* Provide insights and recommendations to support broader organizational goals.
* Consulting & Subject Matter Expertise
* Deliver consulting services to external clients in tax technology, legal, and global trade domain as part of Thomson Reuters Professional service team.
* Provide subject matter expertise to support customer deliverables.
* Travel
* 40–45% travel is required.

**About You**
To be our
**ONESOURCE Project Manager**
, you will likely have:
  
  

* 12+ years of core project management experience (with project management certification e.g., PMP, PRINCE2, or equivalent).
* 15+ years total experience in ERP, tax, or technology domains.
* Experience delivering consulting and technology implementation projects with diverse teams and large customers, including MENA and global clients.
* Proven ability to manage multiple parallel projects end-to-end.
* Strong understanding of:

+ O2C (Order-to-Cash) and/or P2P (Procure-to-Pay)
+ Indirect tax, e-invoicing, or related tax technology processes

* Background in tax technology or professional services organizations (e.g., systems integrators, ERP consulting firms, Big 4), ideally supporting large enterprises.
* Strong communication and coordination skills, including stakeholder management with senior client leadership, partners, and consultants.
* Fluent English (Arabic is a plus).

**Highly Desired**

* Integration/implementation experience with enterprise tax products such as ONESOURCE Tax Determination, Pagero e-invoicing, Taxware, Vertex, Avalara
* Experience with implementation and rollout of large ERP programs and/or Tax transformation and/or E-invoice solution implementation project management.

**What’s in it For You?**

* Hybrid Work Model: We’ve adopted a flexible hybrid working environment (2-3 days a week in the office depending on the role) for our office-based roles while delivering a seamless experience that is digitally and physically connected.
* Flexibility & Work-Life Balance: Flex My Way is a set of supportive workplace policies designed to help manage personal and professional responsibilities, whether caring for family, giving back to the community, or finding time to refresh and reset. This builds upon our flexible work arrangements, including work from anywhere for up to 8 weeks per year, empowering employees to achieve a better work-life balance.
* Career Development and Growth: By fostering a culture of continuous learning and skill development, we prepare our talent to tackle tomorrow’s challenges and deliver real-world solutions. Our Grow My Way programming and skills-first approach ensures you have the tools and knowledge to grow, lead, and thrive in an AI-enabled future.
* Industry Competitive Benefits: We offer comprehensive benefit plans to include flexible vacation, two company-wide Mental Health Days off, access to the Headspace app, retirement savings, tuition reimbursement, employee incentive programs, and resources for mental, physical, and financial wellbeing.
* Culture: Globally recognized, award-winning reputation for inclusion and belonging, flexibility, work-life balance, and more. We live by our values: Obsess over our Customers, Compete to Win, Challenge (Y)our Thinking, Act Fast / Learn Fast, and Stronger Together.
* Social Impact: Make an impact in your community with our Social Impact Institute. We offer employees two paid volunteer days off annually and opportunities to get involved with pro-bono consulting projects and Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) initiatives.
* Making a Real-World Impact: We are one of the few companies globally that helps its customers pursue justice, truth, and transparency. Together, with the professionals and institutions we serve, we help uphold the rule of law, turn the wheels of commerce, catch bad actors, report the facts, and provide trusted, unbiased information to people all over the world.

**About Us**
Thomson Reuters informs the way forward by bringing together the trusted content and technology that people and organizations need to make the right decisions. We serve professionals across legal, tax, accounting, compliance, government, and media. Our products combine highly specialized software and insights to empower professionals with the data, intelligence, and solutions needed to make informed decisions, and to help institutions in their pursuit of justice, truth, and transparency. Reuters, part of Thomson Reuters, is a world leading provider of trusted journalism and news.
  
  
We are powered by the talents of 26,000 employees across more than 70 countries, where everyone has a chance to contribute and grow professionally in flexible work environments. At a time when objectivity, accuracy, fairness, and transparency are under attack, we consider it our duty to pursue them. Sound exciting? Join us and help shape the industries that move society forward.
  
  
As a global business, we rely on the unique backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences of all employees to deliver on our business goals. To ensure we can do that, we seek talented, qualified employees in all our operations around the world regardless of race, color, sex/gender, including pregnancy, gender identity and expression, national origin, religion, sexual orientation, disability, age, marital status, citizen status, veteran status, or any other protected classification under applicable law. Thomson Reuters is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer providing a drug-free workplace.
  
  
We also make reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and for sincerely held religious beliefs in accordance with applicable law. More information on requesting an accommodation here.
  
  
Learn more on how to protect yourself from fraudulent job postings here.
  
  
More information about Thomson Reuters can be found on thomsonreuters.com.

Lead end-to-end program planning, execution, and delivery
  
  
Define program scope, objectives, milestones, and success criteria
  
  
Manage interdependencies across projects and workstreams
  
  
Track and control program schedule, budget, risks, and issues
  
  
Establish and maintain program governance, reporting, and communication

Drive issue resolution, decision-making, and escalation management

Manage vendors and third-party partners as required
  
  
Support change management and adoption activities
  
  
**Required Skills & Qualifications**
Proven experience as a Program Manager delivering complex programs
  
  
Strong project and program governance expertise
  
  
Excellent stakeholder, communication, and leadership skills
  
  
Experience managing cross-functional and distributed teams
  
  
Strong risk management and problem-solving capabilities
  
  
Good to Have
  
  
Experience in banking, financial services, or regulated industries
  
  
Agile, Waterfall, or hybrid delivery experience
  
  
PMP, PRINCE2, SAFe, or similar certifications
  
  
Education & Experience
  
  
Bachelor’s degree in Business, Technology, or related field
  
  
10+ years of overall experience with 4+ years in program management roles (preferred)

data.title: Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Overview**
JAGGAER provides an intelligent Source-to-Pay and Supplier Collaboration Platform that empowers organizations to manage and automate complex processes while enabling a highly resilient, responsible, and integrated supplier base. With 30 years of expertise, we specialize in solving compl
data.jd_text:
**Overview**
JAGGAER provides an intelligent Source-to-Pay and Supplier Collaboration Platform that empowers organizations to manage and automate complex processes while enabling a highly resilient, responsible, and integrated supplier base. With 30 years of expertise, we specialize in solving complex procurement and supply chain challenges across various industries.
  
  
Our 1,200+ global employees are obsessed with ensuring customers get full value from our products - ultimately enhancing and transforming their businesses. For more information, visit www.jaggaer.com
  
  
We are seeking an accomplished Project Manager who will work with project stakeholders to set deadlines, clarify responsibilities, resolve project issues, and monitor progress of projects. This role will be responsible to manage multiple projects simultaneously. In this role, you will be responsible for the delivery of demonstrable progress toward customer's solution usage goals, coordinate activities for assigned projects and work with colleagues to remove team obstacles or inefficiencies.
  
  
**Principal Responsibilities**

* Use product and industry knowledge to effectively manage a portfolio of assigned projects to implement JAGGAER software solutions.
* Develop and maintain project plans and supporting documentation which track progress against project deliverables, tasks, and activities with minimal support.
* Lead client and project team members to implement JAGGAER software solutions.
* Lead the project team to define and document client business requirements.
* Facilitate solution and process workshops to identify client business objectives, define project goals and provide a plan for maximizing the value of the solution.
* Collaborate with other JAGGAER departments to address and resolve client issues.
* Identify, mitigate, and manage project risks, including s/w resolution, scope challenges and project delays.
* Ensure a successful client transition from Professional Services to Support.
* Manage all project controls, including: budget vs actual for project hours, forecast accuracy, revenue attainment.
* Manage and document changes to project scope that have an impact on company’s resource, time and/or financial commitments via a change order process.
* Provide work direction, assistance, mentoring and coaching to other team members as required.
* Manage internal and client communication of appropriate project information.
* Establish and manage relationships with client to sustain a strong business connection.

**Position Requirements**

* 2+ years of business experience with 3+ years in application implementations, including SaaS solutions, in a client environment.
* 2-4 years eProcurement, Supply Chain or Contract Lifecycle Management software application experience is preferred.
* Experience implementing software-as-a-service (SaaS) software solutions or ERPs with systems integration preferred.
* Strong project management, interpersonal, negotiation, communication, presentation, documentation and problem-solving skills.
* Must be able to learn quickly, make strong individual contributions and handle multiple projects simultaneously in a team environment.
* Ability to act independently, take initiative and drive tasks and issues to resolution.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills are a must. Will work extensively over the phone and in-person with clients and suppliers.
* Hands-on experience with project management methodologies; Waterfall is preferred.
* Business automation and workflow process development desirable.
* Proficient in the use of PowerPoint, Project, Visio, Excel and Word as well as other typical business productivity tools.
* Is confident, articulate, succinct, professional and has sound judgement and critical thinking skills.
* Required to travel domestically and internationally. Travel ranges from 20-30%.
* Excellent written and spoken communication skills in English and Arabic is mandatory, additional languages preferred.

**What We Offer**
At JAGGAER you’ll find great benefits, empowering culture, flexible work environment, much more!
  
  
Apply now and be part of our success!
  
  
**Our Values - T.E.A.M**
At JAGGAER, our business is about people. Our products are built on intellectual property, but the real differentiator is the teams behind them–the way we collaborate, innovate, solve problems and deliver for customers. TEAM gives us a common set of expectations for how we work together across products, cultures, and geographies
  
  

* Transparency - Openness Builds Trust: Candor strengthens relationships, speeds decision-making, and ensures problems are solved together—with customers, teammates, and partners.
* Entrepreneurial Spirit – Own It, Drive It, Make It: A scrappy, customer obsessed, problem-solving mindset is at the cornerstone of both organizational and personal growth
* Accountability – Thumbs In, Not Fingers Out: We take responsibility ourselves before pointing elsewhere
* Metrics-Driven Results – Outcomes Over Activities: Data and evidence guide our decisions, help us course-correct quickly, and ensure we’re delivering real impact.

**Responsibilities**

* Conduct market research, business
data.jd_text:

data.title: Client Success & Project Manager – Digital Marketing
data.raw_snippet:
**About the Role:**

We're hiring a Client Success & Project Manager to own both sides of the client experience — the relationship and the delivery. You'll be the single point of contact for a portfolio of clients, responsible for making them feel heard, keeping their campaigns moving, and ensuring
data.jd_text:
**About the Role:**

We're hiring a Client Success & Project Manager to own both sides of the client experience — the relationship and the delivery. You'll be the single point of contact for a portfolio of clients, responsible for making them feel heard, keeping their campaigns moving, and ensuring the team executes with precision.

This role sits between the client and the internal team. You need the warmth to build trust with business owners and marketing leads, and the operational backbone to keep complex multi-channel campaigns on track simultaneously.

**What You'll Own:**

**Client Side**

* Serve as the primary point of contact for an assigned portfolio of clients
* Lead onboarding, kickoff calls, and monthly performance reviews
* Translate client goals into clear, actionable briefs for internal teams
* Proactively communicate campaign progress, results, and optimisation plans
* Identify upsell and retention opportunities and flag them to leadership
* Manage client expectations around timelines, budgets, and deliverables

**Delivery Side**

* Own end-to-end project timelines across paid media, content, and strategy workstreams
* Brief and coordinate media buyers, creatives, and tracking specialists
* Maintain sprint plans, launch schedules, and internal task management
* Run weekly internal standups and hold the team accountable to deadlines
* Own SOPs, post-mortems, and process documentation

**What We're Looking For**

* 3–5 years in a client-facing role inside a digital marketing agency — Account Manager, Client Success Manager, or similar
* Strong understanding of paid media (Meta Ads, Google Ads) — enough to have intelligent conversations with clients about performance
* Proven ability to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously without dropping the ball
* Excellent communicator in English — written, verbal, and on video calls
* Experience with project management tools (Asana, ClickUp, Monday.com, or similar)
* CRM experience, preferably HubSpot

**Nice to Have**

* Experience managing clients with budgets of AED 10,000–100,000/month
* Exposure to performance reporting (Meta Ads Manager, GA4, or similar)
* Background in UAE or GCC market

**The Profile We're Really Looking For**

Organised but personable. You run tight processes but clients genuinely enjoy working with you. You don't wait to be chased — you're the one sending the update before the client asks. You understand that in an agency, trust is the product.

**Why Join Us**

* Direct visibility into multi-million dirham campaigns across the UAE
* Work closely with senior leadership with real ownership from day one
* Fast-moving, no-politics environment where results speak louder than titles

data.title: Director of Business Development
data.company: TWIC, The Wolf Is Coming Agency
data.raw_snippet: TWIC is a premier talent management and communication agency with a global footprint across Spain. We represent an elite roster of A-list celebrities, actors, professional athletes, and top-tier digital creators and profesional international tournaments. We are the bridge between European excellence
data.jd_text:
TWIC is a premier talent management and communication agency with a global footprint across Spain. We represent an elite roster of A-list celebrities, actors, professional athletes, and top-tier digital creators and profesional international tournaments. We are the bridge between European excellence and Middle Eastern luxury, specializing in high-impact endorsements and strategic brand alignments.

**The Role**

We are looking for a
**high-performing, connected, and strategic Partnerships Leader**
to spearhead our commercial expansion in the GCC. Your mission is to secure high end endorsement deals, ambassadorships, and strategic partnerships for our top-tier Spanish and European celebrities with the region’s biggest brands and government entities.

**Key Responsibilities**

* **Rainmaking:**
  Leverage your existing network to secure major endorsement deals with luxury brands, real estate giants (EMAAR, NEOM), telecommunications, and government tourism boards (Visit Saudi, Dubai Tourism).
* **Strategic Matchmaking:**
  Identify the perfect synergy between our talent’s DNA and the GCC’s market needs.
* **Negotiation & Closing:**
  Lead high-stakes negotiations for image rights, ambassadorships, and appearances, ensuring the highest standards of professional service for our talent.
* **KSA Expansion:**
  Directly target and cultivate relationships within the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia (PIF projects, Vision 2030 initiatives).
* **Stakeholder Management:**
  Act as the primary liaison between our European HQ and GCC-based clients.

**What We Are Looking For**

* **7+ Years of Experience**
  in talent management, luxury brand partnerships, or high-level media sales in Dubai/GCC.

**What We Offer**

* **Access:**
  Direct access to some of the most influential celebrities and athletes in Europe.
* **Infrastructure:**
  A solid legal and operational base (SRL/Spain-Italy) to back your deals.
* **Incentives:**
  Competitive base salary with an
  **aggressive, uncapped commission structure**
  on all closed endorsements.
* **Growth:**
  The opportunity to be the face of TWIC in the world’s most exciting emerging market.

data.title: Project Director, Marine
data.raw_snippet: Since first going into action in 1909, the BESIX Group has over the years grown into a multidisciplinary company with a leading position in its markets: construction, property development and concessions. BESIX Contracting specializes in construction, infrastructure and marine works, often in contra
data.jd_text:
Since first going into action in 1909, the BESIX Group has over the years grown into a multidisciplinary company with a leading position in its markets: construction, property development and concessions. BESIX Contracting specializes in construction, infrastructure and marine works, often in contracts with a high level of complexity. In Benelux and France, the Group’s regional affiliates BESIX Infra, Belemco, Cobelba, Jacques Delens, Vanhout, Wust and Lux TP ensure a strong presence and a local approach. With Franki Foundations, West Construct, Socogetra, BESIX Environment and Van den Berg, the Group offers specialist niche solutions for the building market like deep foundations, geo-engineering, road construction, water treatment and cable and pipeline construction.

Backed by our experience in our home markets, we have built up strong positions outside Europe. A typical example is the Middle East, where over a 50 year period we have built up an impressive portfolio. This diversification in activities and geography pays off by reducing our risk exposure

**Job Description**

**Why This Role Matters**

The Project Director is responsible for overseeing a large marine project (>USD 300m) or multiple small marine projects through local deputies. He/she leads and manages the project(s) departments to achieve successful completion of a project, within given safety, quality, budgets and timeframe. He/she is the overall responsible for the P&L of the project(s).Through their leadership on project management, their key responsibilities include meeting clients, consultants and project(s) stakeholders, organizing the project departments to ensure timely availability of working documents, coordinating work preparation, managing sub-contracting and purchasing processes, and ensuring the efficiency of project delivery to the clients and consultants. He/she is accountable for Health Safety and Environmental assurance and control, Quality Assurance and Control, on-site technical preparation and execution, plant fleet management, contractual relations with the Employers and interactions with Authorities and Third Parties.

**What You’ll Drive**

* Supervise and coordinate activities for the successful completion of the project(s) in accordance with client requirements, organizational policies/procedures, contract terms, and specified time and cost parameters.
* Coach and mentor project managers working under them
* Establish the organizational chart and project processes to ensure the proper functioning of the support team in various sections, in accordance with company policies.
* Address processes malfunctions as needed and motivate staff effectively.
* Coordinate activities on the project(s) among different trades and departments.
* Validate contractual options, whether they are technical, financial, or time related.
* Validate legal matters, with the agreement of the Six Construct legal department.
* Manage contractual and financial follow-up and budget control.
* Approve all engagements related to the project.
* Conclude supply and sub-contracts after preparatory work by the support team, including pre-contract quality and performance audits.
* Engage in social contacts and public relations to benefit the company.
* Coordinate with all third parties, negotiate with contractors, suppliers, and subcontractors throughout all stages of the project life cycle, and participate in handling tenders and contracts.
* Implement project budgets and allocate resources, enforce project standards, conduct technical reviews, manage team.

**Qualifications**

**You’re a Great Fit If You Have**

* Experienced people and team manager, seeking consensus and demonstrating good listening skills.
* Advanced understanding of contract management.
* Is a natural organizer with deep understanding of process management within an organization.
* Holds deep knowledge of marine construction works, both technically and practically.
* Has the ability to rapidly assess issues, develop alternative solutions, and implement pragmatic strategies.
* Excellent communicator, both internally and externally.
* Demonstrates proficiency in negotiating at a high level and in complex environments.
* Exhibits professionalism, an entrepreneurial spirit, and a results-oriented approach.
* Holds a high degree of flexibility and adaptability.
* Commercially gifted.
* Fluent in English, and additional European language, such as French or Dutch, is considered an asset.
* Willingness to relocate as required by business needs

**Why You’ll Enjoy Working with Us**

* Competitive Benefits
* Positive Workplace Culture
* Opportunity to work with a leading international construction group
* Exposure to large-scale, high-impact projects in the Middle East
* Collaborative, diverse, and professional work environment
* Career growth and development opportunities

**Additional Information**

A career at BESIX is a lot more than just a job, it's about being part of our changing and innovative world. Your skills, ambition and passion will contribute to the development of our different businesses and allow us to succeed in the challenges of the coming years.

Working for the BESIX group allows you to be a part of a dynamic, creative and entrepreneurial company which is now recognized as a Belgian Top Employer. It gives you a safe and collaborative working environment with ambitious and innovative goals for the world of tomorrow, but also for your career and personal development.
  
  
We are looking for different kinds of personalities, mindsets, backgrounds and genders to build the iconic and sustainable projects of tomorrow.
  
  
  
  
Are you ready to make an impact and leave a positive legacy for years to come? If you are passionate about our purpose to Excel in creating sustainable solutions for a better world, come and join our caring BESIX family. Together we will co-create our future.
  
  
  
  
Working at BESIX brings a lot of great benefits including:

* An attractive remuneration package including a salary in line with the market and a range of employee benefits such as flexible mobility advantages, extra-legal pension, medical care insurance, work-life balance program (such as teleworking, child care, flexible work schedule, mobile working), Health Management (sport, health check-up program, …)
* Career development programs that serve not only to ensure that you are constantly learning and improving but also that give you the possibility to expand your career horizon
* A dynamic, creative and safe working environment with innovative colleagues supporting your endeavors (ideas, projects, goals, ambitions)
* Possibility to work on complex projects within both a local and international environment,
* The choice to remain locally anchored for the coming years or to seek an exciting international career opportunity within the group
