Lead and coordinate offshore survey activities, ensuri
data.jd_text:
🚀
**We’re Hiring a Survey Project Manager!**
🚀

Join our offshore project team and take the lead on subsea survey operations for major Oil & Gas projects, ensuring precision, safety, and performance at every stage.

🔧
**Your Responsibilities:**

Lead and coordinate offshore survey activities, ensuring efficient and compliant execution of all subsea operations.

* Plan, supervise, and oversee subsea survey operations (as-laid, as-built, ROV surveys, pipeline inspections).
* Define survey and positioning methodologies, including equipment and personnel requirements.
* Manage survey budgets, costs, and resources, including subcontractors and procurement.
* Coordinate both offshore and office-based teams for data processing, reporting, and quality control.
* Act as the main point of contact for clients on all survey-related topics.
* Review and approve survey procedures, mobilization plans, and calibration documentation.
* Monitor survey progress and performance, implementing corrective actions when needed.
* Ensure accurate and compliant deliverables, including final reports and survey databases.
* Maintain technical documentation and reporting throughout the project lifecycle.
* Promote and ensure strict compliance with HSE policies and safe working practices.
* Stay up to date with new survey technologies to enhance efficiency and data quality.

🧰
**Your Profile:**

* Degree in Surveying, Geomatics, Marine Engineering, or a related field.
* Strong experience in offshore Oil & Gas subsea survey operations (pipeline, FPSO, subsea structures).
* Proven project management skills (planning, coordination, budgeting, subcontractor management).
* Solid experience with survey tools and software (ROV, GNSS, Total Station, AutoCAD, data processing tools).
* Strong background in survey data management, reporting, and quality control.
* Experience with tendering processes, cost estimation, and scope definition.
* Good knowledge of HSE standards and quality systems (ISO 9001).
* Strong leadership, communication, and coordination skills across multidisciplinary teams.

🌍
**Become a Celes’Talent — ready to shape the future with us?**
**🌍 Celestal-Life**

data.jd_text:
**🚀 Welcome to Your Next Adventure!**
We are looking for an experienced
**AI Project Manager**
to facilitate the successful delivery of AI and ML initiatives. In this role, you will coordinate cross-team integrations and communications, manage timelines, and ensure projects are delivered on schedule, within budget, and in line with defined objectives. You will also monitor key metrics and track the status of integrations to ensure seamless execution.
  
  
**🛠 What You’ll Get Your Hands On**

* Support end-to-end project delivery, ensuring timelines, budgets, and objectives are met.
* Coordinate cross-functional teams and internal integrations, enabling clear and efficient collaboration.
* Plan project schedules, track progress, and proactively identify and manage risks.
* Serve as the initial point of contact for stakeholders, providing clear updates and managing expectations.
* Ensure smooth integration of AI initiatives with broader organizational projects and processes.
* Promote best practices in project delivery, documentation, and continuous improvement.

**🧙‍♂️ The Magic You Bring**

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Project Management.
* Strong familiarity with core technology concepts, from architecture to delivery workflows.
* Hands-on experience navigating end-to-end AI/ML project lifecycles, from scoping and data readiness to deployment and iteration.
* 4+ years of project management experience in AI, ML, or tech-driven environments.
* Proven track record of delivering complex projects on time and within scope.
* Strong skills in planning, risk management, stakeholder communication, and team coordination.
* Expertise with monitoring and analytics tools such as Amplitude, Tableau, Looker, or similar.
* SQL knowledge for basic checks, validation, and tracking.
* Familiarity with project management tools (Jira, Asana, Trello, etc.).
* Excellent problem-solving, organizational, and interpersonal skills.

**✨ Bonus Points If You Have**

* Experience within delivery/logistics industries.

**Inside Snoonu’s Universe**
Snoonu is Qatar’s homegrown Super App, reinventing daily life with blazing-fast delivery, ride-hailing, and shopping - all in one place. Powered by tech, driven by a global team, and obsessed with making life easier.
  
  
**The Dream We’re Chasing**
To be the first Qatari Super App that propels the region and its community through innovation and technology. We envision a global expansion where what we do surpasses norms and limitations every time.
  
  
**The Quest We’re On**
To radically transform how people live by leveraging technology to connect them with endless possibilities.
  
  
**Our Everyday Superpowers**
**👥 Be Customer Obsessed:**
“Focus on the customer and all else will follow.”
  
  
**💪 Act with Integrity:**
“We are honest, ethical, and trustworthy in everything we do.”
  
  
**🧪 Be Curious and Creative:**
“We constantly innovate and create solutions to bring a lasting positive impact.”
  
  
🏅
**Lead by Example and Take Ownership:**
“Be the change you want to see and take ownership.”
  
  
**🚀 Work Smart and Deliver Results:**
“You can do more by doing less, better, and faster.”
  
  
**👨‍💼 It's All About People:**
“Be a team player; together we are stronger.”
  
  
**Perks & Worklife Magic At Snoonu**
**🌐 Global Vibes –**
Collaborate with a worldwide crew.
  
  
**🧠 Brain Boosters –**
Learning budgets, access to courses, and tools for your growth.
  
  
**🚒 Builder’s Playground –**
Own your tasks, own your path! We’re big on autonomy.
  
  
🏝️
**Flexible Time Off –**
We take recharging seriously. Generous leave and wellness policies.
  
  
**🛠️ Agile Everything –**
Scrum isn’t a buzzword here. It’s how we roll, from product to ops.
  
  
**Beyond the Code: Giving Back Matters**
We don’t just build app. We’re committed to doing business sustainably and giving back to the community that fuels us. From eco-conscious practices to CSR projects, we’re always finding ways to do better—and we invite you to be a part of that mission.
  
  
**Diversity Isn’t Just a Buzzword**
At Snoonu, fairness and inclusion are the foundation of everything we do. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity workplace that welcomes people from every walk of life. Be bold. Be you. Thrive here.
  
  
**Let’s Build the Future Together**
Apply now to join a team where your contributions spark a change and your voice is heard. Let’s make some magic together.
  
  
Stay in the loop—connect with us on LinkedIn!

data.raw_snippet:

data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
Wood is accepting expressions of interest for a Project Engineering Manager (Offshore) to join our team in Qatar. The Project Engineering Manager (offshore) will be responsible for the execution of the engineering portion of a multi-discipline engineering scope of work on one or more projects / work scopes. Has responsibility for coordinating and completing the various engineering, and start-up aspects of a project(s) while meeting HSSE, quality, schedule, and budget performance goals. Has responsibility for the technical excellence of the engineering portion of a project(s) across all disciplines.
  
  
Reflecting The Market Focus For The Office In Both Brownfield And Greenfield Opportunities, Multi-skilled Personnel Are Sought, In Particular Those With Experience In
  
  

* Onshore Oil and Gas
* Offshore Oil and Gas

**Responsibilities**
The Project Engineering Manager (Offshore) leads by example, consistently displaying and enforcing the Company’s values and behaviors, and commitment to the highest standards of safe and ethical behavior, to ensure safe and reliable operations and client satisfaction
  
  
**Driving technical assurance.**

* Continuous promotion of corporate / client specific procedures.
* Assist in incident investigations as required.
* Monitors compliance with standards and processes to assure delivery.
* Roll out and Implementation of learning opportunities from across the business.
* Driving continual focus on process safety through the engineering team
* Driving elimination of technical incidents through robust controls, incident reviews and embedding lessons learned
* Identifies and mitigates areas of risk and improvement opportunities
* Identifies and pursues improvement opportunities
* Managing and leading, supporting and supervising the multidiscipline engineering team

**Plan, organize, direct, control and evaluate the activities and operations of a multidiscipline engineering team**

* Assist in the management of recruitment, selection, transfers, performance management, succession planning and promotion of resources to meet engineering team requirements
* Ensuring appropriately resourced and competent personnel on Project/Contract
* Oversight and control of Engineering Histogram to support workforce planning
* Assist in setting & maintaining standards for the development and retention of motivated and competent people

**Management of key stakeholders in the execution and delivery of contracted activities.**

* Responsible for the engineering content of project execution plans for assigned contracts/projects
* Responsible for the direction and management of the engineering and associated project activities of the business grouping/Project
* Manage and direct resources efficiently and effectively.
* Consult and negotiate with clients to prepare specifications, explain proposals and present engineering reports and findings
* Assign, co-ordinate and review the technical work of the department or project teams
* Focuses on managerial concerns of the project such as cost, completion date, and resource allocation. Provides expert resolution of issues and monitors integration of work.
* Reviews technical concepts of major projects.
* Personally participates in solving difficult technical problems.
* Resolves conflicts that are complex and manages divergent audience
* Responsible for facilitating agreement between conflicting parties
* Resolves issues which are non-recurring and occasionally novel
* Carries responsibility for resolution of major problems for the engineering segment
* Assist in identifying and requesting functional support to projects / contracts as required
* Accountable for the efficient planning and management of engineering resouces, identifying ad pursuing opportunities for margin improvement, including HVEC utilisation.

**Undertaking the role of process owner**

* Develop and implement policies, standards and procedures for the engineering and technical work performed in the department
* Directs the application of existing principles and the development of new polices and strategies aligned with OU, BU and Corporate objectives
* Conduit for regulatory framework, legislation changes, initiatives and industry technology developments.

**Qualifications**

* Minimum 15 years experience in discipline engineering
* Minimum 5 years experience with Wood or legacy Wood companies
* Experience in EPCM contract will be advantageous
* Balance of techical and management experience at relevant level and position.
* Typically requires several years of supervisory experience with an understanding of human relations, training, performance evaluation and health and safety
* Broad and extensive knowledge of engineering theories and techniques and a high level of skill in application of this knowledge in the management of the engineering function
* Capable of representing business and client to business associates in a professional manner.
* Excellent interpersonal and communication skills, capable of influencing people at all levels of the organization.
* Skilled in forecast planning for people resources.
* Skilled in recruitment and selection, employee communication and management including performance management.
* Able to implement and embed standards and processes to effect delivery of engineering excellence.
* Good knowledge of regulatory framework and associated legislation.
* Current knowledge of industry and technology development within area of expertise.
* Expert in Engineering excellence.
* Able to carry out audit and incident investigations Good Project management skills.
* Skilled in mediation and dispute resolution
* Financial and commercial awareness.

**About Us**
Wood is a global leader in consulting and engineering, helping to unlock solutions to critical challenges in energy and materials markets. We provide consulting, projects and operations solutions in 45 countries, employing around 25,000 people. www.woodplc.com
  
  
**Diversity Statement**
We are an equal opportunity employer that recognises the value of a diverse workforce. All suitably qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment on the basis of objective criteria and without regard to the following (which is a non-exhaustive list): race, colour, age, religion, gender, national origin, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, protected veteran status, or other characteristics in accordance with the relevant governing laws.

General Information
  
  
**Ref #**
227909
  
  
**Location:**
Qatar-Doha
  
  
**Job family:**
Corporate & Commercial
  
  
**Closing Date:**
2026-04-19
  
  
**Description**
****About the Role****
An exciting opportunity to join the Qatar Airways IT - PMO team as Program Manager. This role within IT PMO is responsible for driving IT sourcing and vendor governance initiatives across IT. This role ensures effective collaboration with internal stakeholders and external vendors to deliver IT products and services that are aligned with organizational standards, compliance requirements, and strategic objectives. In addition, it incorporates vendor performance management by establishing frameworks to monitor and evaluate vendor performance metrics and Service Level Agreements (SLAs), driving consistent quality and accountability throughout service delivery.
  
  
**Your Duties Would Include**

* Lead sourcing initiatives for IT in partnership with IT Lines of Business (LOBs), QR Procurement, and Legal teams.
* Oversee the end-to-end RFX process from requirements gathering to acquisition of tools, products, or services.
* Lead RFP, RFQ, and Tender processes, ensuring coordination of technical evaluations with Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) and alignment with QR Procurement policies, while managing the development and review of functional, technical, and non-functional requirements (NFRs).
* Establish Vendor Performance Management framework and enable the monitoring of vendor performance metrics and Service Level Agreements (SLAs).
* Vendor Management aspects such as Performance Management, Pricing, Governance, Change Management, and Information Security/Data Protection.
* Drive accountability and compliance to maintain consistent quality and service delivery.
* Manage and optimize operations of Offshore Development Centers (ODCs) and secondment partners and ensure timely availability of skilled IT consultants for project needs while adhering to QRG policies
* Collaborate with QR Procurement and Contracts Department to evaluate current procurement processes and templates to identify areas for streamlining and adapting processes for IT-specific products and services.
* Lead key IT projects and programs assigned by the line manager.
* Ensure alignment with IT PMO governance standards and organizational objectives.

****Be part of an extraordinary story****
Your skills. Your imagination. Your ambition. Here, there are no boundaries to your potential and the impact you can make. You’ll find infinite opportunities to grow and work on the biggest, most rewarding challenges that will build your skills and experience. You have the chance to be a part of our future, and build the life you want while being part of an international community.
  
  
Our best is here and still to come. To us, impossible is only a challenge. Join us as we dare to achieve what’s never been done before.
  
  
Together, everything is possible.
  
  
Qualification
  
  
We Are Looking For a Passionate And Experienced Professional To Join Our IT - PMO Team. The Ideal Candidate Should Possess The Following
  
  

* Bachelor’s Degree or Equivalent with Minimum 15 years of job-related experience
* Minimum 5 years of experience in procurement and vendor management for an IT function.
* Experience in leading IT projects, of which at least 3 years should be in successful delivery of large-scale Programs.
* Proven experience in managing IT partners & related contracts.
* PMP certification or demonstrable Project & Program Management experience.
* Managerial skills - Ability to delegate work, set clear direction and manage workflow. Strong mentoring and coaching skills. Ability to train and develop subordinate's skills. Ability to foster teamwork among team members.
* Airline Industry experience though not essential would be an added advantage.

**About Qatar Airways Group**
Our story started with four aircraft. Today, we deliver excellence across 12 different businesses coming together as one. We’ve grown fast, broken records and set trends that others follow. We don’t slow down by the fear of failure. Instead, we dare to achieve what’s never been done before. So, whether you’re creating a unique experience for our customers or innovating behind the scenes, every person contributes to our proud story. A story of spectacular growth and determination. Now is the time to bring your best ideas and passion to a place where your ambition will know no boundaries, and be part of a truly global community.
  
  
**How To Apply**
If you are interested to submit your application and feel you are a good fit for this role, please complete our application form and upload your CV for our review and consideration.

+ Monitor project costs, cash flow, invoicing, and profitability.
+ Optimize resource utilization (manpower, materials, equipment).
+ Coordinate procurement of long-lead items and critical equipment.
+ HSE & Quality Assurance

- Implement stringent HSE management systems in compliance with Oil & Gas safety standards.
- Ensure QA/QC procedures are followed at all stages of project execution.
- Conduct risk assessments, safety audits, and quality inspections.
- Reporting & Documentation

* Prepare project progress reports, dashboards, and presentations for senior management and clients.
* Maintain proper documentation of engineering, construction, and commissioning records.
* Ensure project close-out, handover, and warranty obligations are fulfilled.

data.title: Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Summary**
We are seeking a results-driven Project Manager to lead, plan, and monitor projects from initiation through completion. The role requires strong expertise in project planning, procurement processes, performance monitoring, and reporting. The ideal candidate will ensure projects are d
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary**
We are seeking a results-driven Project Manager to lead, plan, and monitor projects from initiation through completion. The role requires strong expertise in project planning, procurement processes, performance monitoring, and reporting. The ideal candidate will ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and aligned with organizational objectives while maintaining high standards of quality and compliance.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Develop and monitor procurement plans and prepare detailed project schedules, including timelines, milestones, and deliverables.
* Provide senior management with regular updates on project progress, including weekly and monthly reports.
* Prepare quarterly administrative reports covering procurement plans and the status of all ongoing projects.
* Establish key performance indicators (KPIs), assess project performance, identify deviations, and recommend corrective actions and improvement initiatives.
* Prepare data-driven reports, including tables, charts, and dashboards, to clearly communicate project progress and performance.
* Ensure all projects are initiated as planned or ahead of schedule where possible.
* Monitor team performance and ensure all project tasks are executed efficiently and effectively.
* Support market research activities, including data collection, benchmarking, and comparative analysis.
* Develop and standardize processes, procedures, and templates using smart tools, and present them for management approval and team adoption.
* Track project timelines and proactively address risks, delays, and bottlenecks.
* Lead knowledge transfer initiatives and provide training to team members on project management methodologies and best practices.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Economics, Finance, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
* Professional certification in Project Management (PMP or PRINCE2) is required.
* Additional certifications such as Certified Professional in Procurement, CPE, or AICP are considered an advantage.

**Experience**

* 5–7 years of proven experience in project management, including end-to-end project delivery.
* Strong experience in preparing professional reports and presentations.
* Solid understanding of government financial regulations, particularly tendering and procurement laws and executive regulations.
* Experience in government procurement cycles, financial analysis, feasibility studies, market studies, and budgeting.
* Proven ability to manage multiple tasks under pressure and meet tight deadlines.
* Prior experience in government or semi-government consulting environments is an advantage.

**Core Competencies & Skills**

* Strong project management, planning, and scheduling capabilities.
* Expertise in setting, monitoring, and evaluating operational performance indicators (KPIs).
* Advanced analytical and financial modeling skills.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills; Arabic is mandatory, with strong proficiency in English.
* High-level report writing and documentation skills, with the ability to clearly present project status, challenges, and recommendations.
* Strong presentation skills, particularly in Arabic, with the ability to communicate complex concepts effectively.
* Ability to prioritize tasks, manage multiple projects, and meet deadlines.
* Strong training and knowledge transfer capabilities.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, financial modeling, and professional presentation tools.

**Behavioral Competencies & Work Conditions**

* Demonstrates professionalism, integrity, and strict confidentiality.
* Shows strong commitment, discipline, and accountability in all responsibilities.
* Works collaboratively and provides objective guidance to improve team performance and workflow.
* Complies with organizational policies, procedures, and management directives.
* Commits to official working hours and maintains a high standard of workplace conduct.
* Develops and implements on-the-job training plans to ensure effective knowledge transfer and team readiness.
* Fluent in Arabic (spoken and written) with strong proficiency in English.
* Possesses a good understanding of technical project terminology, including systems, networks, and engineering-related concepts, particularly in construction environments.

data.title: Project Manager (Engineering Consultant)

We are seeking a highly experienced Project Manager (Engineering Consultant) to lead and oversee architectural and interior design projects from inception to completion. The role requires strong leadership, technical expertise, and the ability to ensure projects are delivered on time
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary**
We are seeking a highly experienced Project Manager (Engineering Consultant) to lead and oversee architectural and interior design projects from inception to completion. The role requires strong leadership, technical expertise, and the ability to ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and in accordance with specifications and regulatory requirements. The ideal candidate will excel in planning, coordination, reporting, and stakeholder communication.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Monitor and manage building projects to ensure progress aligns with approved designs, specifications, and timelines.
* Develop procurement strategies and prepare detailed project schedules, including milestones, deliverables, and timelines.
* Provide senior management with regular project updates and comprehensive progress reports (weekly and monthly).
* Prepare analytical reports, including data tables, charts, and graphs to track and communicate project performance.
* Ensure timely project initiation and proactively address delays to maintain schedule adherence.
* Coordinate with internal teams, contractors, and external stakeholders to ensure efficient and effective execution of all project activities.
* Supervise and follow up on contractors and service providers to ensure quality and compliance.
* Assist in conducting market research, data collection, and comparative analysis to support project planning and decision-making.
* Ensure compliance with applicable tendering and procurement regulations and internal policies.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Architectural Engineering or a related field.
* Certified Architect/Engineering professional accreditation is required.

**Experience**

* Minimum of 15 years of experience in architectural and interior design.
* At least 8 years of proven experience in a Project Manager role.
* Demonstrated experience in designing office spaces, employee facilities, and large halls.
* Experience in hotel design projects is highly desirable.
* Strong familiarity with tendering procedures, auctions laws, and their executive regulations.
* Proven ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously under tight deadlines and high-pressure environments.

**Core Competencies & Skills**

* Advanced project management and time management skills.
* Strong capabilities in project planning, cost estimation, and preparation of technical and financial studies related to contracting, maintenance, and furnishing.
* Expertise in space planning, concept development, and proposal preparation.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills; Arabic is mandatory, with strong proficiency in English.
* Exceptional report writing and documentation skills, with the ability to clearly present project status, risks, challenges, and recommendations.
* High-level presentation skills with the ability to communicate complex information effectively.
* Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and ability to prioritize and manage multiple tasks concurrently.

**Behavioral Competencies & Work Conditions**

* Demonstrates professionalism, integrity, and strict confidentiality in all matters.
* Shows high levels of commitment, discipline, and accountability.
* Collaborates effectively with team members and provides objective guidance and technical support.
* Ensures compliance with management directives and organizational policies.
* Develops and implements on-the-job training plans to support team development and knowledge transfer.
* Supports continuous improvement of workflows and ensures readiness and capability of the project management team.

data.title: EOI - Project Control Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
Wood is accepting expressions of interest for a Project Control Manager to join our team in Qatar.
  
  
Project Control Manager leads the cost; planning, scheduling and risk assessment support to assignments / project teams and clients, typically on projects of moderate size and
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
Wood is accepting expressions of interest for a Project Control Manager to join our team in Qatar.
  
  
Project Control Manager leads the cost; planning, scheduling and risk assessment support to assignments / project teams and clients, typically on projects of moderate size and complexity. Oversees the set up and running of all required project controls systems, tools and interfaces to allow successful management and reporting of the project costs, schedule and risks on projects and specific assignments. Responsible for managing a team of project control resources in support of project delivery excellence
  
  
The role interfaces with a number of key stakeholders across the project and wider business. Primary focal point for the Project Manager, Client or Project Team for all matters relating to project costs, schedules and risk; and resources requirements. Develops and implements the project control execution plan for projects of moderate size and complexity
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Act as the focal point with the client and any contractor Project Controllers as appropriate to ensure costs and progress are reported accurately, ensure alignment with the project reporting requirements and ensure timely and accurate cost and progress reporting
* Monitor overall project / assignment progress status, achievement and non-achievement of major milestones and analyse and forecast performance in relation to plan
* Identification, monitoring and reporting against the project critical path providing early warning to the Project Manager of any potential slippages
* Identifies and establishes the communications interfaces essential for the delivery of cost, planning, scheduling and risk deliverables and services
* Report project status and KPI to management
* Develops the project Work Breakdown Structure?
* Manage the implementation of the cost and planning control structures in alignment with the project Work Breakdown Structure
* Manage and oversee the project work approval process in terms of accurate cost code allocation and initial budget set-up and approvals
* Timely control and forecasting of budgets and ensure that the impact of all change requests are properly assessed and included in the budget and schedules if applicable
* Accountable for accuracy and timeliness of S-curves and histograms produced by team
* Accountable for delivery and ongoing maitenance of the projects fully resourced, logic linked Gantt Charts within preferred planning software to the agreed project and programme requirements
* Accountable for providing analysis of current and future resource needs for the project and programme to the Project Manager
* Manages and oversees the recovery process followig identified slippages or significant float erosion
* Responsible for timely and accurate development and issuing of project change orders / variations in accordance with contract / assignment change notifications
* Promote the project change management system and facilitate assurance activities to ensure the process is adhered to
* Serve as Chair for ongoing internal team and client team Project Controls meetings (Cost, Schedule and Progress).
* Oversee the preparation of proposal schedules and CTR packs
* Lead cost and schedule risk analysis workshops / sessions both internally and with clients
* Ensure risk is managed and monitored at project level in line with local standards and processes
* Ensure Project Controls processes and procedures are accurate, that the project controls team are familiar with them and comply with their requirements
* Responsible for ensuring that projects are managed effectively to ensure delivery in a manner which meets quality, time and budget specifications
* Accountable for the accuracy and completeness of all cost, planning and risk deliverables prior to issue to internal or external customer
* Responsible for ensuring all project specific control tools and systems are set up and functioning adequately
* Manage the workload, performance and development of the project controls team. Provides constructive feedback and coaching.
* Responsible for ensuring project control staff are competent to carry out assigned work
* Reviews contractual obligations and ensures that cost control activities are performed in accordance with the contractual agreements and the Client’s requirements
* Ensuring that lessons learned are captured and implemented in support of continuous improvement
* Motivates project control team to meet project aims; promotes communication and teamwork within group and project.

**Qualifications**

* B.S. or equivalent degree
* Minimum of 15+ years relevant experience in major Brownfield oil & gas projects, including at least five (5) years in similar position
* Pre-FEED, FEED experience
* Typically requires a minimum of eight (8) years of relevant industry experience, with at least six (6) years in project control positions.
* Excellent client service focus
* Exceptional organisational skills and able to multi-task"
* Working knowledge of risk management processes and techniques and experience in facilitating Risk workshops with project / assignment teams
* Advanced Working Knowledge of relevant software tools such as Microsoft Project and Primavera

**About Us**
Wood is a global leader in consulting and engineering, helping to unlock solutions to critical challenges in energy and materials markets. We provide consulting, projects and operations solutions in 45 countries, employing around 25,000 people. www.woodplc.com
  
  
**Diversity Statement**
We are an equal opportunity employer that recognises the value of a diverse workforce. All suitably qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment on the basis of objective criteria and without regard to the following (which is a non-exhaustive list): race, colour, age, religion, gender, national origin, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, protected veteran status, or other characteristics in accordance with the relevant governing laws.

**Senior Manager, FlightSense Program Management (Hybrid) based in Doha**
The Senior Manager, FlightSense™ Program Management owns the execution of the FlightSense™ agreement with the customer and is the main focal both internally and externally. This includes building and maintaining strong relationships with the customer and ensuring Collins Aerospace delivers to the contractual, financial, and operational performance of the program.
  
  
FlightSense™ is a premier repair services business aerospace flight hour programs at Collins focused on supporting our customers with best-in-class performance and a superior customer experience.
  
  
**Primary Responsibilities:**

* Central single point of contact for the contract both externally to the customer and internally with aftermarket team (Repair, Technical, Finance, Management).
* Track overall Customer Support Level (CSL) to the customer for the FlightSense contract, in addition to all Collins commercial repairs.
* May include connecting with specific sites to ensure recovery plans executed and are realistic in terms of recovery to CSL requirements.
* Own the overall Estimate At Completion (EAC) financial performance for adherence to original business plan.
* Review monthly/quarterly cost data, reliability trends, effects of improvement activities and customer fleet/flying projections to update future forecast model predictions in EAC financial model.
* Lead any performance penalty or contractual alignment discussions, internally as well as with the customer.
* Support customer technical review discussions, with guidance from the Collins product owners, to agree on service bulletin incorporation, chargeable quote disputes and other items.

**Basic Qualifications:**

* Typically requires a University Degree or equivalent experience and minimum 10 years prior relevant experience or an Advanced Degree in a related field and minimum 7 years of experience or in absence of a degree, 14 years of relevant experience.

**Preferred Qualifications:**

* Experience leveraging strong financial acumen and / or experience with financial modeling.
* Demonstrated track record of conflict / issue resolution on difficult problems.
* Experience with commercial airframe components

This position may involve access to export-controlled information and hardware where an export license would be required for compliance with applicable laws and regulations. Employment will be subject to satisfactory security checks, export license approval, and if required, completion of a non-disclosure agreement.
  
  
Collins Aerospace, an RTX Company, is a leader in technologically advanced and intelligent solutions for the global aerospace and defense industry. Collins Aerospace has the capabilities, comprehensive portfolio and expertise to solve customers’ toughest challenges and to meet the demands of a rapidly evolving global market.
  
  
We make modern flight possible for millions of travelers and our military every second. Our major product lines are on-board virtually every aircraft flying. Be it keeping passengers safe with our emergency power generation systems or creating a positive in-flight experience through reliable cabin pressure controls and quieter engines, Power & Controls focuses on delivering a best-in-class experience to our customers. We hire the top people in the industry. Their ideas drive our performance, and their integrity keeps our customers happy. Join us as we take flight!
  
  
**WE ARE REDEFINING AEROSPACE.**
Please consider the following role type definitions as you apply for this role.
  
  
**Onsite:**
Employees who are working in Onsite roles will work primarily onsite. This includes all production and maintenance employees, as they are essential to the development of our products.
  
  
**Hybrid:**
Employees who are working in Hybrid roles will work regularly both onsite and offsite. Ratio of time working onsite will be determined in partnership with your leader.
  
  
**Remote:**
Employees who are working in Remote roles will work primarily offsite (from home). An employee may be expected to travel to the site location as needed.
  
  
*Regardless of your role type, collaboration and innovation are critical to our business and all employees will have access to digital tools so they can work with colleagues around the world – and access to Collins sites when their work requires in-person meetings.*
Nothing matters more to Collins Aerospace than our strong ethical and safety commitments.
  
  
At Collins, the paths we pave together lead to limitless possibility. And the bonds we form – with our customers and with each other -- propel us all higher, again and again.
  
  
Apply now and be part of the team that’s redefining aerospace, every day.
  
  
*RTX adheres to the principles of equal employment. All qualified applications will be given careful consideration without regard to ethnicity, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation or identity, national origin, age, disability, protected veteran status or any other characteristic protected by law.*

data.jd_text:
**About the Role**

**Systems Limited – Middle East & Africa (Techvista)**
is seeking a
**Technical PM / Development Manager**
to lead the design, development, and delivery of enterprise-grade applications. This role combines strong technical leadership with delivery management, focusing on driving engineering teams, ensuring high-quality software delivery, and aligning technical solutions with business objectives. The ideal candidate will oversee end-to-end development lifecycles and play a key role in building scalable, secure, and high-performance systems.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Lead and manage software development teams to deliver high-quality enterprise solutions
* Oversee the full Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC), from requirements gathering to deployment and production support
* Translate business requirements into detailed technical specifications and actionable development plans
* Drive the design and development of scalable, maintainable, and high-performance applications
* Enforce coding standards, engineering best practices, and architectural guidelines
* Manage system integrations using APIs, microservices, and web services (REST/SOAP)
* Conduct code reviews and provide strong technical leadership and mentoring to development teams
* Collaborate with Solution Architects, QA, DevOps, and business stakeholders to ensure seamless delivery
* Identify and manage technical risks, dependencies, and delivery bottlenecks
* Track development progress, manage timelines, and provide regular reporting to stakeholders
* Ensure proper documentation of technical designs, system components, and development processes

**Required Competencies and Experience & Qualifications**

* 10+ years of experience in software development with strong technical expertise
* Proven experience as a Technical Project Manager, Development Manager, or Engineering Lead
* Strong hands-on experience with modern programming languages (e.g., Java, .NET, or similar)
* Strong knowledge of system design, microservices architecture, and distributed systems
* Experience in API development, system integration, and backend engineering
* Solid understanding of Agile, Scrum, and DevOps practices
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines, Git-based workflows, and modern development toolchains
* Strong leadership skills with the ability to manage and scale engineering teams
* Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and decision-making abilities
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field

data.title: Insurance Business Development Director
data.raw_snippet: The Insurance Business Development Director is responsible for driving the growth and strategic expansion of Estithmar Capital’s insurance portfolio. This role focuses on identifying investment opportunities, building strategic partnerships, and developing innovative insurance solutions across tradi
data.jd_text:
The Insurance Business Development Director is responsible for driving the growth and strategic expansion of Estithmar Capital’s insurance portfolio. This role focuses on identifying investment opportunities, building strategic partnerships, and developing innovative insurance solutions across traditional and digital channels.

The position plays a critical role in aligning insurance initiatives with the firm’s broader investment strategy, ensuring sustainable growth, profitability, and market positioning across regional and international markets.

**Key Responsibilities**

**1. Portfolio Management**

* Oversee and manage the firm’s insurance investments, partnerships, and ventures.
* Monitor financial and operational performance of insurance-related assets.
* Develop and execute strategies to enhance portfolio value, profitability, and scalability.
* Prepare performance reports and insights for senior management and shareholders.

**2. Business Development & Investments**

* Identify and evaluate new opportunities across:
* Insurance companies
* Insurtech platforms
* Brokerage firms
* Strategic distribution partnerships
* Lead end-to-end deal execution including sourcing, structuring, negotiation, and closing.
* Develop new revenue streams and scalable insurance business models.

**3. Strategic Partnerships**

* Build and manage relationships with:
* Insurance and reinsurance companies
* Brokers and intermediaries
* Financial institutions and banks
* Structure and negotiate distribution agreements, joint ventures, and alliances.
* Represent Estithmar Capital in key industry engagements and forums.

**4. Market & Industry Analysis**

* Conduct in-depth research on regional and global insurance markets.
* Identify emerging trends and opportunities such as:
* Digital insurance / Insurtech
* Bancassurance
* Embedded insurance
* Health and life insurance segments
* Provide strategic insights to support investment decisions.

**5. Product Development & Distribution**

* Collaborate with partners to design and launch innovative insurance products.
* Develop multi-channel distribution strategies including:
* Corporate partnerships
* Digital platforms
* Financial services ecosystems
* Drive go-to-market strategies for new insurance offerings.

**6. Regulatory & Compliance Coordination**

* Ensure all insurance-related activities comply with applicable regulatory frameworks.
* Liaise with regulatory bodies and supervisory authorities where required.
* Monitor regulatory developments impacting insurance and financial services sectors.

**7. Financial & Investment Analysis**

* Conduct financial modeling, valuation, and due diligence for insurance investments.
* Assess profitability, capital requirements, and associated risks.
* Support investment committees with data-driven recommendations and insights.

**Qualifications & Experience**

* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or related field (Master’s preferred).
* Minimum
  **12–15 years of experience**
  in insurance, financial services, or investment management.
* Strong exposure to:
* Insurance business development
* Investment structuring and partnerships
* Insurtech / digital insurance ecosystems
* Experience within
  **investment firms, insurance groups, or financial institutions**
  is highly preferred.
* Regional (GCC) market experience is an advantage.

**Core Competencies**

* Strong commercial and investment acumen
* Strategic thinking with execution capability
* Advanced financial modeling and analytical skills
* High-level negotiation and stakeholder management
* Deep understanding of insurance value chains and distribution models
* Ability to operate in a fast-paced, multi-asset investment environment

**Regulatory Considerations**

* May require regulatory approval depending on the scope of insurance and investment activities.
* Must ensure compliance with applicable financial services and insurance regulations.

data.title: Strategic Projects Associate Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Our business landscape**

We’re an award-winning global communications company operating in nine countries across the Middle East, North Africa, and Southeast Asia. Our strategy is to become the region’s leading digital infrastructure provider. Ooredoo Group’s strategic vision is guided by five ke
data.jd_text:
**Our business landscape**

We’re an award-winning global communications company operating in nine countries across the Middle East, North Africa, and Southeast Asia. Our strategy is to become the region’s leading digital infrastructure provider. Ooredoo Group’s strategic vision is guided by five key pillars:

* **Value-Focused Portfolio:**
  Boosting asset returns by focusing on telco operations, towers, data centres, the sea cable business and fintech.

* **Strengthen the Core:**
  Optimally using deployed capital and maintain an appropriate cost structure.

* **Evolve the Core:**
  Monetising opportunities to generate new revenue streams via programmes focusing on analytics, digitalisation of operations, and partnerships with digital service providers.

* **People:**
  Building an engaged and empowered workforce through integrated learning programs and coaching and mentoring.

* **Excellence in Customer Experience:**
  Creating superior customer experiences.

From day one, every employee who joins our team becomes an integral part of our success journey. We offer you the chance to enhance your skills, advance your career, and maintain a healthy work-life balance. Empowering you to catapult your personal and professional growth. If you’re looking to challenge your growth potential, Ooredoo is the employer for you.

**Job overview**

* The role-holder supports the Group Strategy and M&A department in driving the Group’s most critical cross‑functional strategic initiatives. The role plays a pivotal part in shaping, structuring, and executing high‑impact projects aligned with the Group’s growth agenda, with an initial focus on data centers and AI/GPU‑as‑a‑service, as well as other new strategic projects of the Group

* The role holder acts as an extension of the project owner, ensuring content leadership, rigorous execution, and end‑to‑end delivery across multiple workstreams.

**Your impact on our goals**

Strategic Initiative Delivery

* Support the planning, design, and execution of cross‑functional strategic initiatives in alignment with Group strategic and financial objectives.
* Co‑own project scopes, delivery plans, and executive materials, ensuring clear articulation of problems, approaches, and strategic options.
* Drive structured analysis, business cases, commercial models, and recommendations for senior leadership.

Content Leadership & Subject-Matter Support

* Develop substantive content in areas related to data centers, AI/GPU-as-a-service, and new adjacencies.
* Conduct market scans, competitor intelligence, partner assessments, and scenario modelling to guide strategic choices.
* Translate conceptual strategy into actionable workstreams with measurable KPIs and milestones.

Project Governance & Cross-Functional Coordination

* Lead governance routines (e.g. SteerCos, cross‑BU checkpoints) and track progress across all stakeholders.
* Coordinate with Group and OpCo teams across commercial, operations, technology, finance, legal, procurement, etc.
* Ensure risks, dependencies, and escalation points are well-managed and communicated.

Expansion of Data Center and AI/GPU Strategy

* Provide support in driving the territorial and scope expansion of Ooredoo’s data center and AI/GPU offerings.
* Work closely with Syntys on performance insights while leading the strategic expansion and new territory feasibility assessments.
* Evaluate partnership, JV, or M&A opportunities for the expansion of Data Centers and AI/GPU offerings.

Strategic Project Origination & Pipeline Support

* Assist in shaping the pipeline of new strategic projects approved under the updated Group strategy.
* Evaluate new initiatives, structure problem statements, define approach, and provide analytical leadership during early-stage exploration.

Executive Communication & Stakeholder Engagement

* Prepare executive-level presentations, Board papers, and investor communications related to strategic projects .
* Communicate complex strategic topics succinctly to senior executives, shareholders, and external partners.
* Represent the department in cross-organizational discussions with senior management and external stakeholders.

**Experience and Qualifications**

* Minimum 15 years of experience in strategy, corporate development, management consulting, investment analysis, in telco industry or digital infrastructure.
* Experience in data centers and AI infrastructure strongly preferred.
* Proven track record managing cross-functional initiatives with senior‑level exposure.
* Experience structuring financial/business models and strategic assessments
* Strong strategic thinking and structured problem-solving.
* Excellent analytical and financial modelling capabilities.
* High-level communication and executive presentation skills.
* Ability to manage ambiguity and lead cross-functional alignment.
* Understanding of digital infrastructure, AI technologies, and emerging tech trends preferred.
* Project ownership mindset with ability to drive end-to-end execution.
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, Economics, or related field.
* Master’s degree (MBA, Strategy, Finance, or Technology Management) preferred
* Must have worked in developing markets, ideally in a multinational environment

**NextEra is seeking a dynamic Senior Account Director (Oil & Gas) to lead strategic account growth and digital transformation initiatives across the energy sector.**

The Senior Account Director – Oil & Gas is responsible for leading strategic account management and business development within the Oil & Gas sector. This client-facing role owns executive relationships, drives digital transformation opportunities, and ensures profitable growth through tailored solutions and proactive engagement across key accounts in the region.

**Key Responsibilities:**

**Client Relationship Management**

* Serve as the primary interface for assigned Oil & Gas accounts
* Build trust and credibility with senior client stakeholders, including C-level executives
* Gain a deep understanding of client strategies, operational goals, and transformation needs

**Business Development & Sales Execution**

* Own and exceed sales targets for the assigned client portfolio
* Identify and pursue new growth opportunities, including renewals, upselling, and cross-selling
* Lead the full deal lifecycle—from opportunity qualification to contract closure

**Industry Expertise & Solutioning**

* Stay abreast of Oil & Gas industry trends, challenges, and emerging technologies
* Collaborate with solutioning, pre-sales, and delivery teams to develop customized solutions
* Translate technical solutions into clear business value for client stakeholders

**Account Planning & Internal Collaboration**

* Create and maintain strategic account plans aligned with client and business priorities
* Coordinate across internal functions (delivery, marketing, finance, leadership) to ensure seamless client engagement
* Provide accurate sales forecasts, performance reports, and pipeline updates

**Market Intelligence & Strategic Contribution**

* Monitor competitive landscape, regulatory developments, and innovation trends in the Oil & Gas sector
* Provide strategic input to internal stakeholders on product positioning and market opportunities
* Contribute to thought leadership initiatives and client-facing sector presentations

**P&L Ownership**

* Take full ownership of the
  **P&L for assigned accounts or sector**
* Ensure profitable growth by managing revenue, margins, and cost-to-serve
* Partner with finance and delivery teams to continuously improve financial performance and account profitability.

**Education & Work Experience**

* Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Business, or a related field
* Minimum 15 years of total professional experience in sales, account management, or business development within the technology, consulting, or digital services sectors
* At least 3 years of experience in the GCC region (mandatory)
* At least 5 years of experience managing strategic accounts in the Oil & Gas or Energy sector
* Proven track record of delivering digital transformation solutions and consistently achieving or exceeding sales targets
* Must have managed an individual annual revenue target of at least SAR 30 million (or USD 8 million) in previous roles
* Strong familiarity with major enterprise clients in Saudi Arabia and the broader GCC

**Why Join NextEra?**

At NextEra, we embrace diversity, inclusion, and innovation. We’re proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer, committed to fair and respectful hiring practices aligned with the values of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

We offer:

* A culture of integrity and creativity
* Support for personal and professional growth

Join us to explore bold possibilities, thrive in a dynamic environment, and reach new heights in your career.

data.title: Chief Financial Officer
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Summary:**

One of our clients are looking for Chief Financial Officer (CFO) who is responsible for leading the company’s financial strategy, governance, and performance management. This role oversees all financial functions, ensures compliance with regulatory and listing requirements, and pro
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary:**

One of our clients are looking for Chief Financial Officer (CFO) who is responsible for leading the company’s financial strategy, governance, and performance management. This role oversees all financial functions, ensures compliance with regulatory and listing requirements, and provides strategic financial leadership to support sustainable growth. The position requires prior experience in listed companies, preferably within the Oil & Gas or related industrial sectors, as previously emphasized by senior management.

**Key Responsibilities:**

**Financial Strategy & Leadership**

* Develop and implement the company’s financial strategy in alignment with corporate objectives.
* Act as a strategic partner to the CEO and Board, providing financial insights to support decision-making.
* Lead long-term financial planning, budgeting, forecasting, and capital allocation.

**Financial Management & Reporting**

* Oversee all financial operations, including accounting, treasury, taxation, and financial reporting.
* Ensure timely and accurate preparation of financial statements in compliance with IFRS and regulatory requirements applicable to listed companies.
* Manage quarterly and annual reporting, disclosures, and coordination with external auditors.

**Governance, Compliance & Risk**

* Ensure full compliance with stock exchange regulations, corporate governance standards, and statutory requirements.
* Establish and maintain robust internal controls, risk management frameworks, and financial policies.
* Liaise with regulators, auditors, banks, investors, and other external stakeholders.

**Capital Markets & Investor Relations**

* Manage relationships with shareholders, analysts, and financial institutions.
* Support capital raising activities, debt structuring, and funding strategies.
* Oversee investor communications, financial presentations, and market disclosures.

**Sector-Specific Oversight (Oil & Gas – Preferred)**

* Provide financial oversight for large-scale projects, CAPEX planning, and cost control initiatives.
* Evaluate project profitability, joint ventures, and long-term contracts common in the Oil & Gas sector.
* Monitor commodity price exposure, hedging strategies, and operational financial risks.

**Team Leadership & Development**

* Lead, mentor, and develop the finance team to ensure high performance and succession planning.
* Foster a culture of accountability, transparency, and continuous improvement within the finance function.

**Qualifications:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related field (required).
* Professional certification (CPA, ACCA, CMA, or equivalent) is highly preferred.
* Proven experience as CFO, Finance Director, or Head of Finance within listed companies.
* Prior experience in Oil & Gas or related industrial sectors is strongly preferred.
* Strong knowledge of financial regulations, corporate governance, and capital markets.
* Strategic financial leadership and commercial acumen
* Strong understanding of listed company compliance and reporting
* Advanced financial modeling and analytical skills
* Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills
* High ethical standards and attention to detail

data.title: Fixed Wing Senior First Officer
data.raw_snippet:
**Responsibilities:**

* Performs duties in assigned airplane in compliance with Flight Operation Manual & other duties as may be assigned by Chief Pilot or Fleet Captain.
* Responsible for complete knowledge of operating procedures in assigned airplane.
* Conducts interior and pre-flight inspection
data.jd_text:
**Responsibilities:**

* Performs duties in assigned airplane in compliance with Flight Operation Manual & other duties as may be assigned by Chief Pilot or Fleet Captain.
* Responsible for complete knowledge of operating procedures in assigned airplane.
* Conducts interior and pre-flight inspections to ensure aircraft air-worthiness, to include aircraft log, time on engines, time on aircraft and maintenance work performed.
* Mentors new First Officer in his assigned airplane to help him improve and develop his skills.
* Checks personally, or with the First Officer, to ensure all manifests and documents are properly completed, passengers are accounted for and cargo is loaded and secured for the flight.
* Checks all instruments, engines and communications equipment prior to the flight.
* Obtains flight clearance and clears with Customs and Immigration officials.
* Checks weather reports and ensures safe weather conditions for the route, cancelling flight if safe conditions do not exist.
* Makes a final check after engines are started and requests/obtains clearance for take-off.
* Pilots the aircraft in accordance with established and well recognized airman procedures and ICAO/GACA/FAA Rules & Regulations.
* Provides technical supervision to the First Officer to ensure functions are performed in accordance with established procedures i.e. Manifests, trip reports, flight log.
* Maintains continuous radio communications with appropriate control facilities, making required position and weather reports while receiving changes/amendments to the flight plan and requesting/receiving landing clearance.
* Checks the safety and comfort of the passengers and ensures that the aircraft is being operated in compliance with established FAA, Company and Department Operating and Safety Regulations.
* Completes all assigned courses as required by the Training Unit or Fleet Captain.
* Clears through Customs & Immigration and secures the aircraft.
* Ensures that cargo is released and passengers are properly disembarked from the aircraft, while keeping proper record entries.
* Arranges/Directs the refueling, servicing and security of aircraft while away from home base.

**Education:**
Bachelor in Engineering or Technical Discipline

**Knowledge and Experience:**
Minimum Years of Experience: 08 Special Field Experience Min 3000hrs flight time

data.title: Vice President - Instrumentation & Control Systems
data.raw_snippet:
We are seeking a senior business leader to head our Instrumentation, Automation & Control Systems division. This role carries full end-to-end responsibility for the business unit, including
**P&L ownership, commercial strategy, engineering capability, project execution, and customer satisfaction**
.
data.jd_text:
We are seeking a senior business leader to head our Instrumentation, Automation & Control Systems division. This role carries full end-to-end responsibility for the business unit, including
**P&L ownership, commercial strategy, engineering capability, project execution, and customer satisfaction**
.

The Vice President will play a critical role in driving growth, operational excellence, and transforming the business into a high-performing provider of integrated instrumentation, automation, and control system solutions across industrial and infrastructure sectors.

**Key Responsibilities:**

**Business & P&L Leadership**

* Own full P&L responsibility, driving revenue growth, profitability, and operational efficiency
* Develop and execute annual business plans, budgets, and financial targets
* Track financial KPIs and implement corrective actions as needed
* Provide regular performance and risk updates to executive leadership

**Commercial Strategy & Market Development**

* Lead tendering, pricing, proposals, and contract negotiations
* Ensure competitive, compliant, and profitable commercial offerings
* Identify and develop opportunities in instrumentation, automation, control systems, and smart industrial applications
* Build and strengthen relationships with utilities, industrial clients, EPC contractors, and consultants

**Project Delivery Excellence**

* Oversee all projects from award through final handover
* Ensure delivery meets schedule, cost, quality, and safety targets
* Establish and maintain a robust PMO framework for planning, risk management, and reporting
* Improve resource utilization and reduce rework and field issues

**Engineering & Systems Integration**

* Build strong engineering capabilities across instrumentation, PLC/DCS, SCADA/RTU, and systems integration
* Define engineering standards, design guidelines, and quality control processes
* Strengthen turnkey and integrated solution delivery capabilities

**Customer & Stakeholder Management**

* Act as the senior escalation point for key customers and partners
* Drive customer satisfaction and conduct regular business reviews
* Ensure timely resolution of commercial or execution issues

**Organization & Talent Development**

* Design and optimize the organizational structure
* Lead, mentor, and develop senior managers across commercial, engineering, and operations
* Identify talent gaps and support recruitment, training, and capability development
* Foster a culture of accountability, safety, and continuous improvement

**Candidate Profile**

* 15+ years of experience in industrial instrumentation, automation, and control systems
* Proven P&L leadership experience in a project-based or engineering organization
* Strong commercial, contractual, and negotiation skills
* Deep technical knowledge of instrumentation, PLC/DCS, SCADA, and systems integration
* Demonstrated ability to lead large, multidisciplinary technical teams
* Excellent communication and stakeholder-management capabilities

data.jd_text:
***Engineer the future of global finance. At Citi, our Tech team doesn’t just support finance – we are helping to redefine it. Every day, $5 trillion crosses through our network. We do business in 180+ countries operating at a scale few can match. From deploying advanced AI to helping shape global markets, we build systems that matter. Look to join a team where your work helps influence economies, your ideas can drive innovation and outcomes, and your growth is backed by mentorship, continuous learning and flexibility with potential hybrid work opportunities. Help solve real-world challenges that touch millions and get the opportunity to build the future of finance with Citi Tech.***
The IT Project Senior Analyst is a seasoned professional role. Applies in-depth disciplinary knowledge, contributing to the development of new techniques and the improvement of processes and work-flow for the area or function. Integrates subject matter and industry expertise within a defined area. Requires in-depth understanding of how areas collectively integrate within the sub-function as well as coordinate and contribute to the objectives of the function and overall business. Evaluates moderately complex and variable issues with substantial potential impact, where development of an approach/taking of an action involves weighing various alternatives and balancing potentially conflicting situations using multiple sources of information. Requires good analytical skills in order to filter, prioritize and validate potentially complex and dynamic material from multiple sources. Strong communication and diplomacy skills are required. Regularly assumes informal/formal leadership role within teams. Involved in coaching and training of new recruits. Significant impact in terms of project size, geography, etc. by influencing decisions through advice, counsel and/or facilitating services to others in area of specialization. Work and performance of all teams in the area are directly affected by the performance of the individual.
  
  
**Responsibilities:**

* Coordinates activities of the project team, identifies necessary resources and develops schedules to meet completion deadlines.
* Verifies project team adherence to control and risk implementations as well as standards and process changes.
* Determines scope and impact of project risks and issues; raises and resolves issues.
* Applies good understanding of concepts and procedures within own IT project leadership area to resolve issues.
* Demonstrates a comprehensive understanding of how areas of IT project leadership collectively integrate to contribute to achieving business goals.
* Provides evaluative judgment based on analysis of factual information in complicated and unique situations.
* Directly impacts the IT project leadership area through shared responsibility for delivery of end results and contribution to planning, budget management and formulation of procedures; influences resource planning.
* Persuades and influences others through communication and diplomacy skills; may negotiate with external parties.
* Appropriately assess risk when business decisions are made, demonstrating particular consideration for the firm's reputation and safeguarding Citigroup, its clients and assets, by driving compliance with applicable laws, rules and regulations, adhering to Policy, applying sound ethical judgment regarding personal behavior, conduct and business practices, and escalating, managing and reporting control issues with transparency.

**Qualifications:**

* Significant experience in an IT project leadership role with commensurate people management experience.

**Education:**

* Bachelor’s/University degree or equivalent experience

data.title: PMO Excellence Specialist
data.company: King Fahd University of Petroleum & Minerals - KFUPM
data.raw_snippet:
**Role Purpose**

To establish and oversee a centralized PMO governance and performance framework that ensures transparency, accountability, and effective delivery of institutional projects across administrative and support functions.

The role focuses on standardization, performance oversight, and
data.jd_text:
**Role Purpose**

To establish and oversee a centralized PMO governance and performance framework that ensures transparency, accountability, and effective delivery of institutional projects across administrative and support functions.

The role focuses on standardization, performance oversight, and assurance, not direct project execution.

**Key Responsibilities**

**PMO Governance & Frameworks**

* Define & implement PMO governance structures, standards & methodologies
* Establish project lifecycle frameworks & approval gates
* Ensure clarity of roles, responsibilities & decision authorities
* Align project governance with institutional policies & standards

**Portfolio Oversight & Assurance**

* Monitor institutional project portfolio across service functions
* Conduct project health checks & governance reviews
* Ensure adherence to approved methodologies & reporting standards
* Identify risks, delays & performance gaps
* Escalate critical issues to leadership

**Performance & Reporting**

* Develop & maintain project portfolio dashboards (in coordination with Performance & Analytics team)
* Define project KPIs & performance indicators
* Provide consolidated reporting to leadership
* Ensure accuracy, consistency & reliability of project data

**Compliance & Quality Alignment**

* Ensure projects align with governance, compliance & ISO standards
* Support audit readiness related to project governance
* Review project documentation & compliance adherence
* Promote quality assurance practices across projects

**Methodology & Continuous Improvement**

* Introduce & maintain standardized project management methodologies (PMI / PRINCE2)
* Identify opportunities to improve project delivery processes
* Capture lessons learned & institutionalize best practices
* Support maturity development of project management across departments

**Stakeholder Coordination**

* Coordinate with project owners & departments
* Facilitate governance forums & project review meetings
* Ensure alignment between strategic priorities & project execution
* Support communication of project performance to leadership

**Authority**

* Request project data, reports & updates from departments
* Enforce governance standards & reporting requirements
* Recommend corrective actions & improvements
* Escalate major risks & non compliance issues
* Does not manage or execute projects directly

**Qualifications & Experience**

* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Business, or related field (Master’s preferred)
* 7 - 9 years of experience in PMO, project governance, or performance roles
* Strong knowledge of project governance frameworks
* PMP, PRINCE2, or equivalent certification preferred
* Experience in large institutions or the public sector preferred

**Competencies**

* Governance & oversight
* Strategic execution alignment
* Analytical thinking
* Risk & performance management
* Stakeholder engagement
* Structured communication

This role requires strong technical acumen,
data.jd_text:
We are looking for a Technical Program Manager (TPM) to drive high-impact technology initiatives. You will work at the intersection of engineering, product, and business, ensuring complex projects are executed on time, within scope, and with high quality. This role requires strong technical acumen, program management expertise, and the ability to influence cross-functional stakeholders.

**Responsibilities**

* Own and drive the planning, execution, and delivery of complex technical programs across multiple teams.
* Translate business goals into actionable milestones.
* Define program scope, success metrics, schedules, and dependencies.
* Identify risks, resolve conflicts, and proactively remove roadblocks to ensure program success.
* Communicate clearly with executives, engineers, and cross-functional teams on progress, priorities, and issues.
* Partner with product managers and engineering leads to balance short-term priorities with long-term strategy.
* Foster collaboration across distributed teams and promote operational excellence.
* Champion continuous improvement in program management processes and tools.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 2+ years of experience in program or project management in a technology-driven company or fast-growing startups.
* Proven track record of managing large-scale, cross-functional programs end-to-end.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
* Ability to work in ambiguous, fast-paced environments.
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
* Experience working with financial products or programs is a plus

data.jd_text:
We are looking for a Program Manager to lead and coordinate high-impact initiatives across the organization. You will work closely with product, engineering, operations, and business stakeholders to ensure programs are delivered on time, aligned with company goals, and executed with excellence. This role requires strong program delivery discipline, cross-functional leadership, and the ability to drive clarity and alignment in fast-moving environments.

**Responsibilities**

* Own and drive the planning, execution, and delivery of cross-functional programs end to end.
* Translate business objectives into clear plans, timelines, and milestones.
* Define program scope, success metrics, schedules, and interdependencies.
* Identify risks early, resolve conflicts, and remove blockers to ensure successful delivery.
* Communicate progress, priorities, and issues clearly to executives and partner teams.
* Collaborate with product and engineering leaders to align execution with strategic goals.
* Promote strong coordination between distributed teams and ensure operational alignment.
* Continuously improve program management processes, tools, and governance.

﻿

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, or related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 2+ years of experience in program or project management in a technology-driven company or fast-growing startup.
* Demonstrated experience managing large or cross-functional programs from initiation to completion.
* Strong communication, stakeholder management, and facilitation skills.
* Advanced proficiency in Excel and experience using data analytics for decision-making, reporting, and tracking program performance
* Proven ability to operate in ambiguous and fast-paced environments.
* Strong analytical and structured problem-solving ability.
* Experience in financial services or financial products is a plus.

data.title: Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**The opportunity**
We are seeking an experienced Project Manager to lead and oversee various energy sector projects, ensuring their successful delivery within scope, budget, and timeline. This role involves managing project teams, stakeholder communication, and risk mitigation to achieve project ob
data.jd_text:
**The opportunity**
We are seeking an experienced Project Manager to lead and oversee various energy sector projects, ensuring their successful delivery within scope, budget, and timeline. This role involves managing project teams, stakeholder communication, and risk mitigation to achieve project objectives.
  
  
**How You’ll Make An Impact**

* Lead and manage the entire project lifecycle from initiation to closure, including planning, execution, monitoring, control, and closure activities.
* Define project scope, goals, and deliverables in collaboration with senior management and stakeholders.
* Develop comprehensive project plans, including detailed schedules, resource allocation, and budget forecasts.
* Assemble and lead project teams, providing guidance, motivation, and performance management.
* Communicate regularly with stakeholders, providing project updates, addressing concerns, and managing expectations.
* Identify and manage project risks, developing mitigation strategies and contingency plans.
* Manage project budgets, tracking expenditures, and ensuring financial targets are met.
* Oversee procurement processes for project materials and services.
* Conduct post-project evaluations to identify lessons learned and best practices for future projects.
* Prepare and present project reports, presentations, and documentation to senior management and clients.
* Responsible for ensuring compliance with applicable external and internal regulations, procedures, and guidelines.
* Living Hitachi Energy’s core values of safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business.

**Your background**

* A bachelor’s degree or diploma in Electrical Engineering is required.
* PMP or equivalent project management certification is preferred.
* Minimum of 7 years of progressive experience in project management, preferably within the energy, power, or infrastructure sectors.
* Proven track record of successfully delivering complex projects on time and within budget.
* Strong understanding of project management methodologies and tools.
* Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
* Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and prioritize effectively.
* Proficiency in project management software (e.g., Microsoft Project, Primavera P6).
* Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
* Ability to work effectively in a multicultural and geographically dispersed team environment.
* Proficiency in both spoken & written in English & Arabic language is required.

Hitachi Energy is a global technology leader in electrification, powering a sustainable energy future through innovative power grid technologies with digital at the core. Over three billion people depend on our technologies to power their daily lives.
  
  
With over a century in pioneering mission-critical technologies like high-voltage, transformers, automation, and power electronics, we are addressing the most urgent energy challenge of our time – balancing soaring electricity demand, while decarbonizing the power system.
  
  
Headquartered in Switzerland, we employ over 50,000 people in 60 countries and generate revenues of around $16 billion USD. We welcome you to apply today.
